name: bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKéMON.
appearance: Turquoise-green quadrupedal reptilian creature with dark green patches, small pointed ears, prominent red eyes, and a large, closed green bulb growing from its back with vine-like tendrils emerging from it.

name: ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.
appearance: Larger turquoise-green quadrupedal reptilian creature with darker green spots, small pointed ears, prominent red eyes, and a large, opening pink bulb with unfolding leaves on its back.

name: venusaur
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
appearance: Massive turquoise-green quadrupedal reptilian creature with darker green spots, prominent red eyes, and a gigantic red and white flower with broad green leaves blooming from its back, supported by a thick woody trunk.

name: charmander
description: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.
appearance: Small bipedal orange lizard-like creature with a cream-colored belly, large blue eyes, and a perpetually burning flame at the tip of its tail.

name: charmeleon
description: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.
appearance: Taller bipedal orange lizard-like creature with a cream-colored underside, sharp claws, a pronounced horn-like protrusion on its head, and a perpetually burning flame at the tip of its tail.

name: charizard
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: Large bipedal orange dragon-like creature with a cream-colored underside, powerful blue-green wings, a long neck, two prominent horns on its head, and a perpetually burning flame at the tip of its tail.

name: squirtle
description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.
appearance: Small bipedal light blue turtle-like creature with a hard brown shell, a cream-colored plastron, and a distinctive curly tail.

name: wartortle
description: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.
appearance: Larger bipedal light blue turtle-like creature with a hard brown shell, a cream-colored plastron, prominent white feathery ear tufts, and a large, furry white tail.

name: blastoise
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
appearance: Massive bipedal dark blue turtle-like creature with a hard brown shell, a cream-colored plastron, and two large gray water cannons protruding from its shoulders.

name: caterpie
description: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
appearance: Small, segmented green caterpillar-like creature with a cream-colored underside, large red eyes, four prominent yellow footpads, and a vibrant red Y-shaped antenna on its head.

name: metapod
description: This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
appearance: Green chrysalis-like creature with a hard, curved shell that forms a pointed peak on its head and prominent dark eyes.

name: butterfree
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
appearance: White-bodied moth-like creature with large purple eyes, two small blue antennae, and four large white wings adorned with black vein patterns and purple markings near the tips.

name: weedle
description: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.
appearance: Small, segmented brown worm-like creature with a cream-colored underside, large black eyes, and prominent purple stingers on both its head and tail.

name: kakuna
description: Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.
appearance: Yellow cocoon-like creature with a hard, conical shell that forms a prominent peak on its head and prominent dark eyes.

name: beedrill
description: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.
appearance: Yellow and black striped wasp-like creature with two large, sharp stingers for forelimbs, a smaller stinger on its abdomen, and two pairs of translucent wings.

name: pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.
appearance: Small, round-bodied bird-like creature with brown plumage, a cream-colored underside, and a distinctive light brown crest of feathers on its head.

name: pidgeotto
description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.
appearance: Larger, more slender brown bird-like creature with a distinctive red and yellow-striped crest on its head, prominent yellow talons, and a long, red-tipped tail.

name: pidgeot
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.
appearance: Large, majestic brown bird-like creature with an impressive, flowing red and yellow-striped crest extending from its head, prominent yellow talons, and a long, flowing red-tipped tail.

name: rattata
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal purple rodent-like creature with a cream-colored belly, large pointy ears, prominent incisors, and a long, coiled tail.

name: raticate
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
appearance: Larger, quadrupedal brown rodent-like creature with a cream-colored belly, prominent yellow incisors, long whiskers, and a long, segmented tail.

name: spearow
description: It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey.
appearance: Small, brown bird-like creature with a cream-colored belly, short red-tipped wings, and a short, pointed brown beak.

name: fearow
description: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.
appearance: Large, slender white bird-like creature with prominent red wings, a long, pointed beak, and a long, flowing crest of red feathers on its head and neck.

name: ekans
description: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.
appearance: Purple snake-like creature with yellow rings encircling its body, a cream-colored belly, and an unsegmented rattle-like tail.

name: arbok
description: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.
appearance: Large, purple cobra-like creature with variable, intimidating eye-like patterns on its hood, a cream-colored belly, and prominent fangs.

name: pikachu
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: Small yellow rodent with brown stripes on its back, long ears tipped with black, prominent red cheek pouches, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail.

name: raichu
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: Larger orange-brown rodent with a cream-colored belly, long, pointed ears tipped with brown, prominent yellow cheek pouches, and a long, thin brown tail that ends in a lightning bolt shape.

name: sandshrew
description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.
appearance: Small, bipedal yellowish-brown armadillo-like creature with a cream-colored belly, large dark eyes, and a hard, segmented shell-like back.

name: sandslash
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.
appearance: Larger, bipedal yellowish-brown pangolin-like creature with a cream-colored belly, sharp claws, and prominent beige spines covering its back and head.

name: nidoran-f
description: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.
appearance: Small, light blue quadrupedal rodent-like creature with darker blue spots, large ears with dark blue insides, and small, pointed horns on its head.

name: nidorina
description: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.
appearance: Larger, light blue quadrupedal rodent-like creature with darker blue spots, large ears with dark blue insides, and larger, pointed horns on its head.

name: nidoqueen
description: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.
appearance: Large bipedal purple reptilian creature with a cream-colored belly and chest, a spiky ruff around its neck, a thick tail, and large claws.

name: nidoran-m
description: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.
appearance: Small, light blue quadrupedal mammalian creature with large pointed ears, a spiky dark blue dorsal fin, a prominent horn on its forehead, and a short tail.

name: nidorino
description: An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.
appearance: Medium-sized, bipedal light blue reptilian creature with large pointed ears, dark blue spikes along its back, a prominent horn on its forehead, and two smaller teeth protruding from its upper jaw.

name: nidoking
description: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.
appearance: Large, bipedal purple reptilian creature with a cream-colored belly, large orange spikes along its back and on its head, a prominent horn, and large claws.

name: clefairy
description: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.
appearance: Small, bipedal pink fairy-like creature with large pointed ears with brown tips, three-toed feet, a small pair of cream-colored wings on its back, and a curly tail.

name: clefable
description: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
appearance: Larger, bipedal pink fairy-like creature with long pointed ears with brown tips, larger cream-colored wings on its back, and a more pronounced curly tail.

name: vulpix
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.
appearance: Small, fox-like quadrupedal creature with reddish-brown fur, six curly tails, and a cream-colored tuft of fur on its head.

name: ninetales
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.
appearance: Large, elegant fox-like quadrupedal creature with cream-colored fur, nine long, flowing tails, and a prominent crest of fur on its head.

name: jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
appearance: Small, spherical pink balloon-like creature with large blue eyes, pointed ears, and a small, curly tuft of hair on its forehead.

name: wigglytuff
description: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
appearance: Larger, spherical pink rabbit-like creature with long, floppy pointed ears, large blue eyes, and a white belly.

name: zubat
description: Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.
appearance: Small, purple bat-like creature with no visible eyes, large pointed ears, and a red mouth with two fangs.

name: golbat
description: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
appearance: Larger, blue bat-like creature with a wide mouth, two visible red eyes, large pointed ears, and a small pair of legs.

name: oddish
description: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.
appearance: Small, round blue plant-like creature with two small feet and five green leaves growing from its head.

name: gloom
description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.
appearance: Medium-sized, blue plant-like creature with two small feet, three large orange-brown petals around its head, and a perpetually drooling mouth.

name: vileplume
description: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.
appearance: Large, blue plant-like creature with two small feet, a gigantic red flower with white spots covering most of its body, and a short stem.

name: paras
description: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host.
appearance: Small, orange insectoid creature with a hard carapace, six legs, and two red-capped mushrooms growing on its back.

name: parasect
description: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.
appearance: Larger, orange insectoid creature with a hard carapace, six legs, and two large, red-capped mushrooms covering its entire back, with white gills visible underneath.

name: venonat
description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.
appearance: Small, purple insectoid creature with large red compound eyes, white fur covering its body, and small antennae.

name: venomoth
description: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.
appearance: Larger, light purple moth-like creature with large red compound eyes, feathery antennae, and two pairs of patterned wings with a dark purple spot and light purple rim.

name: diglett
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.
appearance: Small, brown mole-like creature with a red nose, emerging from the ground, with no visible body below.

name: dugtrio
description: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.
appearance: Three brown mole-like creatures with red noses, emerging side-by-side from the ground, with no visible bodies below.

name: meowth
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: Small, white feline creature with a golden oval coin on its forehead, prominent whiskers, and a curled tail.

name: persian
description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.
appearance: Medium-sized, cream-colored feline creature with a red jewel on its forehead, prominent whiskers, and a long, elegant tail.

name: psyduck
description: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers.
appearance: Yellow duck-like creature with a flat bill, three black hairs on its head, and small red eyes.

name: golduck
description: Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.
appearance: Blue duck-like creature with a red jewel on its forehead, a flat bill, and webbed hands and feet.

name: mankey
description: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.
appearance: Small, beige primate with a prominent pink snout, three-fingered hands, and a curled tail.

name: primeape
description: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.
appearance: Medium-sized, white primate with a prominent pink snout, four-fingered hands, and a chain-like appendage around its wrists and ankles.

name: growlithe
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
appearance: Orange puppy-like creature with black stripes, a cream-colored belly, and a cream-colored tuft of fur on its head and tail.

name: arcanine
description: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
appearance: Large, orange canine creature with black stripes, long flowing cream-colored fur on its head, chest, and tail, and a long, slender body.

name: poliwag
description: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.
appearance: Small, blue tadpole-like creature with a large head, a white swirl on its belly, and a long, thin tail.

name: poliwhirl
description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.
appearance: A blue, spherical tadpole-like Pokémon with a prominent white counter-clockwise swirl on its belly, large round eyes, and white mitten-like hands.

name: poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.
appearance: A muscular, bipedal blue frog-like Pokémon with a thick white ring on its belly containing a counter-clockwise swirl, and large white boxing-glove-like fists.

name: abra
description: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.
appearance: A small, bipedal yellow fox-like Pokémon with brown fur on its shoulders and upper body, long pointed ears with brown inner markings, and it typically appears with its eyes closed.

name: kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.
appearance: A bipedal, slender yellow fox-like Pokémon with brown stripes on its torso and tail, large pointed ears, a prominent brown mustache, and it often holds a silver spoon.

name: alakazam
description: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
appearance: A bipedal, slender yellow fox-like Pokémon with brown fur on its chest and shoulders, a large head with two pointed ears, a very long brown mustache, and it wields two silver spoons.

name: machop
description: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.
appearance: A small, muscular, bipedal grey humanoid Pokémon with a blue, dome-shaped head, a segmented midsection, and three toes on each foot.

name: machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power save belt to be able to regulate its motions.
appearance: A larger, highly muscular, bipedal grey humanoid Pokémon with a blue, dome-shaped head, a thick black power-restraining belt, and red veins visible on its upper arms.

name: machamp
description: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.
appearance: A large, extremely muscular, bipedal grey humanoid Pokémon with a blue, dome-shaped head, four muscular arms, a thick black power-restraining belt, and red veins visible on its upper body.

name: bellsprout
description: A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.
appearance: A bell-shaped, light green plant Pokémon with two large, broad green leaves serving as arms and two thin brown root-like feet.

name: weepinbell
description: It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.
appearance: A yellow, bell-shaped pitcher plant Pokémon with a wide, red, lipped mouth, two large green leaves, and a thin brown vine extending from its top.

name: victreebel
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
appearance: A large, dark green pitcher plant Pokémon with a wide, gaping red-lipped mouth, two broad green leaves, and a thin brown vine with a small leaf at its end extending from its top.

name: tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.
appearance: A translucent blue jellyfish-like Pokémon with a rounded head, two large red crystalline eyes, and two long, thin light blue tentacles extending from its underside.

name: tentacruel
description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.
appearance: A large, dark blue jellyfish-like Pokémon with a rounded head featuring two prominent red crystalline eyes, eight short blue tentacles, and two much longer, thicker tentacles extending from its base.

name: geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.
appearance: A rough, grey, boulder-shaped Pokémon with two muscular, rock-like arms, and a distinct face with small brown eyes and a downturned mouth.

name: graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.
appearance: A large, grey, jagged boulder-like Pokémon with two pairs of muscular, rock-like arms, often depicted floating, and four short brown, stump-like feet.

name: golem
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal, armadillo-like Pokémon with a grey rock-like body covered by a spiky, segmented brown shell, and a small, rough brown head with short horns.

name: ponyta
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.
appearance: A graceful, equine Pokémon with a cream-colored body, a fiery red and orange mane and tail, and golden hooves.

name: rapidash
description: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.
appearance: A slender, equine Pokémon with a white body, a magnificent fiery red and orange mane and tail, a sharp golden horn on its forehead, and golden hooves.

name: slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
appearance: A plump, light pink quadrupedal Pokémon with a white belly, stubby legs, a short curly tail, and a pig-like snout with two nostrils.

name: slowbro
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
appearance: A large, bipedal, light pink Pokémon with a white belly, a tan-colored shell attached to its tail, and small, curled ears.

name: magnemite
description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.
appearance: A small, spherical grey Pokémon with a single large eye, two horseshoe-shaped magnets on its sides, and a screw protruding from its top.

name: magneton
description: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.
appearance: A Pokémon composed of three Magnemite linked together by magnetic force, forming a triangular arrangement, each with a single eye, two horseshoe-shaped magnets, and a screw on top.

name: farfetchd
description: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.
appearance: A brown duck-like Pokémon with a white belly, yellow beak, and a distinctive leek stalk perpetually clutched in its wing.

name: doduo
description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.
appearance: A flightless, brown avian Pokémon with two long, scaly necks, two round heads featuring long pink beaks, and two short, stubby legs with three toes.

name: dodrio
description: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.
appearance: A flightless, brown avian Pokémon with three long, scaly necks, three round heads featuring long pink beaks, a black feathery ruff around its necks, and two short, stubby legs with three toes.

name: seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.
appearance: A white seal-like Pokémon with a short horn on its forehead, a red tongue often visible, and a small tuft of blue fur on its head.

name: dewgong
description: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.
appearance: A large, elegant white seal-like Pokémon with a long, pointed horn on its forehead, a flowing fan-like tail, and light blue fin-like limbs.

name: grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.
appearance: A purple, amorphous sludge Pokémon with two large, white, reflective eyes and a wide, pink-lipped mouth.

name: muk
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.
appearance: A larger, more solidified purple, amorphous sludge Pokémon with two large, white, reflective eyes, and a wide, pink-lipped mouth often showing sharp teeth.

name: shellder
description: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.
appearance: A purple bivalve Pokémon encased in a rigid, off-white shell with two distinct black pearl-like eyes peering out from between its halves.

name: cloyster
description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.
appearance: A purple, pearl-like body enclosed within a spiky, bivalve shell that is off-white on the outside and purple on the inside, with a single black eye and a horn-like protrusion.

name: gastly
description: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.
appearance: A spherical, gaseous body composed of purple smoke, with large white eyes that have tiny black pupils and a wide pink mouth.

name: haunter
description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.
appearance: A floating, purple ghost with disembodied, three-fingered hands, large white eyes with small pupils, and a long, pink tongue constantly sticking out.

name: gengar
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
appearance: A bipedal, purple, ghost-like creature with a round body, short legs, pointed ears, a mischievous grin, large red eyes, and several sharp spikes running down its back.

name: onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.
appearance: An extremely long, serpentine creature made of numerous grey boulders chained together, featuring a large, blocky head with two horn-like protrusions and a diamond-shaped crest between its eyes.

name: drowzee
description: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow, tapir-like creature with a brown, slightly curled trunk-like snout, a cream-colored belly, and an orange collar-like marking around its neck.

name: hypno
description: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow creature with a long, cream-colored neck, a large white ruff around its neck, a pink nose, and a silver pendulum-like object held in its left hand.

name: krabby
description: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.
appearance: A small, red, crab-like creature with four walking legs, two large pincers, and yellow eyes positioned on retractable stalks.

name: kingler
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.
appearance: A large, red, crab-like creature with one massive pincer claw that has several spikes, a smaller left pincer, four walking legs, and a rough, spiky red shell.

name: voltorb
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.
appearance: A perfectly smooth sphere with a red upper half and white lower half, two wide black eyes, and NO mouth — it has a completely blank, mouthless lower face.

name: electrode
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.
appearance: A perfectly smooth sphere with a WHITE upper half and RED lower half, two narrow black eyes, and a wide curved smile mouth on its red lower half.

name: exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.
appearance: A cluster of six psychic eggs, five of which are pink with varying cracks and yellow, smiling faces, and one that is slightly cracked but lacks a distinct face.

name: exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
appearance: A tall, bipedal palm tree-like creature with a thick, segmented brown trunk, two stubby legs, and three distinct, pineapple-like heads each topped with green palm leaves.

name: cubone
description: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKéMON's real face.
appearance: A small, bipedal, brown reptilian creature with a cream-colored skull worn as a helmet and a white bone clutched in its right hand.

name: marowak
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
appearance: A larger, bipedal, brown reptilian creature wearing a cream-colored skull as a helmet, with two small fangs protruding from its lower jaw, and wielding a larger white bone as a weapon.

name: hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.
appearance: A brown, bipedal, humanoid creature with spring-like lower legs and arms, a smooth, featureless upper torso that appears to have no neck or distinct head, and yellow-brown circular patches on its chest and back.

name: hitmonchan
description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.
appearance: A brown, bipedal, humanoid creature wearing red boxing gloves on its hands and a purple skirt-like garment around its waist.

name: lickitung
description: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.
appearance: A stout, bipedal, pink creature with a very long, prehensile pink tongue, a cream-colored belly, and a circular, cream-colored marking on each knee.

name: koffing
description: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.
appearance: A spherical, purple creature filled with gas, featuring a cream-colored skull and crossbones design on its front and several protruding bumps that act as exhaust vents.

name: weezing
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
appearance: A creature composed of two connected purple spherical bodies, with the larger body featuring a cream-colored skull and crossbones design and both bodies having several gas-emitting bumps.

name: rhyhorn
description: A POKéMON with a one-track mind. Once it charges,  it won't stop running until it falls asleep.
appearance: A stocky, grey, rhinoceros-like creature with rough, rocky skin, a single horn on its snout, and a row of blunt spikes running down its back.

name: rhydon
description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.
appearance: A large, bipedal, grey rhinoceros-like creature with thick, scale-like skin, a large drill-shaped horn on its snout, and a tail with a single spike at its tip.

name: chansey
description: A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.
appearance: A plump, pink, bipedal creature with a white, apron-like frill around its neck, three short hairs on its head, and a large pouch on its belly holding a white egg.

name: tangela
description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks.
appearance: An amorphous, dark blue body completely covered in a tangle of thick, light blue, vine-like tendrils, with two large white eyes and two red boot-like feet.

name: kangaskhan
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.
appearance: A large, bipedal, brown marsupial with thick, grey-brown armor plating on its head, shoulders, and back, carrying a smaller, light brown baby in its abdominal pouch.

name: horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.
appearance: A small, blue, seahorse-like creature with a coiled tail, a prominent dorsal fin, and a cream-colored belly.

name: seadra
description: Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.
appearance: A blue, seahorse-like creature with a long, elegant body, spiky fins on its back and head, a spiraled tail, and a cream-colored belly.

name: goldeen
description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.
appearance: A graceful white fish with large, flowing orange fins, a prominent horn on its forehead, and a fan-shaped tail fin.

name: seaking
description: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.
appearance: A larger, orange fish with a robust body, a prominent yellow horn on its forehead, black spots across its body, and a large, flowing tail fin.

name: staryu
description: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.
appearance: A five-pointed, brown starfish-like creature with a golden, metallic core at its center, adorned with a large red jewel.

name: starmie
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.
appearance: Purple starfish with a gold ring around a red gem in its center, and a second, smaller gold starfish rotated 45 degrees attached to its back, also with a red gem.

name: mr-mime
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
appearance: White humanoid with a round pink belly, blue hat-like protuberances on its head, white gloves, red cheek circles, and blue, segmented arms and legs.

name: scyther
description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.
appearance: Green insectoid bipedal with large, sharp, white scythe-like blades for forearms, a segmented torso, two pairs of light green wings, and a pointed head with three horn-like crests.

name: jynx
description: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.
appearance: Humanoid with a red dress-like body, long blonde hair, purple skin, large pink lips, and a pair of white glove-like hands.

name: electabuzz
description: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.
appearance: Yellow bipedal tiger-like creature with black stripes, two black lightning bolt-shaped horns on its head, black fur tufts on its shoulders, and a black-tipped tail.

name: magmar
description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.
appearance: Red bipedal duck-like creature with a yellow flame-like crest on its head, yellow beak-like mouth, red and orange flame patterns on its body, and a tail that resembles a burning flame.

name: pinsir
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.
appearance: Brown insectoid with large, powerful, antler-like pincers on its head, a segmented body, and sharp claws on its three-fingered hands.

name: tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: Brown bull-like quadruped with three white tails, large curved horns, a shaggy brown mane, and a determined expression.

name: magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.
appearance: Orange fish with large, vacant eyes, prominent barbels on its mouth, and large, stiff fins, including a yellow dorsal fin and a white belly.

name: gyarados
description: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.
appearance: Long, serpent-like dragon with blue scales, a yellow underbelly, red fins along its back, and a fierce, toothy mouth.

name: lapras
description: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.
appearance: Large blue plesiosaur-like creature with a grey shell on its back, a long neck, a pair of flippers, and a small horn between its eyes.

name: ditto
description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.
appearance: Amorphous, light purple blob with two small, dots for eyes and a simplistic line for a mouth.

name: eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal mammal with fluffy brown fur, a cream-colored ruff around its neck, a bushy tail, and large, pointed ears.

name: vaporeon
description: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.
appearance: Blue quadrupedal mammal resembling a mermaid with a frilled collar, a finned head crest, flippers for paws, and a large, bifurcated tail fin.

name: jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts.
appearance: Yellow quadrupedal mammal covered in spiky fur, with a white ruff around its neck, long pointed ears, and a small, pointed tail.

name: flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.
appearance: Fluffy, reddish-orange quadrupedal mammal with a cream-colored ruff, large bushy tail, and prominent tufts of fur on its head and ears.

name: porygon
description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.
appearance: Geometric, pink and blue digital bird-like creature composed of sharp angles, with a flat beak and a rectangular tail.

name: omanyte
description: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.
appearance: Small blue ammonite-like creature with a spiraling grey shell on its back, two large eyes, and ten small tentacles.

name: omastar
description: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.
appearance: Larger blue ammonite-like creature with a spiraling grey shell, a row of sharp teeth, and ten long, whipping tentacles.

name: kabuto
description: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.
appearance: Small, dark brown horseshoe crab-like creature with a smooth, dome-shaped shell, two large red eyes on its back, and four short legs underneath.

name: kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swim­ ming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.
appearance: Bipedal, brown arthropod with a scythe-like blade on each arm, a flattened shell on its back, and a head that resembles a trilobite's.

name: aerodactyl
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.
appearance: Grey pterodactyl-like creature with large leathery wings, a jagged crest on its head, and a long tail ending in a diamond-shaped tip.

name: snorlax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
appearance: Extremely large, rotund blue-green bear-like creature with a cream-colored belly, closed eyes, and large, sleepy expression.

name: articuno
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
appearance: Elegant, light blue avian creature with large, flowing tail feathers, ice-like crests on its head, and crystalline wings.

name: zapdos
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
appearance: Spiky, yellow avian creature with black markings, lightning bolt-shaped wings, and a pointed beak.

name: moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.
appearance: Fiery, orange avian creature with large, flame-like wings and tail feathers, a pointed beak, and a crest of fire on its head.

name: dratini
description: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.
appearance: Long, serpentine blue creature with a white belly, a small white fin on its head, and two small white wing-like fins on either side of its head.

name: dragonair
description: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.
appearance: Slender, light blue serpentine creature with small white wings on its head, a white belly, and two small blue orbs on its neck and tail.

name: dragonite
description: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
appearance: Large, orange bipedal dragon with small, white insect-like wings on its back, a cream-colored belly, and two small antennae on its head.

name: mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal grey cat-like creature with a long, purple-tipped tail, a prominent tube extending from the back of its head to its spine, and piercing purple eyes.

name: mew
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.
appearance: small, pink, feline-like creature with large blue eyes, a long thin tail with a rounded tip, and large ears.

name: chikorita
description: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.
appearance: small, pale green sauropod-like creature with a large dark green leaf on its head, a single tan collar of buds, and two small red eyes.

name: bayleef
description: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.
appearance: medium-sized, pale green sauropod-like creature with a large, curled dark green leaf on its head, a necklace of reddish-brown buds around its neck, and a long tail with a small, darker green leaf at the tip.

name: meganium
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
appearance: large, light green sauropod-like creature with a large pink flower petal collar around its neck, two prominent yellow antennae, and smaller pink flowers on its forehead.

name: cyndaquil
description: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.
appearance: small, bipedal shrew-like creature with a dark blue back and a cream-colored belly, possessing four red flame vents on its back that are often ignited.

name: quilava
description: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.
appearance: medium-sized, slender badger-like creature with a dark blue upper body and a cream-colored underside, featuring two large red flame vents on its head and one on its rear back.

name: typhlosion
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
appearance: large, bipedal badger-like creature with a dark blue-black body and a cream-colored underside, displaying a prominent ring of yellow-orange flames around its neck and upper back.

name: totodile
description: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.
appearance: small, bipedal blue crocodile-like creature with a red spine along its back, a cream-colored belly, and a large mouth with prominent teeth.

name: croconaw
description: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.
appearance: medium-sized, bipedal blue crocodilian creature with a red spine and markings on its back and head, a cream-colored belly, and a large maw lined with sharp teeth.

name: feraligatr
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.
appearance: large, bipedal blue crocodilian creature with yellow markings on its belly and chest, a red spiky pattern on its back and head, and large, powerful jaws.

name: sentret
description: A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
appearance: small, brown, ferret-like creature with a long, striped tail, large round ears, and dark brown markings around its eyes and on its paws.

name: furret
description: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.
appearance: long, slender, light brown ferret-like creature with red stripes on its belly, dark brown rings around its eyes, and a long, light brown tail.

name: hoothoot
description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.
appearance: small, round, brown owl with large, bright red eyes, a single clawed foot it stands on, and a prominent clock-like marking on its belly.

name: noctowl
description: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.
appearance: large, wise-looking brown owl with two prominent 'eyebrow' feathers, bright red eyes, and a patterned chest and belly.

name: ledyba
description: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
appearance: small, red ladybug-like creature with black spots on its shell-like wings, white hands and feet, and two short black antennae.

name: ledian
description: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
appearance: bipedal, red ladybug-like creature with large black spots on its back and hands, a white face with two short black antennae, and black legs.

name: spinarak
description: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.
appearance: small, green, spider-like creature with a large abdomen resembling a face, two pairs of red eyes, and a white silk string extending from its spinneret.

name: ariados
description: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.
appearance: larger, red and purple spider-like creature with a prominent white-faced pattern on its abdomen, a long yellow horn on its head, and four visible legs.

name: crobat
description: It flies so si­ lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
appearance: large, purple, bat-like creature with two pairs of wings, four legs that are also wings, and a long snout with two fangs.

name: chinchou
description: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.
appearance: small, blue, fish-like creature with two prominent antennae ending in yellow light-bulb-like organs, and large red eyes.

name: lanturn
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.
appearance: large, blue, fish-like creature with a prominent yellow antenna ending in a light bulb, a white belly, and large red eyes.

name: pichu
description: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.
appearance: small, yellow mouse-like creature with large black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a small black collar marking around its neck.

name: cleffa
description: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
appearance: small, pink, star-shaped creature with two pointed ears, a small curl on its head, and a perpetually smiling expression.

name: igglybuff
description: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
appearance: small, round, pink balloon-like creature with large blue eyes, a small curl of hair on its forehead, and a tiny tuft of pink hair on its head.

name: togepi
description: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
appearance: small, pale yellow, egg-shaped creature with red and blue triangular patterns on its shell, stubby arms and legs, and a small spike on its head.

name: togetic
description: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car­ ing people and shower them with happiness.
appearance: small, white, winged fairy-like creature with red and blue triangular patterns on its chest, a prominent spiked crest on its head, and a red collar-like marking.

name: natu
description: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.
appearance: small, green bird-like creature with a round body, red and yellow markings on its chest and tail, and large, dark, oval eyes.

name: xatu
description: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
appearance: tall, green bird-like creature with red and black stripes on its body and wings, yellow and black striped tail feathers, and a red crest on its head.

name: mareep
description: If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.
appearance: small, sheep-like creature with a fluffy cream-colored wool coat, yellow skin underneath, and a long tail ending in a yellow ball.

name: flaaffy
description: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.
appearance: medium-sized, pink sheep-like creature with a white wool 'collar' and tail tip, blue stripes on its ears, and a long tail ending in a black sphere.

name: ampharos
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.
appearance: Ampharos is a yellow bipedal sheep-like Pokémon with a white belly, black-and-white striped ears, a red gem on its forehead, and a black-segmented tail tipped with a prominent red orb.

name: bellossom
description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.
appearance: Bellossom is a small, green humanoid Pokémon with two large red flowers on its head, green leafy arms, and a skirt of alternating red and yellow petals.

name: marill
description: The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning.
appearance: Marill is a small, spherical blue Pokémon with a white belly, large round blue ears, and a thin black zigzag-patterned tail ending in a large white, buoyant sphere.

name: azumarill
description: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.
appearance: Azumarill is a larger, ovular blue Pokémon with a white belly, long white-lined blue ears, short blue arms, a white bubbly collar pattern, and a white, spherical tail.

name: sudowoodo
description: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composi­ tion appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.
appearance: Sudowoodo is a brown, bipedal Pokémon with a stubby, tree-like body, three round yellow spots on its back, short legs, and spherical green 'hands' attached to short, branch-like arms.

name: politoed
description: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide.
appearance: Politoed is a bipedal, green frog-like Pokémon with a creamy yellow belly, large red cheek pouches, prominent green hands, and a large, spiraling blue curl on its head.

name: hoppip
description: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.
appearance: Hoppip is a tiny, spherical pink Pokémon with two large green leaves sprouting from its head and two small, stubby feet.

name: skiploom
description: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.
appearance: Skiploom is a green, bipedal Pokémon with a light pink bulbous head, two green leaf-like arms, and a large yellow flower with small green leaves on its head.

name: jumpluff
description: Once it catches the wind, it deft­ ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.
appearance: Jumpluff is a green, bipedal Pokémon with a pink bulbous head, green leafy feet, and three white cotton puffballs: one on its head and one on each of its two elongated arm-like structures.

name: aipom
description: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.
appearance: Aipom is a purple monkey-like Pokémon with a cream-colored muzzle, large ears, and a long tail that ends in a three-fingered hand.

name: sunkern
description: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.
appearance: Sunkern is a small, brown, seed-like Pokémon with two large green leaves extending from its head and small, beady black eyes.

name: sunflora
description: It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.
appearance: Sunflora is a yellow, sunflower-like Pokémon with large orange and red petals framing its face, small green leaf-like arms, and short green stem-like legs.

name: yanma
description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.
appearance: Yanma is a red, dragonfly-like Pokémon with a long segmented tail, four large translucent wings with red tips, and two prominent, multi-faceted black and green compound eyes.

name: wooper
description: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
appearance: Wooper is a blue, salamander-like Pokémon with a darker blue belly, short stubby legs, and two prominent purple, branch-like gills protruding from each side of its head.

name: quagsire
description: This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
appearance: Quagsire is a light blue, bipedal amphibian-like Pokémon with a darker blue zigzag pattern on its back, large forearms, and two small, fan-like blue frills on its head.

name: espeon
description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its ene­ my's actions.
appearance: Espeon is a sleek, lavender feline Pokémon with large pointed ears, white fur tufts on its chest, a prominent red gem embedded in its forehead, and a long, bifurcated tail.

name: umbreon
description: When agitated, this POKéMON pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.
appearance: Umbreon is a sleek, black canine Pokémon with glowing red eyes, prominent yellow rings on its forehead, ears, and legs, and a long, dark tail.

name: murkrow
description: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
appearance: Murkrow is a black, crow-like Pokémon with prominent red eyes, a yellow beak, a red jagged feather crown on its head, and tattered, broom-like tail feathers.

name: slowking
description: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
appearance: Slowking is a pink, bipedal Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, a large spiraling pink and white shell on its head adorned with a red gem, and a yellow ruffled collar around its neck.

name: misdreavus
description: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.
appearance: Misdreavus is a grey, spherical-headed ghost Pokémon with large red eyes, a jagged mouth, yellow beaded necklace-like markings, and a long, flowing, purple lower body adorned with several red orbs.

name: unown
description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.
appearance: Unown is a thin, flat, black glyph-like Pokémon with a single large white eye, whose body is shaped like various letters of the Latin alphabet or punctuation marks.

name: wobbuffet
description: It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike.
appearance: Wobbuffet is a large, blue, sac-like Pokémon with a wide red-lipped smile, white beady eyes, a black dot on its chest, and a slender black tail that ends in two prominent black eyes.

name: girafarig
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.
appearance: Girafarig is a yellow, giraffe-like Pokémon with brown spots, a pink mane, a long neck, and dark brown, zebra-striped hindquarters that culminate in a short, black, two-eyed head-like tail.

name: pineco
description: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.
appearance: Pineco is a dark blue, pinecone-like Pokémon with two small black eyes, a spikey, ridged top, and a prominent black circular opening on its front.

name: forretress
description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.
appearance: Forretress is a large, spherical, red Pokémon encased in a gray, segmented metallic shell, featuring multiple stubby cannon-like appendages, small black eyes, and a visible black interior.

name: dunsparce
description: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail.
appearance: Dunsparce is a cream-colored, serpentine Pokémon with blue stripes along its back, two small white wings, a prominent drill-like tail, and beady black eyes.

name: gligar
description: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison.
appearance: Gligar is a purple, scorpion-like Pokémon with large red eyes, prominent pincers, blue wing membranes stretching between its limbs, and a segmented tail ending in a sharp stinger.

name: steelix
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
appearance: Steelix is an extremely long, segmented, metallic gray serpent-like Pokémon with a large, jagged rock-like head, prominent lower jaw, and sharp, imposing facial features.

name: snubbull
description: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.
appearance: Snubbull is a pink, bulldog-like Pokémon with prominent fangs protruding from its upper jaw, a black nose, a blue studded collar, and a blue patterned skirt-like marking around its waist.

name: granbull
description: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.
appearance: Granbull is a large, purple, bulldog-like Pokémon with powerful jaws, two prominent lower fangs, a black nose, large drooping ears, a small pink patterned skirt-like marking, and a studded black collar.

name: qwilfish
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.
appearance: A round, light blue pufferfish-like Pokémon covered in numerous sharp white spikes, with a dark blue spiny dorsal fin and two dark blue pectoral fins, and prominent white lips.

name: scizor
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
appearance: A red, bipedal insectoid Pokémon with a sleek metallic body, large red pincer-like claws featuring a black circular marking on the inner palm, black segments on its waist, and two pairs of translucent wings on its back.

name: shuckle
description: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.
appearance: A yellow worm-like creature residing within a hard, red, multi-sectioned shell with several holes, featuring a light blue head with two large white eyes and two small antennae.

name: heracross
description: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
appearance: A large, blue beetle-like Pokémon with a prominent dark blue rhinoceros-like horn extending from its head, two large yellow eyes, and two pairs of translucent wings on its back.

name: sneasel
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
appearance: A slender, dark purple weasel-like Pokémon with sharp white claws, a red jewel on its forehead, a pair of large yellow oval eyes, and a single black-tipped feather on its left ear.

name: teddiursa
description: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light brown bear cub with a cream-colored crescent moon marking on its forehead, large cream-colored ear insides, and a small white paw pad on each of its three-toed feet.

name: ursaring
description: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.
appearance: A large, bipedal, dark brown bear with a prominent yellow ring marking on its belly, large claws on its paws, and a short, tufted tail.

name: slugma
description: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.
appearance: A molten slug-like Pokémon composed entirely of bright red magma, with two large yellow eyes and a slightly hardened rock-like head.

name: magcargo
description: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.
appearance: A snail-like Pokémon with a body of bright red magma and a hardened, spiraling grey volcanic rock shell from which smoke continuously emanates, and two large yellow eyes.

name: swinub
description: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
appearance: A small, stout, brown pig-like Pokémon covered in shaggy dark brown fur, with a large pink snout, small black eyes, and short legs.

name: piloswine
description: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal, shaggy brown mammoth-like Pokémon covered in long dark brown fur, with two long white tusks curving upwards, and small beady black eyes that are often obscured by its fur.

name: corsola
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.
appearance: A small, pink coral-like Pokémon with multiple branched white coral growths protruding from its back and head, two small black eyes, and a small mouth.

name: remoraid
description: It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.
appearance: A light blue fish-like Pokémon resembling a revolver, with a grey dorsal fin, two small black eyes, and a distinct white mouth.

name: octillery
description: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.
appearance: A red octopus-like Pokémon with a large, bulbous head, eight suction-cup-covered tentacles, and two large yellow eyes, with a cannon-like snout.

name: delibird
description: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.
appearance: A red and white penguin-like bird Pokémon with a large white belly, a red body, a yellow beak, and a large red sack-like tail that it uses to carry food.

name: mantine
description: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.
appearance: A large, flat, dark blue manta ray-like Pokémon with a white underside, two large white spots on its back, a small dark blue tail, and two white antennae-like structures on its head.

name: skarmory
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.
appearance: A large, silver, metallic bird-like Pokémon with sharp steel wings, a long, segmented neck, red eyes, and sharp, three-toed talons.

name: houndour
description: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal, dark grey dog-like Pokémon with bone-like white markings around its neck and on its back, a red collar-like marking, and small red eyes.

name: houndoom
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
appearance: A larger, quadrupedal, dark grey dog-like Pokémon with bone-like white markings resembling ribs and a collar, a ridged horn on its head, and a pointed tail with a bone-like tip.

name: kingdra
description: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.
appearance: A sleek, dark blue seahorse-dragon-like Pokémon with a large, spiraled snout, light blue fins resembling a fan on its head and back, and a crown-like formation on its head.

name: phanpy
description: It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.
appearance: A small, round, light blue elephant-like Pokémon with large floppy ears, a short trunk, and a single red spot on each cheek.

name: donphan
description: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.
appearance: A large, grey elephant-like Pokémon with thick, grey, ridged skin, two large white tusks, and a long trunk, with tire-like markings on its legs.

name: porygon2
description: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.
appearance: A smooth, pink, geometric Pokémon with a rounded body, two short blue legs, a large blue circular tail, and a single blue eye in the center of its head.

name: stantler
description: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted.
appearance: A brown deer-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, two large, dark brown, spiraled antlers, and a small, pointed tail.

name: smeargle
description: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
appearance: A bipedal, cream-colored beagle-like Pokémon with a large green painter's cap on its head, a long brown tail with a green tip that resembles a paintbrush, and a mischievous expression.

name: tyrogue
description: It is always bursting with en­ ergy. To make it­ self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light purple humanoid Pokémon with large white hands, three toes on each foot, and a determined expression.

name: hitmontop
description: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard.
appearance: A bipedal, brown humanoid Pokémon designed to resemble a spinning top, with a dark blue cone-shaped head, two dark blue spheres on its chest, and three pointed toes.

name: smoochum
description: Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
appearance: A small, humanoid, pink-skinned Pokémon with large, prominent red lips, blonde hair, and two large blue eyes.

name: elekid
description: It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it charges up only a little bit.
appearance: A small, yellow, bipedal Pokémon with a black stripe around its midsection, a black lightning bolt-shaped pattern on its head, and two short black horns.

name: magby
description: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.
appearance: A small, red, bipedal Pokémon with a large yellow belly and chest, a prominent yellow bill-like mouth, and a small flame constantly burning on the back of its head.

name: miltank
description: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.
appearance: A pink, bovine-like Pokémon with a white belly and face, large black horns, black patches on its back and flank, and a prominent pink udder.

name: blissey
description: Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY's egg be­ comes unfailingly caring and pleas­ ant to everyone.
appearance: A large, soft-bodied, pink, egg-shaped Pokémon with a red crest on its head, small white wing-like appendages on its back, and a pouch on its belly holding a pink egg.

name: raikou
description: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.
appearance: A large, yellow, saber-toothed tiger-like Pokémon with black stripes, a white underside, a large purple mane forming a cloud on its back, and gray metallic wrist cuffs.

name: entei
description: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un­ able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.
appearance: A large, mastiff-like Pokémon with a brown body, a long, fluffy gray mane, a red plate on its face, white forelegs, and yellow rings around its ankles.

name: suicune
description: It races around the world to purify fouled water. It dashes away with the north wind.
appearance: A sleek, light blue, dog-like Pokémon with a purple mane flowing down its back, two long white streamers trailing from its head, and a light blue diamond pattern on its forehead.

name: larvitar
description: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow.
appearance: A small, green, bipedal Pokémon with red diamond-shaped markings on its belly and an armored gray head featuring a horn-like protrusion.

name: pupitar
description: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its THRASHING can topple a mountain.
appearance: A large, gray, bipedal, pupa-like Pokémon with two pointed limbs, four small openings on its front, and two glowing red eyes visible through slits.

name: tyranitar
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.
appearance: A large, bipedal, armored, dark green dinosaur-like Pokémon with a gray diamond pattern on its chest, red eyes, and a spiky dorsal ridge.

name: lugia
description: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.
appearance: A large, elegant, mostly white, avian-like Pokémon with a long neck, blue fin-like plates along its back, and a light blue underside.

name: ho-oh
description: Legends claim this POKéMON flies the world's skies con­ tinuously on its magnificent seven- colored wings.
appearance: A magnificent, large, phoenix-like bird with vibrant rainbow-colored plumage, predominantly red with green underwings, yellow tail feathers, and white chest feathers.

name: celebi
description: This POKéMON wan­ ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.
appearance: A small, green, fairy-like Pokémon with large blue eyes, two pointed antennae, and small transparent wings on its back.

name: treecko
description: TREECKO has small hooks on the bottom of its feet that enable it to scale vertical walls. This POKéMON attacks by slamming foes with its thick tail.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light green gecko-like Pokémon with a red belly, yellow eyes, and a large, flat, leaf-shaped tail.

name: grovyle
description: The leaves growing out of GROVYLE’s body are convenient for camouflaging it from enemies in the forest. This POKéMON is a master at climbing trees in jungles.
appearance: A bipedal, light green, raptor-like Pokémon with a red belly, two large, dark green leaf-like blades on its forearms, and two large leaves extending from its tail.

name: sceptile
description: The leaves growing on SCEPTILE’s body are very sharp edged. This POKéMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal, dark green gecko-like Pokémon with a light green belly, red markings on its chest, yellow eyes, and three leaf-like blades on each forearm.

name: torchic
description: TORCHIC sticks with its TRAINER, following behind with unsteady steps. This POKéMON breathes fire of over 1,800 degrees F, including fireballs that leave the foe scorched black.
appearance: A small, orange, chick-like Pokémon with a yellow, feather-like crest on its head, black eyes, and a small, flame-like tuft on its rear.

name: combusken
description: COMBUSKEN toughens up its legs and thighs by running through fields and mountains. This POKéMON’s legs possess both speed and power, enabling it to dole out ten kicks in one second.
appearance: A bipedal, chicken-like Pokémon with an orange body, a yellow head crest, gray legs, and a black belt-like band around its waist.

name: blaziken
description: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this POKéMON’s wrists burn.
appearance: A tall, bipedal, humanoid chicken-like Pokémon with a predominantly red body, black markings on its upper legs and chest, beige fur around its wrists, and yellow feathery crests on its head.

name: mudkip
description: The fin on MUDKIP’s head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this POKéMON can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.
appearance: A small, light blue, quadrupedal axolotl-like Pokémon with an orange star-shaped marking on each cheek and a large, dark blue dorsal fin.

name: marshtomp
description: The surface of MARSHTOMP’s body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This POKéMON plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.
appearance: A bipedal, light blue, axolotl-like Pokémon with orange star-shaped markings on its cheeks, gray belly, and a dark blue dorsal fin extending onto its tail.

name: swampert
description: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKéMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.
appearance: A large, bipedal, light blue, bulky axolotl-like Pokémon with orange star-shaped markings on its cheeks, a gray belly, and two dark blue fins on its head and back.

name: poochyena
description: At first sight, POOCHYENA takes a bite at anything that moves. This POKéMON chases after prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it may turn tail if the prey strikes back.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal, gray canine Pokémon with dark gray fur around its neck, face, and legs, and a brown snout.

name: mightyena
description: MIGHTYENA gives obvious signals when it is preparing to attack. It starts to growl deeply and then flattens its body. This POKéMON will bite savagely with its sharply pointed fangs.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal, dark gray wolf-like Pokémon with black shaggy fur on its head, neck, and lower legs, and piercing red eyes.

name: zigzagoon
description: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKéMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal, badger-like Pokémon with a beige body, zigzag brown stripes on its back, and black rings around its eyes and on its legs.

name: linoone
description: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKéMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.
appearance: A long, slender, white badger-like Pokémon with a brown stripe running down its back, brown ear tips, and black zigzag markings on its legs and tail.

name: wurmple
description: Using the spikes on its rear end,   WURMPLE peels the bark off trees and feeds on the sap that oozes out. This POKéMON’s feet are tipped with suction pads that allow it to cling to glass without slipping.
appearance: A small, red, caterpillar-like body with a cream-colored underside, two yellow spikes on its rear, and a single, large yellow horn on its head.

name: silcoon
description: SILCOON tethers itself to a tree branch using silk to keep from falling. There,  this POKéMON hangs quietly while it awaits evolution. It peers out of the silk cocoon through a small hole.
appearance: A white, oval-shaped cocoon Pokémon covered in fine silk, with two small red eyes visible through a narrow opening.

name: beautifly
description: BEAUTIFLY’s favorite food is the sweet pollen of flowers. If you want to see this POKéMON, just leave a potted flower by an open window. BEAUTIFLY is sure to come looking for pollen.
appearance: A graceful butterfly-like Pokémon with yellow wings adorned with black and blue patterns, a blue body, and red antennae.

name: cascoon
description: CASCOON makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This POKéMON prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon.
appearance: A dark purple, oval-shaped cocoon Pokémon covered in fine silk, with two small red eyes visible through a narrow opening.

name: dustox
description: DUSTOX is instinctively drawn to light. Swarms of this POKéMON are attracted by the bright lights of cities, where they wreak havoc by stripping the leaves off roadside trees for food.
appearance: A large, purple moth-like Pokémon with green-tinged, segmented wings featuring yellow spot patterns, and long, yellow antennae.

name: lotad
description: It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.
appearance: A small, blue, platypus-like Pokémon with a large green lily pad covering its back, yellow eyes, and yellow beak-like mouth.

name: lombre
description: It lives at the water’s edge where it is sunny. It sleeps on a bed of water grass by day and becomes active at night.
appearance: Green bipedal platypus-like creature with a tan belly, a large light brown sombrero-like lily pad on its head, and a red beak.

name: ludicolo
description: LUDICOLO begins dancing as soon as it hears cheerful, festive music. This POKéMON is said to appear when it hears the singing of children on hiking outings.
appearance: Green bipedal pineapple-shaped creature with a yellow belly, a large light brown sombrero-like lily pad, two green leaves sticking up from its head, and two yellow spots on its face resembling maracas.

name: seedot
description: SEEDOT attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this POKéMON’s body becomes.
appearance: Small brown acorn-like creature with a black eye-stripe, a small cream-colored 'cap' on its head, and a pointed protrusion at its base.

name: nuzleaf
description: NUZLEAF live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This POKéMON dislikes having its long nose pinched.
