appearance: Brown bipedal creature with a pointed nose, a large leaf-like crest on its head, two large leaf-like protrusions on its upper thighs, and a light-brown belly.

name: shiftry
description: It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.
appearance: Tall brown bipedal creature with a long pointed nose, two white 'beards', large red fan-like leaves on its arms, and a large light-brown palm-tree-like frond on its head.

name: taillow
description: TAILLOW courageously stands its ground against foes, however strong they may be. This gutsy POKéMON will remain defiant even after a loss. On the other hand, it cries loudly if it becomes hungry.
appearance: Small blue bird with a white belly, red underbelly, two pointed tail feathers, and a white facial marking resembling a bib.

name: swellow
description: SWELLOW flies high above our heads, making graceful arcs in the sky. This POKéMON dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. The hapless prey is tightly grasped by SWELLOW’s clawed feet, preventing escape.
appearance: Sleek blue swallow-like bird with a red face and underbelly, long pointed wings, and two very long, slender tail feathers that split into two points.

name: wingull
description: WINGULL has the habit of carrying prey and valuables in its beak and hiding them in all sorts of locations. This POKéMON rides the winds and flies as if it were skating across the sky.
appearance: White seagull-like bird with a blue back, a yellow beak, and a V-shaped indentation in its forehead.

name: pelipper
description: It is a messenger of the skies, carrying small Pokémon and eggs to safety in its bill.
appearance: Large white pelican-like bird with a massive yellow beak that forms a pouch, blue wings, and webbed feet.

name: ralts
description: RALTS senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This POKéMON rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition.
appearance: Small white humanoid creature with a green bowl-cut hair-like head, two red horns protruding from its sides, and a white skirt-like lower body.

name: kirlia
description: It is said that a KIRLIA that is exposed to the positive emotions of its TRAINER grows beautiful. This POKéMON controls psychokinetic powers with its highly developed brain.
appearance: Slender white humanoid creature with a green bowl-cut hair-like head, two flat red horns, and a wavy white skirt-like lower body.

name: gardevoir
description: GARDEVOIR has the ability to read the future. If it senses impending danger to its TRAINER, this POKéMON is said to unleash its psychokinetic energy at full power.
appearance: Elegant white humanoid creature with a slender body, green flowing hair-like elements, a red horn-like protrusion on its chest, and a long white gown-like lower body.

name: surskit
description: From the tips of its feet, SURSKIT secretes an oil that enables it to walk on water as if it were skating. This POKéMON feeds on microscopic organisms in ponds and lakes.
appearance: Blue four-legged insect-like creature with a yellow 'cap' on its head, four yellow legs, and two long antennae with red tips.

name: masquerain
description: MASQUERAIN intimidates enemies with the eyelike patterns on its antennas. This POKéMON flaps its four wings to freely fly in any direction - even sideways and backwards - as if it were a helicopter.
appearance: Large blue moth-like creature with four wings resembling large eye-spots, red antennae, and two red stripes on its belly.

name: shroomish
description: SHROOMISH live in damp soil in the dark depths of forests. They are often found keeping still under fallen leaves. This POKéMON feeds on compost that is made up of fallen, rotted leaves.
appearance: Small mushroom-like creature with a green cap covered in black spots, a small beige body, and two small red feet.

name: breloom
description: BRELOOM closes in on its foe with light and sprightly footwork, then throws punches with its stretchy arms. This POKéMON’s fighting technique puts boxers to shame.
appearance: Bipedal mushroom-kangaroo-like creature with a green cap, red spots on its cap, a beige body, and two long slender arms ending in green claws.

name: slakoth
description: SLAKOTH lolls around for over twenty hours every day. Because it moves so little, it does not need much food. This POKéMON’s sole daily meal consists of just three leaves.
appearance: Brown furry sloth-like creature with a pink nose, two large brown stripes on its back, and a white fur collar.

name: vigoroth
description: VIGOROTH is always itching and agitated to go on a wild rampage. It simply can’t tolerate sitting still for even a minute. This POKéMON’s stress level rises if it can’t be moving constantly.
appearance: White furry ape-like creature with a red nose, a thick red stripe down its back, and four sharp claws on each hand.

name: slaking
description: SLAKING spends all day lying down and lolling about. It eats grass growing within its reach. If it eats all the grass it can reach, this POKéMON reluctantly moves to another spot.
appearance: Large brown furry ape-like creature with a massive head, white fur around its neck, a thick red stripe down its back, and a lighter brown belly.

name: nincada
description: NINCADA lives underground for many years in complete darkness. This POKéMON absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees. It stays motionless as it waits for evolution.
appearance: Small brown cicada nymph-like creature with a segmented body, small red eyes, and short white antennae.

name: ninjask
description: NINJASK moves around at such a high speed that it cannot be seen, even while its crying can be clearly heard. For that reason, this POKéMON was long believed to be invisible.
appearance: Yellow and black cicada-like creature with large orange eyes, sharp scythe-like arms, and two pairs of translucent wings.

name: shedinja
description: SHEDINJA’s hard body doesn’t move - not even a twitch. In fact, its body appears to be merely a hollow shell. It is believed that this POKéMON will steal the spirit of anyone peering into its hollow body from its back.
appearance: Hollow cicada shell-like creature with a segmented brown body, a crack on its back, a small halo-like crown, and two small, stiff, translucent wings.

name: whismur
description: Normally, WHISMUR’s voice is very quiet - it is barely audible even if one is paying close attention. However, if this POKéMON senses danger, it starts crying at an earsplitting volume.
appearance: Pink rabbit-like creature with large floppy ear-flaps that are purple on the inside, a yellow horn on its head, and a large purple mouth.

name: loudred
description: LOUDRED’s bellowing can completely decimate a wood-frame house. It uses its voice to punish its foes. This POKéMON’s round ears serve as loudspeakers.
appearance: Purple bipedal creature with large ear-like structures that resemble speakers, a large yellow horn on its head, and a prominent red mouth.

name: exploud
description: EXPLOUD triggers earthquakes with the tremors it creates by bellowing. If this POKéMON violently inhales from the ports on its body, it’s a sign that it is preparing to let loose a huge bellow.
appearance: Large white bipedal creature with a purple belly, multiple speaker-like protuberances on its body (two large ones on its head and two on its chest), and red markings around its mouth.

name: makuhita
description: MAKUHITA is tenacious - it will keep getting up and attacking its foe however many times it is knocked down. Every time it gets back up, this POKéMON stores more energy in its body for evolving.
appearance: Yellow bipedal sumo-wrestler-like creature with a brown 'belt' around its waist, a red marking on its face, and a bald head.

name: hariyama
description: It has the habit of challenging others without hesitation to tests of strength. It’s been known to stand on train tracks and stop trains using forearm thrusts.
appearance: Large yellow bipedal sumo-wrestler-like creature with a red belt, a red marking on its face, and black hair-like tufts on its head and chest.

name: azurill
description: A Pokémon that lives by water. It moves quickly on land by bouncing on its big tail.
appearance: Small blue round creature with two large ears, a white belly, and a prominent blue bouncy tail with a white base.

name: nosepass
description: NOSEPASS’s magnetic nose is always pointed to the north. If two of these POKéMON meet, they cannot turn their faces to each other when they are close because their magnetic noses repel one another.
appearance: Gray rock-like creature with a large red nose that functions as a compass, two flat triangular 'ears,' and small red eyes.

name: skitty
description: SKITTY has the habit of becoming fascinated by moving objects and chasing them around. This POKéMON is known to chase after its own tail and become dizzy.
appearance: Pink feline-like creature with a puffy white collar, large pointed ears, and a fluffy curled tail that resembles a cat toy with three yellow spheres.

name: delcatty
description: DELCATTY prefers to live an unfettered existence in which it can do as it pleases at its own pace. Because this POKéMON eats and sleeps whenever it decides, its daily routines are completely random.
appearance: Elegant lavender feline with white chest fur, white paws, a long curled tail, and a fluffy purple collar-like ruff around its neck

name: sableye
description: SABLEYE lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these POKéMON are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness.
appearance: Small, bipedal purple goblin-like Pokemon with large red gem-like eyes, a red gem on its chest, and three smaller blue gems on its back

name: mawile
description: MAWHILE’s huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.
appearance: Short, bipedal black-bodied Pokemon with yellow humanoid-like features, a large red bow-like structure on its head, and a massive set of steel jaws on the back of its head

name: aron
description: This POKéMON has a body of steel. To make its body, ARON feeds on iron ore that it digs from mountains. Occasionally, it causes major trouble by eating bridges and rails.
appearance: Small, four-legged dark gray iron armor-plated Pokemon with a light gray underbelly, light blue eyes, and two small white conical horns on its head

name: lairon
description: LAIRON tempers its steel body by drinking highly nutritious mineral springwater until it is bloated. This POKéMON makes its nest close to springs of delicious water.
appearance: Larger, four-legged dark gray iron armor-plated Pokemon with a light gray underbelly, prominent light blue eyes, and two large white conical horns extending from the sides of its head, curved forward

name: aggron
description: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKéMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.
appearance: Massive, bipedal dark gray iron armor-plated tyrannosaur-like Pokemon with a light gray underbelly, bright red eyes, two large white curved horns on its head, and spikes on its shoulders and knees

name: meditite
description: MEDITITE undertakes rigorous mental training deep in the mountains. However, whenever it meditates, this POKéMON always loses its concentration and focus. As a result, its training never ends.
appearance: Small, bipedal blue humanoid-like Pokemon with a white head wrap, a single large pink sphere on its forehead, and a similar pink sphere on each knee

name: medicham
description: It is said that through meditation, MEDICHAM heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This POKéMON hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains.
appearance: Bipedal humanoid-like Pokemon with a white body, red flared pants, red markings on its chest and arms, a red head-dress, and two large pink spheres on its head, with smaller ones on its chest and elbows

name: electrike
description: ELECTRIKE stores electricity in its long body hair. This POKéMON stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal green canine-like Pokemon with black zig-zag markings on its back, a spiky crest of yellow fur on its head, and yellow fur around its neck

name: manectric
description: MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKéMON creates thunderclouds.
appearance: Sleek, quadrupedal blue canine-like Pokemon with a large, spiky yellow mane that forms a lightning bolt shape on its head and back, and yellow fur on its lower legs

name: plusle
description: PLUSLE always acts as a cheerleader for its partners. Whenever a teammate puts out a good effort in battle, this POKéMON shorts out its body to create the crackling noises of sparks to show its joy.
appearance: Small, cream-colored bipedal mouse-like Pokemon with red ears, red cheek circles, a red plus sign on its tail, and red markings on its chest and paws

name: minun
description: MINUN is more concerned about cheering on its partners than its own safety. It shorts out the electricity in its body to create brilliant showers of sparks to cheer on its teammates.
appearance: Small, cream-colored bipedal mouse-like Pokemon with blue ears, blue cheek circles, a blue minus sign on its tail, and blue markings on its chest and paws

name: volbeat
description: With the arrival of night, VOLBEAT emits light from its tail. It communicates with others by adjusting the intensity and flashing of its light. This POKéMON is attracted by the sweet aroma of ILLUMISE.
appearance: Bipedal dark blue insect-like Pokemon with yellow stripes on its abdomen, a red face, two yellow antennae with black tips, and a glowing yellow tail

name: illumise
description: With its sweet aroma, it guides Volbeat to draw signs with light in the night sky.
appearance: Bipedal purple insect-like Pokemon with two yellow antennae that curl at the tips, a curved yellow marking on its forehead, and a glowing yellow tail

name: roselia
description: ROSELIA shoots sharp thorns as projectiles at any opponent that tries to steal the flowers on its arms. The aroma of this POKéMON brings serenity to living things.
appearance: Small, bipedal green rose-like Pokemon with a thorny green stem for a body, two dark green leaf-like legs, and two flower bouquets (one red, one blue) as hands

name: gulpin
description: Virtually all of GULPIN’s body is its stomach. As a result, it can swallow something its own size. This POKéMON’s stomach contains a special fluid that digests anything.
appearance: Green, amorphous blob-like Pokemon with large blue lips, a yellow diamond marking on its head, and a single black hair-like strand on top

name: swalot
description: When SWALOT spots prey, it spurts out a hideously toxic fluid from its pores and sprays the target. Once the prey has weakened, this POKéMON gulps it down whole with its cavernous mouth.
appearance: Large, purple, amorphous blob-like Pokemon with a large yellow diamond marking on its head, a mustache-like yellow marking below its mouth, and two long yellow 'whiskers' extending from its head

name: carvanha
description: CARVANHA’s strongly developed jaws and its sharply pointed fangs pack the destructive power to rip out boat hulls. Many boats have been attacked and sunk by this POKéMON.
appearance: Small, blue fish-like Pokemon with a red underbelly, a red fin on its back, and jagged teeth protruding from its mouth

name: sharpedo
description: Nicknamed “the bully of the sea,” SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKéMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.
appearance: Torpedo-shaped blue shark-like Pokemon with a red star marking on its head, a red underbelly, and a large dorsal fin, missing a tail

name: wailmer
description: WAILMER’s nostrils are located above its eyes. This playful POKéMON loves to startle people by forcefully snorting out seawater it stores inside its body out of its nostrils.
appearance: Large, spherical blue whale-like Pokemon with a white underbelly, two small white pectoral fins, and a white ring around its blowhole

name: wailord
description: WAILORD is the largest of all identified POKéMON up to now. This giant POKéMON swims languorously in the vast open sea, eating massive amounts of food at once with its enormous mouth.
appearance: Massive, elongated blue whale-like Pokemon with a white underbelly, two small white pectoral fins, a white ring around its blowhole, and two small white dorsal fins

name: numel
description: NUMEL is extremely dull witted - it doesn’t notice being hit. However, it can’t stand hunger for even a second. This POKéMON’s body is a seething cauldron of boiling magma.
appearance: Quadrupedal orange camel-like Pokemon with a single brown hump on its back, two small black eyes, and a cream-colored belly and muzzle

name: camerupt
description: CAMERUPT has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this POKéMON’s back erupt, spewing the superheated magma.
appearance: Quadrupedal brown camel-like Pokemon with two large red volcanoes on its back, black rings on its legs, and a cream-colored muzzle

name: torkoal
description: You can tell how it’s feeling by the smoke spouting from its shell. Tremendous velocity is a sign of good health.
appearance: Stout, quadrupedal tortoise-like Pokemon with an orange body, a large red brick-patterned shell with black vents, and a dark gray underbelly

name: spoink
description: SPOINK bounces around on its tail. The shock of its bouncing makes its heart pump. As a result, this POKéMON cannot afford to stop bouncing - if it stops, its heart will stop.
appearance: Small, gray pig-like Pokemon with a pink snout, pink eyes, and a large white pearl on its head, constantly bouncing on its spring-like tail

name: grumpig
description: GRUMPIG uses the black pearls on its body to amplify its psychic power waves for gaining total control over its foe. When this POKéMON uses its special power, its snorting breath grows labored.
appearance: Bipedal purple pig-like Pokemon with two large black pearls on its head, a red nose, and a black patterned belly with two more small black pearls

name: spinda
description: No two Spinda have the same pattern of spots. Its tottering step fouls the aim of foes.
appearance: Brown and white panda-like Pokemon with a small tuft of fur on its head, large ears, and unique red spot patterns on its body, particularly around its eyes

name: trapinch
description: TRAPINCH’s nest is a sloped, bowl-like pit dug in sand. This POKéMON patiently waits for prey to tumble down the pit. Its giant jaws have enough strength to crush even boulders.
appearance: Small, orange insect-like Pokemon with a large, disproportionately wide head, dark blue eyes, and powerful, multi-segmented jaws

name: vibrava
description: To make prey faint, VIBRAVA generates ultrasonic waves by vigorously making its two wings vibrate. This POKéMON’s ultrasonic waves are so powerful, they can bring on headaches in people.
appearance: Green dragonfly-like Pokemon with a segmented body, four translucent green wings, two yellow antennae with black tips, and large compound eyes

name: flygon
description: FLYGON is nicknamed “the elemental  spirit of the desert.” Because its flapping wings whip up a cloud of sand, this POKéMON is always enveloped in a sandstorm while flying.
appearance: Bipedal green insect-like dragon-like Pokemon with four large, translucent red diamond-patterned wings, two green antennae, and red goggles-like covers over its eyes

name: cacnea
description: CACNEA lives in arid locations such as deserts. It releases a strong aroma from its flower to attract prey. When prey comes near, this POKéMON shoots sharp thorns from its body to bring the victim down.
appearance: A green, spiky cactus-like body with dark green diamond patterns, a yellow flower on its head, and two dark green arm-like protrusions.

name: cacturne
description: During the daytime, CACTURNE remains unmoving so that it does not lose any moisture to the harsh desert sun. This POKéMON becomes active at night when the temperature drops.
appearance: A tall, dark green bipedal cactus resembling a scarecrow, with a sharp, pointed hat-like head, two yellow diamond eyes, and two prominent, sharp yellow spikes on its chest.

name: swablu
description: SWABLU has light and fluffy wings that are like cottony clouds. This POKéMON is not frightened of people. It lands on the heads of people and sits there like a cotton-fluff hat.
appearance: A small, light blue bird-like Pokémon with fluffy white cloud-like wings, a small yellow beak, and two small black eyes.

name: altaria
description: ALTARIA dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this POKéMON makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.
appearance: A large, elegant white dragon-like Pokémon with large, fluffy white cloud-like wings, a long, slender blue neck, and two white feathered plumes on its head.

name: zangoose
description: Memories of battling its arch-rival SEVIPER are etched into every cell of ZANGOOSE’s body. This POKéMON adroitly dodges attacks with incredible agility.
appearance: A bipedal, white mammal-like Pokémon with long, sharp claws, a red zigzag scar-like pattern across its chest and left eye, and two prominent red claws on each forearm.

name: seviper
description: SEVIPER shares a generations-long feud with ZANGOOSE. The scars on its body are evidence of vicious battles. This POKéMON attacks using its sword- edged tail.
appearance: A long, purple snake-like Pokémon with sharp, dark purple blade-like tail, jagged yellow markings resembling scars on its body, and a prominent red fang protruding from its upper jaw.

name: lunatone
description: LUNATONE was discovered at a location where a meteorite fell. As a result, some people theorize that this POKéMON came from space. However, no one has been able to prove this theory so far.
appearance: A crescent moon-shaped rock Pokémon primarily gray, with red eyes and crater-like markings on its surface.

name: solrock
description: Solar energy is the source of its power, so it is strong during the daytime. When it spins, its body shines.
appearance: A disc-shaped rock Pokémon resembling the sun, primarily orange with yellow spike-like protrusions around its perimeter and red eyes on its face.

name: barboach
description: BARBOACH’s sensitive whiskers serve as a superb radar system. This POKéMON hides in mud, leaving only its two whiskers exposed while it waits for prey to come along.
appearance: A small, blue, eel-like fish with a yellow belly, two black eyes, and four long, yellow barbels extending from its mouth.

name: whiscash
description: WHISCASH is extremely territorial. Just one of these POKéMON will claim a large pond as its exclusive territory. If a foe approaches it, it thrashes about and triggers a massive earthquake.
appearance: A large, blue catfish with a yellow belly, prominent blue mustache-like barbels, a large red mouth, and a distinct "W" shaped marking on its forehead.

name: corphish
description: Its hardy vitality enables it to adapt to any environment. Its pincers will never release prey.
appearance: A small, red, freshwater crayfish-like Pokémon with large pincer claws, a blue star-shaped marking on its head, and two small yellow antennae.

name: crawdaunt
description: CRAWDAUNT has an extremely violent nature that compels it to challenge other living things to battle. Other life-forms refuse to live in ponds inhabited by this POKéMON, making them desolate places.
appearance: A larger, darker red and blue crayfish-like Pokémon with powerful, red-tipped pincers, a blue star-shaped marking on its head, and a prominent blue horn on its forehead.

name: baltoy
description: BALTOY moves while spinning around on its one foot. Primitive wall paintings depicting this POKéMON living among people were discovered in some ancient ruins.
appearance: A small, terracotta-colored, spinning top-like Pokémon with a single large red eye and two small, stubby arms, covered in white tribal-like markings.

name: claydol
description: CLAYDOL are said to be dolls of mud made by primitive humans and brought to life by exposure to a mysterious ray. This POKéMON moves about while levitating.
appearance: A large, bipedal, terracotta-colored golem-like Pokémon with multiple red eyes and stubby arms, patterned with white tribal markings, and balancing on a single, broad base.

name: lileep
description: LILEEP became extinct approximately a hundred million years ago. This ancient POKéMON attaches itself to a rock on the seafloor and catches approaching prey using tentacles  shaped like flower petals.
appearance: A purple, plant-like Pokémon resembling an anemone, with a round base, a prominent yellow eye, and eight pink tentacle-like petals on its head.

name: cradily
description: CRADILY roams around the ocean floor in search of food. This POKéMON freely extends its tree trunk-like neck and captures unwary prey using its eight tentacles.
appearance: A large, green and purple plant-like Pokémon with a long, segmented neck, a prominent yellow eye, and eight pink tentacle-like petals forming a crown around its head.

name: anorith
description: ANORITH was regenerated from a prehistoric fossil. This primitive POKéMON once lived in warm seas. It grips its prey firmly between its two large claws.
appearance: A small, gray, arthropod-like Pokémon with a flat, shovel-shaped head, two prominent red eyes, and two fan-like fins on its back.

name: armaldo
description: ARMALDO’s tough armor makes all attacks bounce off. This POKéMON’s two enormous claws can be freely extended or contracted. They have the power to punch right through a steel slab.
appearance: A large, bipedal, gray dinosaur-like Pokémon with prominent red scythe-like claws, two yellow striped crests on its head, and a segmented shell on its back.

name: feebas
description: FEEBAS’s fins are ragged and tattered from the start of its life. Because of its shoddy appearance, this POKéMON is largely ignored. It is capable of living in both the sea and in rivers.
appearance: A small, brown, scaly fish with large, vacant eyes, tattered fins, and a distinctly plain, unappealing appearance.

name: milotic
description: Its lovely scales are described as rainbow colored. They change color depending on the viewing angle.
appearance: A long, serpentine, elegant aquatic Pokémon with a cream-colored body, red crests above its eyes, and a large, flowing, fan-like tail with blue and pink patterns.

name: castform
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A small, white, cloud-like Pokémon with a round head and body, two blue eyes, and a single grey orb on its head.

name: kecleon
description: It changes body color to blend in with its surroundings. It also changes color if it is happy or sad.
appearance: A green chameleon-like Pokémon with a long, prehensile red tongue, a prominent yellow zigzag stripe on its belly, and a red horn on its head.

name: shuppet
description: SHUPPET is attracted by feelings of jealousy and vindictiveness. If someone develops strong feelings of vengeance, this POKéMON will appear in a swarm and line up beneath the eaves of that person’s home.
appearance: A small, gray, puppet-like ghost Pokémon with a pointy head, large yellow eyes, and a purple zigzag mouth-like marking.

name: banette
description: BANETTE generates energy for laying strong curses by sticking pins into its own body. This POKéMON was originally a pitiful plush doll that was thrown away.
appearance: A large, gray, bipedal puppet-like ghost Pokémon with large pink eyes, a prominent pink zipper-like mouth, and a single zipper-like marking on its chest.

name: duskull
description: DUSKULL can pass through any wall no matter how thick it may be. Once this POKéMON chooses a target, it will doggedly pursue the intended victim until the break of dawn.
appearance: A small, black, floating ghost-like Pokémon with a single large, red eye set in a skull-like face.

name: dusclops
description: DUSCLOPS’s body is completely hollow - there is nothing at all inside. It is said that its body is like a black hole. This POKéMON will absorb anything into its body, but nothing will ever come back out.
appearance: A large, gray, mummy-like ghost Pokémon with a single large red eye, prominent dark grey hands, and a segmented body that resembles wrapped cloth.

name: tropius
description: The bunches of fruit around TROPIUS’s neck are very popular with children. This POKéMON loves fruit, and eats it continuously. Apparently, its love for fruit resulted in its own outgrowth of fruit.
appearance: A large, green, sauropod-like Pokémon with broad, green leaf-like wings on its back, a collar of yellow banana-like fruits around its neck, and a sturdy body.

name: chimecho
description: CHIMECHO makes its cries echo inside its hollow body. When this POKéMON becomes enraged, its cries result in ultrasonic waves that have the power to knock foes flying.
appearance: A white, bell-shaped Pokémon with a red and blue zigzag pattern near its base, a prominent yellow ball at the tip of its head, and two small circular eyes.

name: absol
description: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKéMON.
appearance: A quadrupedal, white, feline-like Pokémon with a dark blue or black scythe-like horn on the side of its head, a matching dark blue or black tail, and fur resembling a mane around its neck.

name: wynaut
description: WYNAUT can always be seen with a big, happy smile on its face. Look at its tail to determine if it is angry. When angered, this POKéMON will be slapping the ground with its tail.
appearance: Small, round, blue Pokemon with a short, stubby tail featuring a black, wavy mark, large dark eyes, and a single spiky, ear-like protrusion on top of its head.

name: snorunt
description: SNORUNT live in regions with heavy snowfall. In seasons without snow, such as spring and summer, this POKéMON steals away to live quietly among stalactites and stalagmites deep in caverns.
appearance: Small, white, triangular-bodied bipedal Pokemon with a large, pointed, dark blue hood covering its head and two small, black eyes peering out.

name: glalie
description: GLALIE has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This POKéMON has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires.
appearance: Spherical, black-bodied Pokemon with two short, stubby white arms, two long, white, horn-like protrusions on its head, and a gaping mouth with two large, flat white teeth.

name: spheal
description: SPHEAL is much faster rolling than  walking to get around. When groups of this POKéMON eat, they all clap at once to show their pleasure. Because of this, their mealtimes are noisy.
appearance: Round, blue, seal-like Pokemon with small white flippers, a light blue belly spot, two small white tusks, and large, dark eyes.

name: sealeo
description: SEALEO has the habit of always juggling on the tip of its nose anything it sees for the first time. This POKéMON occasionally entertains itself by balancing and rolling a SPHEAL on its nose.
appearance: Larger, rotund blue seal-like Pokemon with a light blue belly, a tan muzzle, two small white tusks, and a bouncy ball-like nose.

name: walrein
description: It swims through icy seas while shattering ice floes with its large tusks. It is protected by its thick blubber.
appearance: Massive, dark blue, walrus-like Pokemon with a light blue belly, long, sharp white tusks, a tan muzzle with long white whiskers, and a thick, ridged neck.

name: clamperl
description: CLAMPERL’s sturdy shell is not only good for protection - it is also used for clamping and catching prey. A fully grown CLAMPERL’s shell will be scored with nicks and scratches all over.
appearance: Bivalve mollusk Pokemon with a purple, pearlescent shell that has a small opening revealing a light blue, pearl-like body and two small eyes.

name: huntail
description: HUNTAIL’s presence went unnoticed by people for a long time because it lives at extreme depths in the sea. This POKéMON’s eyes can see clearly even in the murky dark depths of the ocean.
appearance: Long, serpentine, orange fish Pokemon with dark blue fins and stripes, a large, toothed mouth, and a tail shaped like a fish lure.

name: gorebyss
description: GOREBYSS lives in the southern seas at extreme depths. Its body is built to withstand the enormous pressure of water at incredible depths. Because of this, this POKéMON’s body is unharmed by ordinary attacks.
appearance: Elegant, pink, eel-like Pokemon with a long, slender body, a small mouth, a pointed head with a yellow fin, and two purple seashell-like pectoral fins.

name: relicanth
description: RELICANTH is a POKéMON species that existed for a hundred million years without ever changing its form. This ancient POKéMON feeds on microscopic organisms with its toothless mouth.
appearance: Ancient-looking, mottled brown and grey coelacanth-like fish Pokemon with large, blue fins, a rounded snout, and small yellow eyes.

name: luvdisc
description: LUVDISC live in shallow seas in the tropics. This heart-shaped POKéMON earned its name by swimming after loving couples it spotted in the ocean’s waves.
appearance: Flat, pink, heart-shaped fish Pokemon with a dark pink fin on its back and a small, pointed tail, featuring two large, circular eyes.

name: bagon
description: Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.
appearance: Small, bipedal, blue-bodied reptilian Pokemon with a large, grey, skull-like helmet covering its head and a stubby tail.

name: shelgon
description: Inside SHELGON’s armor-like shell, cells are in the midst of transformation to create an entirely new body. This POKéMON’s shell is extremely heavy, making its movements sluggish.
appearance: Robust, white, bipedal reptilian Pokemon completely encased in a hard, bone-like shell, with only its dark grey underside and two red eyes visible.

name: salamence
description: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this POKéMON’s cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal, blue dragon Pokemon with powerful red-orange wings, a long neck, and two short horns on its head.

name: beldum
description: Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic force courses throughout BELDUM’s body. This POKéMON communicates with others by sending controlled pulses of magnetism.
appearance: Metallic, blue-grey, spherical Pokemon with a single large red eye on its front, and two short, flat, magnetic limbs protruding from its body.

name: metang
description: When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG is formed. The brains of the BELDUM are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this POKéMON generates strong psychokinetic power.
appearance: Larger, metallic blue-grey Pokemon formed by two Beldum, with four magnetic limbs, a prominent X-shape on its front, and two red eyes.

name: metagross
description: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.
appearance: Massive, metallic blue-grey, quad-legged Pokemon formed by two Metang, with four powerful, spiky legs, a large X-shape on its face, and a single red eye at the center.

name: regirock
description: Its entire body is made of rock. If any part chips off in battle, it attaches rocks to repair itself.
appearance: Large, bipedal golem-like Pokemon constructed entirely of tan and brown rocks, with a pattern of seven orange dots on its face.

name: regice
description: REGICE’s body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body can’t be melted, even by fire. This POKéMON controls frigid air of minus 328 degrees F.
appearance: Large, bipedal golem-like Pokemon constructed entirely of light blue ice, with a pattern of seven orange dots on its face.

name: registeel
description: REGISTEEL has a body that is harder than any kind of metal. Its body is apparently hollow. No one has any idea what this POKéMON eats.
appearance: Large, bipedal golem-like Pokemon constructed entirely of metallic grey, durable material, with a pattern of seven red dots on its face.

name: latias
description: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this POKéMON ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe.
appearance: Sleek, red, dragon-like Pokemon with white wing-like arms, a short tail, and a distinctive white triangular mark on its chest.

name: latios
description: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKéMON is intelligent and understands human speech.
appearance: Sleek, blue, dragon-like Pokemon with white wing-like arms, a short tail, and a distinctive white triangular mark on its chest.

name: kyogre
description: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKéMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.
appearance: Massive, whale-like Pokemon with a dark blue body, red stripes along its sides, and large pectoral fins with white tips.

name: groudon
description: GROUDON has long been described in  mythology as the POKéMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKéMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.
appearance: Enormous, red, bipedal, dinosaur-like Pokemon with black markings, grey underside, and lava-like yellow stripes glowing on its body.

name: rayquaza
description: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth’s ozone layer,  never descending to the ground. This POKéMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.
appearance: Extremely long, serpentine, green dragon Pokemon with yellow ring-like markings and red-tipped fins along its body, culminating in a distinctive head with yellow-rimmed eyes.

name: jirachi
description: A legend states that JIRACHI will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this POKéMON senses danger, it will fight without awakening.
appearance: Small, white, humanoid-like Pokemon with three blue tags on its head, large dark eyes, and a single golden horn-like protrusion on its forehead.

name: deoxys-normal
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: Tall, slender, red and blue alien-like Pokemon with long, whip-like arms, an exposed brain-like organ, and glowing blue eyes.

name: turtwig
description: Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal, light green turtle-like Pokemon with a brown shell on its back, a small green sapling growing from its head, and a yellow lower jaw.

name: grotle
description: It knows where pure water wells up. It carries fellow Pokémon there on its back.
appearance: Larger, quadrupedal, light green turtle-like Pokemon with a brown, rougher shell resembling a small patch of land, and two small tree-like growths on its back.

name: torterra
description: Small Pokémon occasionally gather on its unmoving back to begin building their nests.
appearance: Massive, quadrupedal, dark green turtle-like Pokemon with an entire continent-like brown shell on its back, complete with a large tree and four mountain-like protrusions.

name: chimchar
description: It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps.
appearance: Small, orange, monkey-like Pokemon with a creamy belly, a red circular marking on its rear, and a flame flickering at the tip of its tail.

name: monferno
description: To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger.
appearance: Monferno is a bipedal orange monkey with a cream-colored muzzle and chest, red markings around its eyes and on its upper arms and thighs, a golden-yellow tuft of fur on its head, and a long tail tipped with a small red flame.

name: infernape
description: It uses a special kind of martial arts involving all its limbs. Its fire never goes out.
appearance: Infernape is a bipedal ape-like Pokémon with a white face and chest, red fur covering most of its body, golden-yellow armor-like markings on its shoulders and knees, blue flames flaring from its head like a crown, and red flames emanating from its wrists.

name: piplup
description: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.
appearance: Piplup is a small, round, dark blue penguin with a white belly and face, a light blue crown-like marking over its eyes, and a small yellow beak and feet.

name: prinplup
description: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.
appearance: Prinplup is a bipedal, dark blue penguin with a white belly and face, a light blue mask-like marking around its eyes, two golden-yellow button-like markings on its chest, and a golden three-pronged crest on its head.

name: empoleon
description: The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns.
appearance: Empoleon is a large, majestic, dark blue bipedal penguin with a white belly and chin, a yellow beak, a prominent golden trident-shaped crest on its head, and sharp golden fin-like extensions on its wings.

name: starly
description: They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power.
appearance: Starly is a small, stout bird with a predominantly dark gray body, a black head, a white belly with a single white spot on its chest, and yellow beak and feet.

name: staravia
description: It flies around forests and fields in search of bug Pokémon. It stays within a huge flock.
appearance: Staravia is a medium-sized bird with a gray body, white undersides, a black head featuring a prominent white streak extending from its forehead to the back, and red tips on its primary wing and tail feathers.

name: staraptor
description: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.
appearance: Staraptor is a large, powerful bird with a brown body, white undersides, a black head, and a distinctive long, red crest that extends backwards, along with a circular white pattern on its lower face and upper neck.

name: bidoof
description: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.
appearance: Bidoof is a small, rotund rodent with brown fur on its back and head, a cream-colored belly and muzzle, and large, prominent yellowish-brown front teeth.

name: bibarel
description: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.
appearance: Bibarel is a bipedal, dark brown beaver-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly and muzzle, dark brown hands and feet, and a broad, wavy tail.

name: kricketot
description: It shakes its head back to front, causing its antennae to hit each other and sound like a xylophone.
appearance: Kricketot is a small, round bug with a red body, a large black head shaped like a musical note, a yellow collar-like marking around its neck, and two yellow dots on its back.

name: kricketune
description: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.
appearance: Kricketune is a bipedal, red cricket-like Pokémon with a dark brown abdomen, yellow markings across its chest and head, and two prominent black, musical note-shaped antennae extending from its head that serve as arms.

name: shinx
description: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.
appearance: Shinx is a small, blue feline resembling a lion cub, featuring a black mane around its neck, yellow rings on its front legs, and a black tail tipped with a yellow star-like shape.

name: luxio
description: Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups.
appearance: Luxio is a blue feline with a black mane extending from its head down its back, yellow rings on its front legs, transparent blue ear tips, and a black tail tipped with a yellow star-like shape.

name: luxray
description: It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects.
appearance: Luxray is a large, muscular blue lion-like feline covered in a massive black mane, featuring golden rings on its legs, transparent blue ear tips, and a black tail that ends in a prominent gold star.

name: budew
description: Over the winter, it closes its bud and endures the cold. In spring, the bud opens and releases pollen.
appearance: Budew is a small, spherical green plant bud with two large red eyes, a yellow collar resembling a partially unfurled leaf, and two small green vines extending from its sides.

name: roserade
description: It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms.
appearance: Roserade is an elegant bipedal plant-like Pokémon with a green body, a black mask-like marking around its red eyes, a white collar, and two thorny vine-like arms, each tipped with a red rose on the right and a blue rose on the left.

name: cranidos
description: It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron.
appearance: Cranidos is a small, stocky dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body, a gray belly and feet, and a prominent, smooth, dark red dome-shaped head.

name: rampardos
description: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.
appearance: Rampardos is a large, bipedal dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body, a gray belly and tail, and a massive, spiky, dark red dome-shaped head marked with black stripes.

name: shieldon
description: A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.
appearance: Shieldon is a small, quadrupedal dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body, a black back and legs, and a large, metallic, yellow and gray shield covering its face, featuring four prominent yellow dots on its black back.

name: bastiodon
description: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.
appearance: Bastiodon is a large, quadrupedal dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body and black back, featuring a massive, fortress-like, yellow, gray, and black shield covering its entire face, topped with two prominent yellow horns.

name: burmy
description: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.
appearance: Burmy is a small, worm-like Pokémon largely concealed within a cloak made of various materials, appearing with either a green leafy cloak, a tan sandy cloak, or a gray trashy cloak, with only its black eyes visible.

name: wormadam-plant
description: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
appearance: Wormadam (Plant Cloak) is a bipedal, moth-like Pokémon entirely covered in a green cloak resembling gathered leaves, with visible pink eyes and pink accents on its inner body and small leaf-like antennae.

name: mothim
description: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by COMBEE.
appearance: Mothim is a brown moth-like Pokémon with a segmented body, large wings patterned with yellow and orange stripes, and red eyes.

name: combee
description: A Pokémon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to VESPIQUEN.
appearance: Combee is a small, flat Pokémon composed of three hexagonal yellow segments, each with a black dot and a red eye, and two pairs of translucent wings.

name: vespiquen
description: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by COMBEE.
appearance: Vespiquen is a large, regal queen bee-like Pokémon with a yellow head, red eyes, and a prominent black and yellow striped thorax resembling a dress, ending in a segmented orange abdomen at its base, supported by two large translucent wings.

name: pachirisu
description: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.
appearance: Pachirisu is a small, fluffy white squirrel with two light blue stripes on its back, pink circular cheek pouches, and a large, bushy white tail with a light blue stripe running down its center.

name: buizel
description: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.
appearance: Buizel is a sleek, orange otter-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, an inflatable cream flotation sac around its neck, two cream spots on its back, blue fin-like appendages on its forearms, and a split blue tail.

name: floatzel
description: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.
appearance: Floatzel is a larger, sleek orange otter-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, a large, cream-colored inflatable flotation sac around its neck, prominent blue fins on its forearms, and a cream-colored tail with a blue propeller-like marking at its tip.

name: cherubi
description: The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty.
appearance: Cherubi is a small, spherical Pokémon resembling a cherry, with a red main body, a short green stem and two green leaves on top, and a smaller, pale red sphere attached to its side by a tiny stem.

name: cherrim
description: It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.
appearance: Cherrim (Sunshine Form) is a small, pink, five-petaled flower-like Pokémon with a yellow center displaying a white face, two small green leaves emerging from its back, and a short green stem.

name: shellos
description: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.
appearance: Shellos (West Sea form) is a small pink slug-like Pokémon with a white underside, a rounded white head frill, two small yellow horns, and a wavy yellow frill running down its back.

name: gastrodon
description: It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back.
appearance: Gastrodon (West Sea form) is a large pink slug-like Pokémon with a brown underside, a flat brown head featuring two dark brown eyes, and a wavy brown mantle that extends down its back.

name: ambipom
description: To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now.
appearance: Ambipom is a purple primate-like Pokémon with a cream-colored face and belly, large pointed ears, and two long, prehensile tails, each tipped with a three-fingered hand.

name: drifloon
description: A Pokémon formed by the spirits of people and Pokémon. It loves damp, humid seasons.
appearance: Drifloon is a small, round, purple balloon-like Pokémon with two yellow heart-shaped hands, white wispy clouds at its base, and a white, band-aid shaped marking on its face with two small red eyes.

name: drifblim
description: At dusk, swarms of them are carried aloft on winds. When noticed, they suddenly vanish.
appearance: Drifblim is a large, ovoid, purple balloon-like Pokémon with a dark purple cloud-like fringe around its lower body, four dark purple tentacle-like appendages hanging from its underside, and a white star-shaped marking on its face with two small red eyes.

name: buneary
description: It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain.
appearance: Buneary is a small, brown rabbit-like Pokémon with a cream-colored muzzle, ear interiors, belly, and feet, featuring very long brown ears that are typically rolled up into spirals.

name: lopunny
description: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.
appearance: Lopunny is a tall, slender, light brown bipedal rabbit-like Pokémon with long, droopy ears tipped with cream-colored fur, fluffy cream-colored fur around its neck, chest, and thighs, and cream-colored paw-like feet.

name: mismagius
description: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.
appearance: Mismagius is a ghostly purple Pokémon with a bell-shaped body that trails off into a tattered skirt-like bottom, a pointed, witch-hat-like head with two ear-like protrusions, and three red gem-like spheres forming a necklace around its neck.

name: honchkrow
description: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous MURKROW in tow.
appearance: Honchkrow is a large, dark blue, crow-like Pokémon with a white crescent-shaped chest marking, a red feather crest on its head resembling a fedora, and white wingtips that extend like hands.

name: glameow
description: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.
appearance: Glameow is a slender, light gray cat-like Pokémon with a distinct curled, spring-shaped tail, a white muzzle, light gray ear insides, and large yellow eyes.

name: purugly
description: It is a brazen brute that barges its way into another Pokémon’s nest and claims it as its own.
appearance: Purugly is a large, stout, gray cat-like Pokémon with a large white muzzle, prominent white fur tufts on its cheeks and chest, and a thick, striped tail that is typically wrapped tightly around its midsection.

name: chingling
description: It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops.
appearance: Chingling is a small, round, yellow bell-like Pokémon with a white oval face, a red clapper-like protrusion extending from its mouth, and a single small yellow sphere on its head.

name: stunky
description: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.
appearance: Stunky is a small, purple skunk-like Pokémon with a white stripe running from its head down its back, a white tuft of fur on its forehead, and a large, flat purple and pink-ringed tail.

name: skuntank
description: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.
appearance: Skuntank is a long, purple skunk-like Pokémon with a broad white facial marking, two small red eyes, and a large, flat tail that is predominantly purple with a pink stripe, forming a significant portion of its elongated body.

name: bronzor
description: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.
appearance: Bronzor is a flat, bronze-colored disc-shaped Pokémon with two blue eyes and an embossed pattern of concentric green and yellow rings on its front surface.

name: bronzong
description: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.
appearance: Bronzong is a large, bronze-colored bell-shaped Pokémon with a broad, flat base, two red eyes, and an embossed pattern of concentric green and yellow rings on its front surface.

name: bonsly
description: It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its body’s fluid levels by eliminating excess.
appearance: Bonsly is a small, brown, rock-like Pokémon with a green, rounded head resembling a leaf cluster, three dark brown prong-like branches extending from its head, and a cream-colored belly with three small circular holes.

name: mime-jr
description: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.
appearance: Mime Jr. is a small, bipedal Pokémon with a pink spherical head, a white face with two small blue eyes and pink cheeks, a white frill around its neck, and a red dot on its white belly.

name: happiny
description: It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of CHANSEY.
appearance: Happiny is a small, pink, egg-shaped Pokémon with a large, curly light pink tuft of hair on its head, a white lower body, and a red egg-shaped stone carried in a pouch on its white belly.

name: chatot
description: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.
appearance: Chatot is a colorful parrot-like Pokémon with a black, note-shaped head, a blue body, green wings, a red tail feather, and a white collar-like marking around its neck.

name: spiritomb
description: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.
appearance: Spiritomb is a ghostly purple orb with two glowing yellow eyes and a fanged mouth, enveloped by a swirling mass of green mist-like tendrils that connect it to a jagged gray rock.

name: gible
description: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.
appearance: Gible is a small, blue, bipedal shark-like Pokémon with a broad, flat head resembling an airplane wing, a red belly, and a single blue dorsal fin.

name: gabite
description: There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses.
appearance: Gabite is a larger, blue, bipedal shark-like Pokémon with a ridged head, a red belly, two small white claws on each hand and foot, and a single blue dorsal fin.

name: garchomp
description: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.
appearance: Garchomp is a large, sleek, blue, bipedal dragon-shark-like Pokémon with a red underbelly, prominent scythe-like claws on its forearms, and two large, flat fins on its head that resemble jet engines.

name: munchlax
description: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.
appearance: Munchlax is a stout, blue, bear-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, two small fangs protruding from its upper jaw, and short, round ears.

name: riolu
description: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.
appearance: Riolu is a small, bipedal, blue canine-like Pokémon with a black muzzle, black markings resembling a mask around its red eyes, a black collar-like marking on its chest, and two black ear-like appendages on its head.

name: lucario
description: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.
appearance: Lucario is a sleek, bipedal, blue and black canine-like Pokémon with red eyes, a pointed muzzle, four black spikes on its chest and wrists, and two long black ear-like appendages.

name: hippopotas
description: It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body.
appearance: Hippopotas is a small, light tan hippopotamus-like Pokémon with irregular dark brown markings covering its body, resembling camouflage.

name: hippowdon
description: It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack.
appearance: Hippowdon is a large, tan hippopotamus-like Pokémon with a broad, gray snout, large black nostrils, and irregular dark brown markings on its back and sides, featuring four cannon-like structures on its back.

name: skorupi
description: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.
appearance: Purple scorpion-like Pokémon with a rounded body, two large pincers, and a segmented tail ending in a stinger, all accented by its yellow eyes.

name: drapion
description: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.
appearance: Large, dark purple scorpion-like Pokémon with an upright posture, four legs, two massive pincers, a segmented tail ending in a sharp stinger, and a black armored chest plate with yellow eyes.

name: croagunk
description: Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers.
appearance: Small blue frog-like Pokémon with a hunched posture, a black mask-like marking around its yellow eyes, a white zigzag pattern on its belly, and two large, fingerless hands with a single black stripe on each.

name: toxicroak
description: Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal.
appearance: Tall, slender blue-black frog-like Pokémon with a long snout, yellow eyes, a prominent red pouch on its throat, and a white zigzag pattern extending from its belly to its chest, with long arms ending in two-fingered hands with black stripes.

name: carnivine
description: It attracts prey with its sweet- smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.
appearance: Green, Venus flytrap-like Pokémon with a large, toothed maw featuring red and yellow stripes inside its mouth, two vine-like arms, and a small, segmented body that ends in a root-like tail.

name: finneon
description: After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives.
appearance: Small, light blue fish-like Pokémon with two large, pink-tipped caudal fins resembling butterfly wings, two smaller pectoral fins, and delicate antennae-like protrusions above its eyes.

name: lumineon
description: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.
appearance: Larger, elegant dark blue fish-like Pokémon with large, bioluminescent yellow and pink fins resembling butterfly wings, two smaller yellow pectoral fins, and delicate yellow antennae above its eyes, featuring a lighter blue underside.

name: mantyke
description: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.
appearance: Small, flat, blue manta ray-like Pokémon with a white underside, two yellow circular spots on its back, and two antenna-like appendages protruding from its head.

name: snover
description: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.
appearance: Small white and brown tree-like Pokémon with a rounded white body, a brown stump-like base, two stubby arms, a pointed white head with a green leaf-like crest, red eyes, and three green leaves on its chest.

name: abomasnow
description: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.
appearance: Large, bipedal yeti-like Pokémon with a shaggy white fur coat, a green tree-like crest on its head, two massive arms with three white claws, green leaf-like markings on its chest and lower back, and red eyes.

name: weavile
description: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt prey with impressive coordination.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal dark purple weasel-like Pokémon with a sharp red crest on its head, a red circular marking on its forehead, two long black 'feathers' protruding from its ears, large white claws, and a white collar-like marking on its neck.

name: magnezone
description: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.
appearance: Large, gray, disc-shaped Pokémon with three individual Magnemite-like heads attached to its central body via black magnetic arms, each head having a single large eye, and its main body featuring a red and blue ring pattern and a tall, antenna-like protrusion.

name: lickilicky
description: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.
appearance: Large, pink, round Pokémon with a very long, prehensile tongue that is often seen extended, a light yellow belly, and white claws on its three-fingered hands and two-toed feet.

name: rhyperior
description: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. GEODUDE are shot at rare times.
appearance: Massive, bipedal gray rock-like Pokémon with orange-red armor plating on its chest, shoulders, and knees, a drill-like horn on its head, and two large, club-like arms with three claws.

name: tangrowth
description: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it.
appearance: Large, blue, spherical Pokémon covered entirely in thick, long blue vines that serve as its limbs, obscuring its body, with two yellow eyes peeking out from among the vines and broad, flat vine-like hands.

name: electivire
description: As its electric charge amplifies, blue sparks begin to crackle between its horns.
appearance: Large, yellow, bipedal ape-like Pokémon with black stripes on its body, two long black tails ending in red electrical plugs, two large black-and-yellow-striped electrical horns on its head, and shoulders adorned with black fur.

name: magmortar
description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.
appearance: Large, orange, bipedal duck-like Pokémon with two arm cannons resembling open muzzles, a flaming head crest, three yellow spots on its belly, and red and yellow flame patterns on its body and hands that look like open flame jets.

name: togekiss
description: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.
appearance: Large, white, bird-like Pokémon with an elegant, streamlined body, two large triangular red and blue markings on its belly, two small wings resembling angel wings, and three short protrusions on its head.

name: yanmega
description: By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.
appearance: Large, green dragonfly-like Pokémon with a long, segmented body, four large translucent wings with red veins, two large red compound eyes, two large pincers at its mouth, and two sharp stinger-like protrusions on its tail.

name: leafeon
description: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.
appearance: Quadrupedal, light brown feline Pokémon with a body primarily covered in green leaf-like fur, particularly on its ears, paws, and tail, which is a large, pointed leaf, and small green leaves growing from its head and legs.

name: glaceon
description: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.
appearance: Quadrupedal, light blue feline Pokémon with a sleek body, diamond-shaped dark blue markings on its back and tail, two dark blue crests on its head, two long, flowing dark blue ribbons extending from its head, and a white diamond pattern on its forehead.

name: gliscor
description: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!
appearance: Purple bat-like scorpion Pokémon with large, red, pointed ears, a long tail ending in a stinger, two large, curved pincers, a black marking on its forehead, and two large, translucent wings.

name: mamoswine
description: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.
appearance: Massive, shaggy brown mammoth-like Pokémon with two large white tusks, two smaller blue tusks, a distinctive blue face mask pattern around its eyes, and a patch of light blue fur on its back.

name: porygon-z
description: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.
appearance: Jagged, pink and blue digital duck-like Pokémon with a head that spins erratically, a blue-and-pink striped body, a dislocated, zigzagging tail, a large yellow eye, and two small, stubby feet.

name: gallade
description: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.
appearance: Tall, white bipedal Pokémon with a sleek body, green blade-like arms extending from its elbows, a red crest on its head, a green chest, and pointed white 'skirt' appendages around its waist.

name: probopass
description: It freely controls three small units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.
appearance: Large, gray, rock-like Pokémon with a prominent red, magnetic nose and three small, gray 'Mini Noses' that float around it, featuring large, bushy white mustaches and blue eyes.

name: dusknoir
description: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.
appearance: Large, gray, bipedal ghost-like Pokémon with a single large red eye, a round, spherical body that opens like a mouth on its belly, two large, floating hands, yellow markings on its chest, and a short, antenna-like protrusion on its head.

name: froslass
description: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
appearance: Elegant, white ghost-like Pokémon with a kimono-like body, two ice crystal-like 'horns' on its head, a red sash-like marking around its waist, a pale blue face, and a body that fades into a translucent, spectral tail.

name: rotom
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: Small, red, electric ghost-like Pokémon composed of a plasma-like body with two blue, electrical wave-like appendages, a single blue eye, and a distinct white lightbulb shape within its core.

name: uxie
description: Known as “The Being of Knowledge.” It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.
appearance: Small, yellow, fairy-like Pokémon with a rounded body, two short legs, two long, pointed tails extending from its head like hair, a large round head with a red jewel on its forehead, and two dark, almond-shaped eyes.

name: mesprit
description: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.
appearance: pink humanoid fairy-like creature with two long, flat, yellow tails, a red gem on its forehead, and white-capped ears

name: azelf
description: Known as “The Being of Willpower.” It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.
appearance: blue humanoid fairy-like creature with two long, flat, red tails, a blue gem on its forehead, and two pointed ears

name: dialga
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.
appearance: large, metallic blue sauropod-like dragon with gray undersides, a diamond-shaped chest plate, and large silver shoulder plates resembling wings, with light blue striped markings on its back

name: palkia
description: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.
appearance: large, purplish-white bipedal dragon with gray undersides, two pearl-like orbs on its shoulders, and wing-like structures extending from its back, marked with dark purple stripes on its chest and arms

name: heatran
description: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.
appearance: large, four-legged lava-dwelling creature with a metallic orange and gray body, red-orange magma bubbles on its back, iron shackles on its legs, and a prominent orange mask-like feature on its face

name: regigigas
description: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.
appearance: massive, white golem-like Pokemon with black stripes on its body, seven colored gems arranged on its chest in a specific pattern, and long, thick arms with large hands, topped by two large, flat projections on its head

name: giratina-altered
description: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.
appearance: large, serpentine dragon with six golden, spiked appendages protruding from its back, a gray body, black stripes, a golden chest plate, and red eyes with a large, toothy mouth

name: cresselia
description: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.
appearance: swan-like bipedal Pokémon with a crescent moon-shaped head crest, a light pink body, yellow ring patterns on its underside, and two large, feathery wings that glow blue, pink, and yellow

name: phione
description: It drifts in warm seas. It always returns to where it was born, no matter how far it may have drifted.
appearance: small, light blue marine creature with a round head, a small blue antenna topped with a red sphere, and a collar-like frill around its neck, possessing two small flippers and a translucent body with an inner blue core

name: manaphy
description: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.
appearance: small, light blue marine creature with a round head, two long blue antennae topped with yellow spheres, and a large collar-like frill around its neck, possessing two small flippers and an inner blue core visible through its translucent body

name: darkrai
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.
appearance: tall, shadowy, ghost-like figure with a small head, a white tuft of smoke-like hair, a tattered, black cape-like body ending in a red pointed structure, and red eyes with a single white claw-like protrusion on its chest

name: shaymin-land
description: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.
appearance: small, white hedgehog-like creature with green grass-like fur on its back, a pink gracidea flower on its head, and two green leaf-like ears

name: arceus
description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.
appearance: large, equine-like creature with a white body, a golden cross-like wheel structure on its torso, a grey underbelly, green eyes, and golden hooves

name: victini
description: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.
appearance: small, white rabbit-like creature with large blue eyes, two large pointed ears resembling the letter 'V', orange-tipped appendages on its head, and small orange wings on its back

name: snivy
description: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.
appearance: small, green bipedal snake-like Pokémon with a large, flat, leaf-shaped tail, a yellow collar-like marking around its neck, and yellow markings around its eyes

name: servine
description: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.
appearance: slender, green bipedal snake-like Pokémon with short arms, two large leaf-like structures on its back, and a large, curled leaf-shaped tail, featuring yellow markings around its eyes and a yellow collar-like band

name: serperior
description: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.
appearance: long, green serpentine Pokémon with two small arms, a large, ornate collar-like structure around its neck, and a very long tail ending in a three-pointed leaf shape, with yellow markings around its eyes and intricate yellow patterns on its back

name: tepig
description: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.
appearance: four-legged piglet-like Pokémon with an orange body, a black snout, black ears, and a red tuft on its tail, featuring yellow markings around its eyes and black hooves

name: pignite
description: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.
appearance: bipedal pig-like Pokémon with an orange and black body, a pointed red snout, a fiery collar of orange and yellow around its neck, and black markings on its limbs

name: emboar
description: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.
appearance: large, bipedal pig-like Pokémon with a fiery beard, a red and black body with golden armor-like markings, and burning flames on its shoulders, possessing large and powerful arms

name: oshawott
description: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.
appearance: small, bipedal otter-like Pokémon with a white body, a dark blue head, a light blue shell on its belly, a small dark blue nose, and two small buck teeth

name: dewott
description: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.
appearance: bipedal otter-like Pokémon with a dark blue and white body, two scalchops (shells) on its thighs, and a distinctive dark blue shell on its chest, with a dark blue head featuring a pointed crest

name: samurott
description: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.
appearance: large, quadrupedal sea lion-like Pokémon with a dark blue body, a large yellow shell on its head forming a horn, and two large, curved scalchops on its front legs, possessing a white underbelly and a dark blue beard-like feature

name: patrat
description: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.
appearance: small, brown chipmunk-like Pokémon with large, round eyes, a bushy tail, and a prominent red and white striped pattern on its face resembling goggles, featuring a large white front tooth

name: watchog
description: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.
appearance: bipedal meerkat-like Pokémon with a light brown body, two large yellow-and-red striped circular markings on its chest, and large black eyes with white pupils, possessing a bushy tail and glowing red-and-yellow striped patterns on its arms and head

name: lillipup
description: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.
appearance: small, brown quadrupedal puppy-like Pokémon with a large white fur collar, a dark brown snout, and floppy brown ears

name: herdier
description: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.
appearance: medium-sized, blue-gray quadrupedal dog-like Pokémon with a long, thick black beard and mustache, dark blue fur on its head, a white fur collar, and lighter blue-gray paws

name: stoutland
description: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.
appearance: large, golden-brown quadrupedal dog-like Pokémon with a very long, thick white mustache that covers its mouth, long brown fur, and light brown paws, featuring a blue snout and blue fur on its head

name: purrloin
