description: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can’t help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.
appearance: small, bipedal cat-like Pokémon with a mostly purple body, cream-colored markings on its face and chest, and dark purple ear tips and tail tip, with its tail curling upwards

name: liepard
description: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.
appearance: sleek, quadrupedal leopard-like Pokémon with a purple body covered in dark purple spots, green eyes, and a cream-colored muzzle and underbelly, possessing a long, elegant tail

name: pansage
description: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.
appearance: Small, bipedal green monkey with a cream-colored face and chest, large red eyes, and a dark green, broccoli-like leaf tuft on top of its head and at the end of its tail.

name: simisage
description: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.
appearance: Tall, bipedal green monkey with a large, spiky dark green leaf crest forming a 'hairdo' on its head, a cream-colored face and torso, large red eyes, and a long tail ending in a large, flat green leaf.

name: pansear
description: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.
appearance: Small, bipedal red monkey with a cream-colored face and chest, large black eyes, and a bright red, flame-like tuft of fur on top of its head and a smaller one on its tail.

name: simisear
description: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.
appearance: Tall, bipedal red monkey with a large, spiky yellow and red flame-like crest forming a 'hairdo' on its head, a cream-colored face and torso, large black eyes, and a long tail ending in a large, flame-shaped tuft.

name: panpour
description: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.
appearance: Small, bipedal blue monkey with a cream-colored face and chest, large black eyes, and a light blue, water droplet-shaped tuft of fur on top of its head and a smaller one on its tail.

name: simipour
description: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.
appearance: Tall, bipedal blue monkey with a large, light blue, wave-like crest forming a 'hairdo' on its head, a cream-colored face and torso, large black eyes, and a long tail ending in a large, fan-like blue fin.

name: munna
description: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.
appearance: Small, plump, light pink, tapir-like Pokemon with dark purple floral patterns adorning its body, four short legs, a small snout, and large, drooping ears.

name: musharna
description: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.
appearance: Larger, plump, light pink, tapir-like Pokemon with dark purple floral patterns adorning its body, a large, stylized dark pink 'M' marking on its forehead, and often depicted with pink mist emanating from a hole on its head.

name: pidove
description: Each follows its Trainer’s orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.
appearance: Small, plump, gray bird with a lighter gray underside, two small black eyes with a white ring, and a distinctive heart-shaped marking on its chest.

name: tranquill
description: It can return to its Trainer’s location regardless of the distance separating them.
appearance: Medium-sized, blue-gray bird with a cream-colored chest and belly, a dark blue feathered crest on its head, two small black eyes with a white ring, and two long black tail feathers with white tips.

name: unfezant
description: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.
appearance: Large, slender bird with a predominantly dark green and gray body, a white underside, long tail feathers, and notably, males have an elaborate dark green fan-like crest on their head and a distinct pink mask pattern around their eyes.

name: blitzle
description: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.
appearance: Small, black and white striped zebra foal with spiky white fur forming a mane and tail tuft, a lightning bolt-shaped white marking on its forehead, and large dark eyes.

name: zebstrika
description: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.
appearance: Large, black and white striped zebra with a spiky, lightning bolt-shaped white mane running down its neck, black and white striped legs, and a distinctive white lightning bolt pattern on its forehead.

name: roggenrola
description: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.
appearance: Small, round, dark gray rock-like Pokemon with a single orange, hexagonal crystal eye set into its body, and several hexagonal indentations across its surface.

name: boldore
description: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.
appearance: Medium-sized, dark gray rock-like Pokemon with a large, bright orange crystal protruding from its top, smaller blue crystals forming legs, and a single blue hexagonal eye.

name: gigalith
description: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal dark gray rock-like Pokemon with numerous prominent red crystals protruding from its body, forming spike-like structures on its back, head, and legs, and featuring two glowing red eyes.

name: woobat
description: Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.
appearance: Small, round, blue bat with large, pointed ears, two small fangs protruding from its mouth, and a distinctive pink heart-shaped nose.

name: swoobat
description: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.
appearance: Larger, furry blue bat with large, pointed ears, a white fluffy ruff around its neck, a long, thin tail ending in a swirled tuft, and a prominent pink swirl-shaped nose.

name: drilbur
description: It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race.
appearance: Small, light brown mole-like Pokemon with large, gray, shovel-like claws on its forepaws, a prominent red nose, and a large gray drill-shaped crest on its head.

name: excadrill
description: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.
appearance: Large, bipedal mole-like Pokemon with a predominantly dark gray and red body, featuring large, gray, sharp drills on its head, forepaws, and back, and a broad, yellow-striped chest.

name: audino
description: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.
appearance: Medium-sized, predominantly white, bipedal rabbit-like Pokemon with pink accents, two long, floppy pink and white ears ending in a curly tuft, a small pink tuft of fur on its chest, and small dark eyes.

name: timburr
description: It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.
appearance: Small, gray, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with pink balloon-like veins on its head and limbs, a light gray nose, and constantly carries a square-cut wooden beam.

name: gurdurr
description: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
appearance: Medium-sized, gray, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with prominent pink balloon-like veins on its head, limbs, and torso, a light gray nose, and constantly carries two I-beams.

name: conkeldurr
description: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.
appearance: Large, gray, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with prominent pink balloon-like veins on its head, limbs, and torso, a light gray nose, and constantly carries two large, tapering concrete pillars.

name: tympole
description: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.
appearance: Small, black tadpole-like Pokemon with a light blue underside, a flat, crescent-shaped tail, and two prominent blue, spherical bumps on its head resembling speakers.

name: palpitoad
description: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.
appearance: Medium-sized, dark blue frog-like Pokemon with a lighter blue underside, several prominent light blue bumps covering its head and back, and large yellow eyes with black pupils.

name: seismitoad
description: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.
appearance: Large, bipedal dark blue frog-like Pokemon with a lighter blue underside, numerous large light blue bumps covering its head, back, and arms, and two large light blue protrusions on its forearms that resemble speakers.

name: throh
description: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.
appearance: Stocky, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with a predominantly red body resembling a judo practitioner, dressed in a thick white gi, with a black belt, and a distinct five-fingered white hand-like mark on its face.

name: sawk
description: The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.
appearance: Lean, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with a predominantly blue body resembling a karate practitioner, dressed in a torn black gi, with a white belt, and prominent black eyebrow-like markings over its eyes.

name: sewaddle
description: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.
appearance: Small, light green bug body with a darker green leaf hood covering its head and back, featuring a distinctive single white dot on each eye and a light brown collar.

name: swadloon
description: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.
appearance: A grub-like Pokemon encased in two large, folded, olive green leaves held together by a thin brown vine, with only its small, dark brown, four-legged body and tiny black eyes peeking out.

name: leavanny
description: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.
appearance: A bipedal, slender, pale yellow insectoid with a large, pointed, dark green leaf covering its head like a hood, two large light green leaf-like arms, and two smaller leaves for wings on its back.

name: venipede
description: Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.
appearance: A small, segmented, reddish-purple centipede with a rounded, darker purple head, two prominent light pink antennae, and two short, light pink spikes on its tail end.

name: whirlipede
description: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.
appearance: A dark purple, armored, segmented bug curled into a rigid sphere, with two light pink horn-like antennae protruding from the top and two short, light pink spikes on its rear.

name: scolipede
description: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.
appearance: A large, dark purple centipede with a segmented body, a prominent reddish-purple head featuring a large, pointed light pink horn, and multiple light pink spike-like limbs along its sides and a short tail.

name: cottonee
description: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.
appearance: A small, white, spherical Pokemon resembling a cotton ball, with two small green leaves on its head and two tiny black eyes.

name: whimsicott
description: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.
appearance: A bipedal, light brown sheep-like Pokemon with a large, puffy white cloud of cotton for a body, two large green leaves on its head resembling horns, and a small green tuft for a tail.

name: petilil
description: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
appearance: A small, light green plant-like Pokemon with a bulbous body, a large, dark green leaf-like cap on its head, and three small, light brown roots for feet.

name: lilligant
description: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
appearance: An elegant, bipedal, light green plant-like Pokemon with a large pink flower on its head adorned with three white stamens and dark green leaves, and two smaller dark green leaf-like arms.

name: basculin-red-striped
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
appearance: A streamlined fish with a predominantly white body, a jagged red stripe running down its side, red fins, and a prominent red lower jaw.

name: sandile
description: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.
appearance: A small, dark brown crocodile-like Pokemon with black stripes around its eyes and snout, and a distinctive black mask-like marking over its eyes.

name: krokorok
description: They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.
appearance: A bipedal, reddish-brown crocodile-like Pokemon with a black stripe extending from its snout to its tail, a black mask over its eyes, and short, dark brown legs.

name: krookodile
description: They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile.
appearance: A large, bipedal, dark reddish-brown crocodile-like Pokemon with a black stripe extending across its body, a prominent black mask over its eyes, and short, thick arms with three claws.

name: darumaka
description: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.
appearance: A small, round, red, ape-like Pokemon with a large, white, rounded belly, thick, dark brown eyebrows, and a flame-like tuft on its head.

name: darmanitan-standard
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: A large, red, ape-like Pokemon with a distinctive white chest and belly, large, bushy dark brown eyebrows, and golden flame-like tufts on its head and shoulders.

name: maractus
description: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.
appearance: A green, bipedal cactus-like Pokemon with large yellow flowers on its head and arms, light green frills on its body, and two small black eyes.

name: dwebble
description: This Pokémon can easily melt holes in hard rocks with a liquid secreted from its mouth.
appearance: A small, brown crab-like Pokemon carrying a beige rock on its back, with two small green antennae protruding from its head and two small black eyes.

name: crustle
description: Competing for territory, Crustle fight viciously. The one whose boulder is broken is the loser of the battle.
appearance: A large, brown, multi-legged crab-like Pokemon carrying a segmented, brown and beige rock formation on its back, with two long green antennae and small black eyes.

name: scraggy
description: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.
appearance: A small, bipedal, yellow lizard-like Pokemon with a baggy, sagging pair of dark orange scales resembling pants around its waist, and a black crest on its head.

name: scrafty
description: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow lizard-like Pokemon with a long, scaly, dark orange tail, and a large, baggy dark orange skin fold around its waist that it can pull up to cover its neck.

name: sigilyph
description: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.
appearance: A spherical, black-bodied Pokemon with two prominent blue eyes, a large, multicolored 'eye' pattern on its back, and two large, blue, wing-like appendages with yellow tips.

name: yamask
description: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.
appearance: A small, black, ghostly Pokemon with two small red eyes and two slender arms, carrying a golden mask with two black eyeholes and a small black mouth-like opening.

name: cofagrigus
description: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.
appearance: A large, blue-and-gold striped sarcophagus-like Pokemon with four long, slender, ghost-like arms, a red gem on its head, and two prominent red eyes.

name: tirtouga
description: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.
appearance: A small, blue, turtle-like Pokemon with a dark blue, armored shell on its back, two large black eyes, and a light blue underside.

name: carracosta
description: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.
appearance: A large, bipedal, blue turtle-like Pokemon with a thick, dark blue armored shell on its back, white fin-like appendages on its arms, and two prominent white tusks on its lower jaw.

name: archen
description: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.
appearance: A small, blue feathered dinosaur-like Pokemon with yellow plumage on its head and tail, and two small, red wing-like appendages.

name: archeops
description: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.
appearance: A large, bipedal, brightly colored feathered dinosaur-like Pokemon with a long neck, predominantly blue and yellow plumage, and large, red, wing-like arms.

name: trubbish
description: Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places.
appearance: A small, green, trash bag-like Pokemon with two small white-and-black eyes, two short arm-like appendages made of twisted plastic, and a dark grey, crumpled mouth.

name: garbodor
description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.
appearance: A large, lumpy, green, trash pile-like Pokemon with two small yellow eyes, a prominent white-and-black mouth, and various pieces of refuse protruding from its body, including a broken tire and a banana peel.

name: zorua
description: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.
appearance: A small, dark gray fox-like Pokémon with a shaggy collar of red and black fur around its neck, red accents around its eyes, and a single tuft of red fur on its head.

name: zoroark
description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal, dark gray fox-like creature with a large, spiky red mane resembling a ponytail, red highlights around its eyes, and sharp claws.

name: minccino
description: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.
appearance: Small, light gray chinchilla-like Pokemon with large ears, a fluffy white collar, and a bushy, light gray tail tipped with white.

name: cinccino
description: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.
appearance: Elegant, elongated light gray chinchilla-like Pokemon with a long, white, silky scarf-like fur around its neck and shoulders, long white tufts from its ears, and a large, fluffy light gray tail.

name: gothita
description: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.
appearance: Small, black humanoid with a large head, a white bow-like ribbon on its head, white bow-shaped patterns on its chest, and large, dark purple eyes with long white eyelashes.

name: gothorita
description: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.
appearance: Black humanoid with a flowing skirt-like lower body, a large white bow-like ribbon on its head, two more white bows on its chest, and large, dark purple eyes with long white eyelashes.

name: gothitelle
description: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.
appearance: Tall, black humanoid with a flowing, wide lower body, intricate white bow-shaped patterns on its chest and arms, white rings around its wrists, and large, dark purple eyes with long white eyelashes.

name: solosis
description: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.
appearance: Small, green, gelatinous, sphere-shaped Pokemon with a large, round head, a dark green core, and small, dark green eyes, floating within a translucent, light green aura.

name: duosion
description: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.
appearance: Two green gelatinous spheres fused together, each with a small dark green eye, surrounded by a larger, translucent light green aura that forms arm-like appendages.

name: reuniclus
description: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.
appearance: Large, green, gelatinous humanoid with four short, thick limbs, a dark green head, dark green eyes, and a single, large dark green internal sphere, all contained within a translucent light green aura.

name: ducklett
description: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.
appearance: Small, light blue duckling with a fluffy white ruff around its neck, a small yellow beak, and webbed blue feet.

name: swanna
description: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
appearance: Elegant, white swan with a long, graceful neck, black wingtips, a large black crest on its head, and a yellow beak.

name: vanillite
description: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.
appearance: Small, white, ice cream cone-shaped Pokemon with a swirly white body, a light blue ice crystal on its head, and small black eyes.

name: vanillish
description: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon’s habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.
appearance: Medium-sized, double-scoop ice cream cone-shaped Pokemon with two swirly white bodies stacked, a light blue ice crystal between them and one on top, and small black eyes.

name: vanilluxe
description: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.
appearance: Large, triple-scoop ice cream cone-shaped Pokemon with three swirly white bodies, two light blue ice crystals on its 'hands,' and a large light blue crystal forming a 'straw' on its head, with small black eyes.

name: deerling
description: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.
appearance: Small, fawn-like Pokemon with a light brown body, cream-colored underside, and a flower-like tuft of fur on its head whose color changes with the season.

name: sawsbuck
description: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck’s horns.
appearance: Large, stag-like Pokemon with a light brown body, cream-colored underside, and large, ornate antlers that change shape and sprout seasonal foliage.

name: emolga
description: The energy made in its cheeks’ electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.
appearance: Small, white flying squirrel with a black face, large black eyes, large yellow circular cheek pouches, yellow patagium (wing membranes), and a black tail with a white tip.

name: karrablast
description: These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.
appearance: Small, blue insectoid larva with a light blue segmented body, a large yellow helmet-like shell covering its head, and a pointed blue horn.

name: escavalier
description: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.
appearance: Armored knight-like insect with a silver body, red accents, a large red lance on its right arm, a silver shield on its left arm, and a distinct red crest on its head.

name: foongus
description: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.
appearance: Small, mushroom-shaped Pokemon with a red cap patterned with white Poké Ball-like spots, a brown stem, and a small, black, oval mouth.

name: amoonguss
description: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.
appearance: Large, mushroom-shaped Pokemon with a red cap patterned with three white Poké Ball-like spots, two brown arm-like growths ending in similar Poké Ball patterns, and a large, black, oval mouth.

name: frillish
description: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.
appearance: Translucent jellyfish-like Pokemon (blue for male, pink for female) with a large, frilly bell, a ruffled collar, two large, dark eyes, and two long, ribbon-like tentacles.

name: frillish-male
description: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.
appearance: A bell-shaped jellyfish-like Pokemon with a light blue upper body, a white frilly collar, two large white eyes with black pupils, a wavy mouth, and five short, light blue tentacles below.

name: jellicent
description: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.
appearance: Large, regal, translucent jellyfish-like Pokemon (blue for male, pink for female) with a crown-like frill, a prominent mouth with teeth, large, dark eyes, and long, thick tentacles extending from its bell.

name: jellicent-male
description: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.
appearance: A large, blue jellyfish-like Pokemon with a wide white frilly collar, a large white mustache-like tentacle over a small mouth, white pupils on prominent black eyes, and three thick, blue tentacles trailing below.

name: alomomola
description: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.
appearance: Pink, heart-shaped fish with a large, rounded body, a lighter pink underside, small yellow fins, and a yellow fin on its back, resembling a large ocean sunfish.

name: joltik
description: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.
appearance: Tiny, yellow and blue tick-like spider with four stubby legs, two large black eyes, and blue fur patches on its back and head.

name: galvantula
description: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.
appearance: Large, yellow and blue tarantula-like spider with long, segmented legs, a furry yellow abdomen, blue patterns on its back, and large black eyes.

name: ferroseed
description: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.
appearance: Small, gray, spiky seed-like Pokemon covered in numerous sharp, green metallic thorns, with two prominent dark green eyes.

name: ferrothorn
description: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.
appearance: Large, gray, plant-like creature resembling a flail, with a central body covered in green metallic spikes and three long, spiked metallic vines ending in spiky mace-like balls.

name: klink
description: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.
appearance: Two interlocking gray gears, one larger than the other, with smaller black gear teeth, rotating around a central red core.

name: klang
description: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.
appearance: Three interlocking gray gears: two small ones connected to a larger central one, all with smaller black gear teeth, rotating around two central red cores.

name: klinklang
description: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.
appearance: Klinklang is a system of three main interlocking gears: a large grey central gear, a smaller black front gear with a yellow inner rim, and a rear black gear with a red inner rim, all connected by a yellow bar, with a spiky, red-cored black gear rotating on top.

name: tynamo
description: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.
appearance: Tynamo is a small, plain white, eel-like creature with a small, round black mouth and two flat, yellow, paddle-shaped fins protruding from its sides.

name: eelektrik
description: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.
appearance: Eelektrik is a dark blue, eel-like Pokemon with a light yellow underbelly, two prominent red circular markings on each side of its body near its head, a large round sucker mouth, and small, clear side fins.

name: eelektross
description: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
appearance: Eelektross is a large, dark blue, lamprey-like creature with a beige underside, small black eyes, two prominent green-yellow arm-fins tipped with red suckers, and a large, wide fan-like tail fin.

name: elgyem
description: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent’s brain, causing unendurable headaches.
appearance: Elgyem is a small, grey, humanoid alien-like creature with a large, light blue, dome-shaped head, black eyes encased in a green oval, and small blue dots on its grey, stubby limbs and torso.

name: beheeyem
description: It can manipulate an opponent’s memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.
appearance: Beheeyem is a taller, grey, humanoid alien-like creature with a flat-topped, ridged light blue head, three black eyes within a green oval visor, and a chest adorned with three circular button-like markings in red, yellow, and green.

name: litwick
description: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.
appearance: Litwick is a small, white, ghost-like candle with a large, round yellow eye, a purple flame atop its head, and dark blue wax dripping from its body.

name: lampent
description: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.
appearance: Lampent is a floating purple lamp with a white base, two bright yellow eyes, a small purple flame on top, and two spectral, wavy arms extending from its sides.

name: chandelure
description: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.
appearance: Chandelure is an ornate purple and white chandelier with several candle-like arms, each bearing a small purple flame, and two large, glowing yellow eyes on its central, spherical body.

name: axew
description: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.
appearance: Axew is a small, light green, bipedal dragon with a dark green face and belly, two large white tusks extending from its cheeks, and small dark green claws on its feet.

name: fraxure
description: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they’ve been fighting.
appearance: Fraxure is a bipedal, grey-green dragon with dark green undersides, two sharp black tusks protruding from its lower jaw, and a prominent dark green ridge cresting its head.

name: haxorus
description: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.
appearance: Haxorus is a large, dark green, bipedal dragon with a grey underside, massive black axe-like tusks flaring from its cheeks, and red sclera surrounding its yellow eyes.

name: cubchoo
description: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.
appearance: Cubchoo is a small, white, bipedal bear cub with a perpetually dripping light blue snot bubble from its nose, a fluffy white collar, and a blue tuft of fur on its head.

name: beartic
description: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.
appearance: Beartic is a large, white, bipedal polar bear with a formidable light blue icicle beard, three dark blue claws on each hand, and a shaggy blue ridge of fur extending down its back.

name: cryogonal
description: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.
appearance: Cryogonal is a large, grey, snowflake-shaped Pokémon with a circular red eye at its center, a prominent ridged mouth, and four dark blue chain-like appendages extending from its body.

name: shelmet
description: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.
appearance: Shelmet is a small, grey, snail-like creature protected by a large, round, grey helmet-shell with a prominent yellow stripe down its front and two small yellow eyes on stalks.

name: accelgor
description: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.
appearance: Accelgor is a lean, red, humanoid ninja-like creature with a large, white, turban-like head covering, black eyes, a small mouth, and green striped markings on its red limbs.

name: stunfisk
description: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.
appearance: Stunfisk is a flat, brown, flounder-like fish with a yellow zigzag pattern across its back, two small black eyes on top, and a wide, red-lipped mouth.

name: mienfoo
description: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.
appearance: Mienfoo is a slender, bipedal, yellow weasel-like creature with red fur cuffs on its wrists and ankles, and long, thin red whiskers extending from its snout.

name: mienshao
description: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.
appearance: Mienshao is an elegant, bipedal, purple weasel-like creature with long, flowing fur sleeves that extend past its paws, and two long, thin purple whiskers.

name: druddigon
description: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.
appearance: Druddigon is a robust, red, bipedal dragon with a rough, rock-like blue-black face adorned with several prominent red spikes, and blue-black claws and wing-like protrusions on its back.

name: golett
description: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.
appearance: Golett is a small, grey, golem-like automaton with a prominent crack across its chest, glowing light blue eyes, and a single light blue marking on its torso.

name: golurk
description: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.
appearance: Golurk is a large, grey, golem-like automaton with glowing yellow eyes, large cracks across its chest and limbs, and light blue geometric markings on its arms and legs.

name: pawniard
description: Blades comprise this Pokémon’s entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.
appearance: Pawniard is a small, red and black bipedal creature resembling a chess pawn, featuring yellow eyes and multiple sharp, blade-like protrusions on its head, arms, and knees.

name: bisharp
description: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.
appearance: Bisharp is a tall, bipedal, red and black humanoid creature with a prominent axe-blade crest on its head, multiple sharp blade-like appendages on its arms and knees, and yellow eyes.

name: bouffalant
description: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.
appearance: Bouffalant is a large, brown, bovine creature characterized by a massive, dark brown, afro-like mane that obscures its eyes, and two sharp, golden horns that curve outwards from its head.

name: rufflet
description: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.
appearance: Rufflet is a small, bipedal, white bird with a large, fluffy white head, a light blue crest, a small pointed yellow beak, and blue tail feathers.

name: braviary
description: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.
appearance: Braviary is a large, bipedal, red bird with a prominent white head, a vibrant red and blue feathered crest, a hooked yellow beak, and white tail feathers tipped with red.

name: vullaby
description: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.
appearance: Vullaby is a small, black, bipedal bird resembling a vulture chick, characterized by a prominent diaper-like white skull covering its lower body and a tuft of grey-white fluff on its head.

name: mandibuzz
description: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.
appearance: Mandibuzz is a large, black, bipedal vulture-like bird with a bone-like white facial mask, a prominent white skull covering its lower body adorned with red and pink feathers, and grey wings.

name: heatmor
description: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.
appearance: Red-orange anteater-like creature with a grey-brown belly, metallic snout, and yellow flame-like markings on its forearms, chest, and tail tip.

name: durant
description: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.
appearance: Grey metallic ant-like creature with a segmented black abdomen, large red pincers on its head, black segmented legs, and yellow eyes.

name: deino
description: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.
appearance: Small, dark blue reptilian creature covered in shaggy fur, with a black bowl-cut mane completely covering its eyes, and a short tail ending in a tuft of black fur.

name: zweilous
description: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.
appearance: Dark blue, two-headed serpentine creature covered in shaggy fur, with each head having a black mane covering its eyes, and two stubby purple-black wings on its back.

name: hydreigon
description: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.
appearance: Dark blue draconic creature with a large central head and two smaller arm-heads, all three featuring fuchsia frills and black manes covering their eyes, and six purple-black wings.

name: larvesta
description: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.
appearance: Small white segmented larva with five red-orange horns tipped with black on its head, and four pairs of small black legs along its body.

name: volcarona
description: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona’s fire provided a replacement for the sun.
appearance: Large white moth-like creature with six fiery orange-red wings featuring black spots, a blue body with a black segmented pattern, and red antennae with black tips.

name: cobalion
description: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.
appearance: Steel-blue deer-like creature with a yellow mohawk, white chest fur, brown lower legs, and a single pointed golden horn on its forehead.

name: terrakion
description: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.
appearance: Large brown bull-like creature with grey rock-like plates on its back and shoulders, a white mane, and two long, curved grey horns.

name: virizion
description: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.
appearance: Green deer-like creature with long pink pointed horns, a white mane on its chest, and distinct pink flower-like markings on its shoulders and legs.

name: tornadus-incarnate
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.
appearance: Green muscular genie-like humanoid with a long purple cloud-like lower body, white curly hair, and two red horn-like protrusions on its head.

name: thundurus-incarnate
description: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.
appearance: Blue muscular genie-like humanoid with a long purple cloud-like lower body, spiky white hair, and two prominent yellow horn-like protrusions on its head.

name: reshiram
description: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.
appearance: White bipedal dragon with long, feathery wings and tail, a fluffy white neck ruff, and a grey ring with red markings on its tail.

name: zekrom
description: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.
appearance: Black bipedal dragon with large grey armored wings, a grey generator-like tail, and glowing blue eyes with matching electrical accents on its body.

name: landorus-incarnate
description: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”
appearance: Orange muscular genie-like humanoid with a long brown cloud-like lower body, a white beard, and two large brown, ridged horns on its head.

name: kyurem
description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
appearance: Large grey bipedal dragon with asymmetrical, jagged ice-like wings, a fractured head crest, and a prominent yellow core on its chest.

name: keldeo-ordinary
description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.
appearance: Small white equine creature with a long blue mane, a small red horn on its forehead, and orange-red tufts of hair on its lower legs.

name: meloetta-aria
description: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.
appearance: Slender white humanoid with long green hair, a black musical note headpiece, and a white dress adorned with black musical note patterns.

name: genesect
description: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
appearance: Purple insectoid creature with a metallic grey cannon on its back, glowing red eyes, and a sharp grey head crest.

name: chespin
description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.
appearance: Small bipedal light brown rodent-like creature with a spiky green shell covering its head and back, and a light yellow face.

name: quilladin
description: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators’ attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.
appearance: Bipedal brown armadillo-like creature with a large, spiky green shell covering its entire back and head, and two dark green stripes on its belly.

name: chesnaught
description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.
appearance: Large bipedal armored brown armadillo-like creature with a green spiked shell, green forearms resembling gauntlets, and a prominent green beard.

name: fennekin
description: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: Small orange fox with large ears featuring vibrant red-orange tufts, a white muzzle, and slender legs.

name: braixen
description: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.
appearance: Bipedal orange fox-like creature with a black skirt-like fur on its lower body, white ear tufts, and a brown stick tucked into its bushy orange tail.

name: delphox
description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
appearance: Bipedal dark orange fox-like creature with long white hair flowing from its ears, a dark red wizard-like robe covering its body, and a magical stick clutched within its fur.

name: froakie
description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.
appearance: Small light blue frog with a prominent white bubble-like ruff around its neck and back, and large yellow eyes.

name: frogadier
description: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.
appearance: Slender dark blue frog with a light blue belly, dark blue bubbles on its knees, and a white bubble-like ruff around its neck.

name: greninja
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: Tall dark blue ninja frog with a long pink tongue wrapped like a scarf around its neck, white bubbles on its knees, and large yellow eyes.

name: bunnelby
description: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.
appearance: Small grey rabbit with large brown-tipped ears resembling digging tools, a white belly, and a small pink nose.

name: diggersby
description: With their powerful ears, they can heft boulders of a ton or more with ease. They can be a big help at construction sites.
appearance: Large brown rabbit with powerful brown-tipped ears resembling excavation tools, a white belly, and a patch of grey fur on its chest.

name: fletchling
description: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.
appearance: A small, robin-like bird with a gray back, a bright red chest and belly, black tail feathers tipped with white, and an orange beak and feet.

name: fletchinder
description: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass.
appearance: A medium-sized bird with an orange-red head, chest, and undersides, a black back, wings, and tail, yellow beak and talons, and orange markings around its eyes.

name: talonflame
description: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.
appearance: A large, hawk-like bird with a fiery red head, back, and undersides, dark black wings and tail tipped with orange-yellow flames, and a yellow beak and talons.

name: scatterbug
description: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.
appearance: A small, caterpillar-like insect with a round, segmented black body almost entirely covered in thick white fur, large green eyes, and two small white protrusions on its head.

name: spewpa
description: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.
appearance: An oval, pupa-like Pokemon with a gray-black body covered in white fur, prominent yellow eyes, and two short, yellow antennae.

name: vivillon
description: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.
appearance: A butterfly Pokemon with a slender black body and head, two short black antennae, and large, rounded wings patterned with a green and yellow base, bordered by black with scattered white spots.

name: litleo
description: The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal lion cub with a light brown body, a large tuft of red-orange fur on its head, black paws and tail tip, and large, dark eyes.

name: pyroar
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal lion with a mostly brown body; males feature a fiery red-orange mane covering their head and extending down their back, while females have a long, flowing yellow mane.

name: pyroar-male
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal lion-like Pokemon with a predominantly brown body, a large, fiery red-orange mane with yellow highlights that extends down its back, and a powerful build with four sturdy legs.

name: flabebe
description: It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabébé holds is most likely part of its body.
appearance: A tiny, white, humanoid-shaped fairy with a green stem-like appendage on its head, typically found holding a single large flower whose color varies.

name: floette
description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
appearance: A small, white, humanoid-shaped fairy with a green stem-like appendage on its head, floating and holding a large, five-petaled flower whose color matches its stem.

name: florges
description: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.
appearance: A graceful, white, humanoid-shaped fairy with a green, stem-like growth forming its hair, and a large, flowing, five-petaled floral 'dress' whose color varies.

name: skiddo
description: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal goat with a light green body, a brown muzzle and belly, small brown horns, and a short, leafy tail.

name: gogoat
description: It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal goat with a mostly dark green body, large brown curving horns adorned with green leaves, and a white muzzle and beard-like tuft of fur.

name: pancham
description: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark.
appearance: A small, bipedal panda cub with a white head and face, black ears, eye patches, and body, and a green leaf perpetually held in its mouth.

name: pangoro
description: Although it possesses a violent temperament, it won’t put up with bullying. It uses the leaf in its mouth to sense the movements of its enemies.
appearance: A large, bipedal panda with a predominantly black body and limbs, a white face and belly, a dark red, tattered scarf-like patch of fur around its neck, and a green leaf held in its mouth.

name: furfrou
description: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.
appearance: A white, poodle-like dog with a fluffy, curly coat of fur, dark blue eyes, and black paw pads, capable of being styled into various decorative trims.

name: espurr
description: The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out.
appearance: A small, bipedal cat with light gray fur, large dark purple eyes that appear to glow, pink paw pads, and a small pink nose.

name: meowstic-male
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
appearance: A bipedal cat with a sleek dark blue body, white fur on its face and chest, large white-rimmed blue ears with a darker blue interior, and a blue tuft of fur resembling a collar.

name: honedge
description: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.
appearance: A floating, ancient-looking sword with a blue blade, a brown hilt, a single purple eye set within its gold-colored hand guard, and a long blue cloth emanating from its pommel.

name: doublade
description: When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.
appearance: Two floating, blue-bladed swords, each with a brown hilt and a single purple eye in its gold hand guard, joined together by a single long, blue cloth.

name: aegislash-shield
description: Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
appearance: A floating blue-bladed sword with a brown hilt and a purple eye set in its gold hand guard, paired with a round gold shield adorned with a purple central marking and trim.

name: spritzee
description: It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.
appearance: A small, bird-like fairy with a round, fluffy pink body, a small yellow beak, and thin purple legs.

name: aromatisse
description: It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.
appearance: A plump, pink avian Pokémon resembling a flapper, with a ruffled white skirt, a white mask-like face, and a pink plume on its head.

name: swirlix
description: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.
appearance: A small, white, spherical Pokemon resembling a puff of cotton candy, with two small yellow eyes and a pink tongue constantly peeking out.

name: slurpuff
description: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.
appearance: A round, white bipedal Pokemon resembling a fluffy cake, with a pink frosting-like swirl on its head, pink ear-like appendages, a small pink nose, and a long pink tongue.

name: inkay
description: Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.
appearance: A small, inverted-looking squid with a round, dark blue head featuring two yellow eyes and a blue fin, and a pink underbelly with several small, dark blue tentacles.

name: malamar
description: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
appearance: A large, inverted squid-like Pokemon with a mostly dark purple body, a black underbelly, two large yellow eyes, and a crown-like head made of dark purple fin-like protrusions.

name: binacle
description: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.
appearance: A Pokemon composed of two separate brown rock-like bodies, each with a white hand-like appendage and a single yellow eye, connected by a central black 'arm' attached to a larger brown rock.

name: barbaracle
description: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.
appearance: A large, multi-limbed Pokemon resembling a cluster of barnacles, with a black body supporting several brown rock-like appendages, each ending in a distinct head with an orange-red hand-like protrusion and a single yellow eye.

name: skrelp
description: Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off.
appearance: A small, seahorse-like dragon with a predominantly brown body resembling decaying seaweed, a small orange eye, and delicate purple fin-like growths on its head and back.

name: dragalge
description: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.
appearance: A seahorse-like dragon with a purplish-brown body covered in reddish-brown seaweed-like frills and prominent yellow eyes, featuring a long, tapering tail and a distinct crest on its head.

name: clauncher
description: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
appearance: A small blue aquatic crustacean with an oversized, bright red right claw, a smaller blue left claw, and a light blue underside.

name: clawitzer
description: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.
appearance: A larger, more robust blue aquatic crustacean with an even larger, bright blue right claw featuring a yellow tip and circular patterns, a smaller blue left claw, and a light blue underside.

name: helioptile
description: They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.
appearance: A small, bipedal yellow lizard with a black belly, large frilled ears that resemble solar panels, and a short black tail.

name: heliolisk
description: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.
appearance: A larger, bipedal yellow lizard with a black belly, long black-tipped frills on its neck that resemble solar panels, and a long black-tipped tail.

name: tyrunt
description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. If something happens that it doesn’t like, it throws a tantrum and runs wild.
appearance: A small, bipedal T-rex-like dinosaur with a reddish-brown body, a white belly, a large head with a crown-like white frill, and short forelegs.

name: tyrantrum
description: Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, it was invincible in the ancient world it once inhabited.
appearance: A large, bipedal T-rex-like dinosaur with a reddish-brown body, a white belly, a prominent white fluffy neck ruff, and a massive lower jaw.

name: amaura
description: This ancient Pokémon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.
appearance: A light blue sauropod dinosaur with a white belly, a diamond-shaped ice crystal on its head, and two iridescent sail-like structures on its neck that shimmer with multiple colors.

name: aurorus
description: The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice.
appearance: A large, light blue sauropod dinosaur with a white belly, a long neck, two large iridescent sail-like structures extending from its head and neck, and diamond-shaped ice crystals on its sides.

name: sylveon
description: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights.
appearance: A quadrupedal cream-colored fox-like creature with long ear flaps, two large bows with two trailing ribbons each (one light pink, one light blue) on its neck and left ear, and large light blue eyes.

name: hawlucha
description: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.
appearance: A bipedal bird-like luchador with a primarily white body, a red feathered mask, a green cape-like wing structure on its back, and yellow talons.

name: dedenne
description: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.
appearance: A small, round orange mouse with a black tail, long black whiskers, and prominent circular yellow cheek pouches.

name: carbink
description: Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.
appearance: A small, gray, floating rock-like creature with a diamond embedded in its head, a white fluffy ruff, and small blue eyes.

name: goomy
description: The weakest Dragon-type Pokémon, it lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn’t dry out.
appearance: A small, purple, slug-like creature with two green eyes, two antennae, and a gooey, gelatinous body.

name: sliggoo
description: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.
appearance: A larger, purple, slug-like creature with a yellow belly, two large green eyes on stalks, and a gooey body covered in slime.

name: goodra
description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.
appearance: A large, bipedal purple dragon with a yellow belly, green eyes, two long purple antennae with green tips, and a gooey, slimy texture.

name: klefki
description: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.
appearance: A small, floating silver keychain-like creature with two silver keys attached to its 'head' and two small light blue eyes.

name: phantump
description: These Pokémon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.
appearance: A small, brown, ghost-like tree stump creature with a small white branch on its head, an orange eye, and two small twig-like arms.

name: trevenant
description: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.
appearance: A larger, gnarled brown tree-like ghost with a gnarled branch as a left arm, a smaller twig-like right arm, a single red eye, and several white roots for legs.

name: pumpkaboo-average
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: A small, round orange pumpkin with a carved black face, green stem, and a small black ghost-like wisp emerging from its top.

name: gourgeist-average
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A larger, slender orange pumpkin with a carved black face, a prominent purple wig-like top, and two small white ghost-like tendrils.

name: bergmite
description: It blocks opponents’ attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.
appearance: A small, light blue, blocky ice crystal creature with two small ice shards for feet and two small white eyes.

name: avalugg
description: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.
appearance: A large, flat, battleship-like ice crystal creature with a flat top, four blocky legs, and two small white eyes.

name: noibat
description: They live in pitch-black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.
appearance: A small, purple bat with large, green-ringed black ears, a furry white chest, and a small pink snout.

name: noivern
description: They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark.
appearance: A large, purple bat-like dragon with large, green-ringed black ears, a furry white chest and neck, and red internal membranes on its wings.

name: xerneas
description: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.
appearance: A quadrupedal deer-like creature with a dark blue body, a large, black-antlered rack that glows with a rainbow of colors, and black fur on its chest and legs.

name: yveltal
description: When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.
appearance: A large, Y-shaped, dark red and black bird-like creature with sharp talons, a feathered collar, and a long tail plume.

name: zygarde-50
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: A large, snake-like creature composed of green, black, and white hexagonal cells, featuring a wing-like structure on its back and a flat, reptilian head.

name: diancie
description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.
appearance: A small, white, humanoid-like creature with a pink dress-like body, a crystalline crown on its head, and two small pink diamonds on its side 'ears'.

name: hoopa
description: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.
appearance: A small, mischievous-looking purple genie-like creature with a white and black striped belly, golden rings on its arms and head, and two prominent horns.

name: volcanion
description: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It’s said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.
appearance: Volcanion is a quadrupedal, reddish-brown Pokémon with a white underbelly, yellow accents, and two large, ring-shaped, orange-and-yellow arm cannons on its back connected by a central tube, featuring a small snout and a steam exhaust vent.

name: rowlet
description: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.
appearance: Rowlet is a small, spherical, white avian Pokémon with a prominent brown leafy bow tie, two green leaves on its chest, and a green-feathered head featuring large black eyes and a short orange beak.

name: dartrix
description: A bit of a dandy, it spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle.
appearance: Dartrix is a bipedal, mostly white avian Pokémon with green feathers forming a cape-like back and swept-back bangs, two dark green leaves on its chest, and a longer, pointed orange beak with a prominent white stripe.

name: decidueye
description: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.
appearance: Decidueye is a tall, slender bipedal avian archer Pokémon covered in dark green feathers, featuring a white face with a prominent hood-like marking, red eyes, a small beak, and has feather arrows stored on its wings with a brown leafy bowstring.

name: litten
description: While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.
appearance: Litten is a small, sleek black feline Pokémon with distinctive red stripes on its face and legs, tufts of red fur on its cheeks, and large yellow eyes.

name: torracat
description: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.
appearance: Torracat is a bipedal feline Pokémon with a predominantly red and black striped coat, a prominent yellow bell-shaped fire sac at its throat, large gold eyes, and a black mane on its chest.

name: incineroar
description: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it’s not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer’s orders with complete nonchalance.
appearance: Incineroar is a large, bipedal, muscular feline wrestler Pokémon with black and red fur, a prominent fiery red wrestling belt around its waist, yellow eyes, and a distinctive red-and-black muzzle.

name: popplio
description: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.
appearance: Popplio is a small, light blue pinniped Pokémon with a white snout, a prominent frill of dark blue ruffs around its neck, a small pink nose, and large dark eyes.

name: brionne
description: A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies.
appearance: Brionne is a bipedal, light blue pinniped Pokémon with a dark blue upper body, a white snout, two prominent pink ruffs around its neck and waist, and a dark blue ruffled tail.

name: primarina
description: It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next.
appearance: Primarina is an elegant bipedal, light blue mermaid-like Pokémon with a long, flowing light blue and white ruffled tail, long light blue hair adorned with white pearls and a pink starfish-like ornament, and large blue eyes.

name: pikipek
description: It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting.
appearance: Pikipek is a small, black and white woodpecker Pokémon with a long, pointed black beak featuring distinct red, orange, and yellow stripes near the tip, and a clear white chest.

name: trumbeak
description: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.
appearance: Trumbeak is a medium-sized, predominantly black avian Pokémon with a large, vibrant yellow beak bisected by a black stripe, a prominent red throat patch, and a white chest.

name: toucannon
description: When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits.
appearance: Toucannon is a large, predominantly black avian Pokémon with a massive, brightly colored beak featuring vibrant red, orange, and yellow sections, a white underbelly, and a prominent red feathery chest tuft.

name: yungoos
description: With its sharp fangs, it will bite anything. It did not originally live in Alola but was imported from another region.
appearance: Yungoos is a small, shaggy brown mongoose-like Pokémon with a long, low-slung body, a prominent tuft of yellow fur on its head, and a perpetually open mouth revealing a pink tongue.

name: gumshoos
description: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.
appearance: Gumshoos is a larger, yellow-brown mongoose-like Pokémon with a long, prominent yellow fur tuft styled like swept-back hair on its head and chest, a white underbelly, and a stern, observant expression.

name: grubbin
description: Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground.
appearance: Grubbin is a small, white segmented grub-like Pokémon with a large orange head, prominent black pincers, and short yellow antennae.

name: charjabug
description: Its body is capable of storing electricity. On camping trips, people are grateful to have one around.
appearance: Charjabug is a rectangular, green bug Pokémon resembling a battery, featuring black eyes, short yellow antennae, and small yellow leg nubs.

name: vikavolt
description: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.
appearance: Vikavolt is a large, sleek black stag beetle-like Pokémon with long, curved yellow mandibles extending from its head, iridescent blue wings, and prominent yellow markings on its head and abdomen.

name: crabrawler
description: While guarding its weak points with its pincers, it looks for an opening and unleashes punches. When it loses, it foams at the mouth and faints.
appearance: Crabrawler is a purple crustacean Pokémon with large blue boxing claws, yellow eyes, and a prominent yellow protuberance on its head.

name: crabominable
description: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.
appearance: Crabominable is a large, white yeti-crab-like Pokémon with thick blue fur covering its limbs, a prominent red nose-like horn on its face, and massive blue ice-covered boxing claws.

name: oricorio-baile
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: Oricorio-Baile is a primarily red avian Pokémon with black dancer-like plumage forming a skirt, headcrest, and tail feathers, featuring white-rimmed eyes and a red flower on its head.

name: cutiefly
description: It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it’s able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom.
appearance: Cutiefly is a tiny, white, bee-like insect Pokémon with large black eyes, a small proboscis, and delicate yellow-tipped wings.

name: ribombee
description: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.
appearance: Ribombee is a small, yellow and white bee-like insect Pokémon with a large white head, yellow scarf-like fur, black antennae, and four delicate white wings with brown edges.

name: rockruff
description: It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.
appearance: Rockruff is a small, light brown canine Pokémon with a white muzzle, bright blue eyes, and spiky orange rocks resembling a mane around its neck.

name: lycanroc-midday
description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
appearance: Lycanroc-Midday is a sleek, quadrupedal light brown wolf-like Pokémon with white fur on its chest and muzzle, long pointed ears, green eyes, and a shaggy mane of brown fur around its neck.

name: wishiwashi-solo
description: When it’s in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies.
appearance: Wishiwashi-Solo is a tiny, silver-blue fish Pokémon with large, teary blue eyes, a small mouth, and delicate fins.

name: mareanie
description: It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles.
appearance: Mareanie is a small, blue starfish-like Pokémon with five pointed arms, a round pink body, and a prominent red eye on its head.

name: toxapex
description: Toxapex crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake.
appearance: Toxapex is a large, multi-legged blue starfish-like Pokémon with a spiky purple head crest, fourteen sharp, purple-tipped tentacles, and a prominent yellow core on its underside.

name: mudbray
description: The mud stuck to Mudbray’s hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait.
appearance: Mudbray is a small, light brown equine Pokémon with a dark brown mane and tail, light brown hooves, and prominent floppy ears.

name: mudsdale
description: It spits a mud that provides resistance to both wind and rain, so the walls of old houses were often coated with it.
appearance: Mudsdale is a large, robust dark brown equine Pokémon with thick, braided mud-like mane and tail, powerful legs ending in dark brown hooves, and a determined expression.

name: dewpider
description: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.
appearance: Small, blue, spherical body with four short, light blue legs, and a prominent clear water bubble covering its head, featuring two large, light blue eyes.

name: araquanid
description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.
appearance: Large, dark blue spider-like body with four long, segmented blue legs and a large, clear water bubble encasing its head and upper torso, revealing two large, yellow eyes and a sharp beak.

name: fomantis
description: During the day, it sleeps and soaks up light. When night falls, it walks around looking for a safer place to sleep.
appearance: Small, pink praying mantis-like Pokemon with a white-and-pink striped 'hood' over its head, two large green leaf-like forelimbs, and a green abdomen resembling an unopened flower bud.

name: lurantis
description: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis’s vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.
appearance: Elegant, humanoid praying mantis-like Pokemon, primarily pink and white with a large, dark pink scythe-like forelimb, a smaller light pink scythe-like forelimb, a green and white striped 'skirt' around its waist, and a green head resembling a blooming orchid.

name: morelull
description: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.
appearance: Small, mushroom-like creature with a pale purple, spherical head adorned with glowing blue dots, a thin brown stem, and two small, stubby feet.

name: shiinotic
description: Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home again.
appearance: Tall, bipedal mushroom-like Pokemon with a purple body, a large, dark purple mushroom cap adorned with glowing blue dots, and smaller glowing blue dots on its chest and hands.

name: salandit
description: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its enemies become disoriented from inhaling the gas, it attacks them.
appearance: Small, black lizard with a distinctive red-orange blaze marking on its back and tail, a dark gray underbelly, and a mask-like dark gray facial marking around its yellow eyes.

name: salazzle
description: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal black salamander with a prominent red-orange pattern on its neck, chest, and tail, long, slender limbs, and a pointed head with yellow eyes.

name: stufful
