description: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.
appearance: Small, pink, bear-like cub with short, stubby limbs, a white face, white belly, and white paw tips, distinguished by a small white tag-like protrusion on its rear.

name: bewear
description: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.
appearance: Large, bipedal pink bear-like Pokemon with powerful black limbs and a black torso, a white muzzle, and a white chest pattern resembling a bib, featuring a small white tag-like protrusion on its rear.

name: bounsweet
description: A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed whole by Toucannon lured by that wafting deliciousness.
appearance: Small, purple, spherical fruit-like Pokemon with a green calyx of leaves on its head and two tiny pink feet.

name: steenee
description: The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokémon, this Pokémon is totally fine.
appearance: Small, purple, bipedal fruit-like Pokemon with a green calyx of leaves forming a 'hat' on its head, short stubby arms, and two slender legs, featuring a prominent white marking on its stomach.

name: tsareena
description: Its long, striking legs aren’t just for show but to be used to kick with skill. In victory, it shows off by kicking the defeated, laughing boisterously.
appearance: Tall, elegant, bipedal fruit-like Pokemon with a purple body, long slender legs, a crown-like green calyx of leaves on its head, and prominent pink 'panties' and white markings on its upper thighs.

name: comfey
description: It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flowers, and they give off an aromatic scent.
appearance: Small, green, fairy-like Pokemon with a wreath of vibrant, colorful flowers encircling its body, typically seen floating.

name: oranguru
description: Known for its extreme intelligence, this Pokémon will look down on inexperienced Trainers, so it’s best suited to veteran Trainers.
appearance: Large, bipedal ape-like Pokemon with long, white shaggy fur, purple arms, and a prominent purple leaf-like fan held in one hand, often sitting cross-legged.

name: passimian
description: They form groups of roughly 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable—they will never let down a comrade.
appearance: White-furred lemur-like Pokemon with black markings on its face and limbs, a green leaf-like helmet, and a large, striped green and white fruit-like object that it carries and throws.

name: wimpod
description: This Pokémon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake.
appearance: Small, purple and gray arthropod-like Pokemon with a segmented body, six short legs, two long antennae, and large yellow eyes, resembling a trilobite.

name: golisopod
description: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.
appearance: Large, bipedal gray and purple armored arthropod-like Pokemon with sharp claws, a segmented body, and a prominent crest on its head, resembling a samurai beetle.

name: sandygast
description: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokémon embodies the grudges of the departed.
appearance: Small, ghostly pile of sand with two purple eyes and a shovel sticking out of its head, typically a pale sandy yellow color.

name: palossand
description: Possessed people controlled by this Pokémon transformed its sand mound into a castle. As it evolved, its power to curse grew ever stronger.
appearance: Large, ghostly sandcastle-like Pokemon with two purple eyes and a dark gray, gaping maw, a shovel sticking out of its topmost turret, and various small rocks embedded in its sandy yellow body.

name: pyukumuku
description: It’s covered in a slime that keeps its skin moist, allowing it to stay on land for days without drying up.
appearance: Small, black, spiny sea cucumber-like Pokemon with a white, star-shaped mouth-like structure on its face and a white tail-like appendage, often covered in clear mucus.

name: type-null
description: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal chimera-like Pokemon with various armored parts in shades of gray, a distinctive gray helmet completely obscuring its head, and sharp red claws.

name: silvally
description: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal chimera-like Pokemon with white fur, a sleek head with a prominent mane, and various silver armored parts on its body, featuring a unique fin-like tail.

name: minior-red-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: Small, spherical, dark red rocky meteor shell with a prominent star-shaped core visible through an opening, featuring a small black eye.

name: komala
description: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.
appearance: Small, white koala-like Pokemon perpetually asleep, clutching a log, with light gray fur on its ears and a faint pink blush on its cheeks.

name: turtonator
description: The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. The hole in its stomach is its weak point.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal tortoise-like Pokemon with a red and orange explosive-looking shell on its back, a gray body, and a long tail.

name: togedemaru
description: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.
appearance: Small, spherical gray rodent with a white belly, a spiny yellow 'tail' on its back that resembles a lightning bolt, and small, rounded ears.

name: mimikyu-disguised
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: Small, ghost-like Pokemon concealed under a crudely drawn Pikachu-like disguise, consisting of a brown cloth body, black-tipped ears, and two black eyeholes with a drawn red cheek circle.

name: bruxish
description: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.
appearance: Colorful fish-like Pokemon with a bright pink and purple striped body, yellow fins, a prominent pink 'flower' on its forehead, and large, white teeth.

name: drampa
description: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.
appearance: Large, green serpentine dragon with a long, flowing white beard and eyebrows, a prominent pink nose, and a long tail with a white, cloud-like tip.

name: dhelmise
description: Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body.
appearance: A dark green kelp creature intertwined with a large, dark grey anchor featuring rust-red accents, and a dark brown wooden steering wheel with a bright green central eye.

name: jangmo-o
description: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives.
appearance: A small, bipedal, scaly grey dragon with a pale yellow belly, a distinctive gold heart-shaped scale on its forehead, and a white fur ruff around its neck.

name: hakamo-o
description: It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches tear its opponents to shreds.
appearance: A larger, bipedal dragon covered in dark grey scales with a lighter grey underbelly, a gold heart-shaped forehead scale, and prominent grey armor-like scales on its limbs, all framed by a spiked white fur collar.

name: kommo-o
description: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.
appearance: A large, powerfully built bipedal dragon with a dark grey body, light grey underbelly, a prominent gold heart-shaped scale on its forehead, and heavy grey and black armor-like scales on its limbs and tail, complemented by a large, spiked white fur collar.

name: tapu-koko
description: This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body.
appearance: An avian-like bipedal guardian deity with a black body, yellow markings, and large yellow shell-like arm structures that form a bird mask when closed, topped with an orange-tipped feathered crest.

name: tapu-lele
description: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy.
appearance: A small, pink and white bipedal guardian deity with delicate white arms and a large, intricately patterned pink and white shell that closes to resemble butterfly wings, featuring a pink horn and a white plume on its head.

name: tapu-bulu
description: It pulls large trees up by the roots and swings them around. It causes vegetation to grow, and then it absorbs energy from the growth.
appearance: A large, bovine-like guardian deity with a red body, a white underbelly, and large, carved brown shell-like structures on its arms that form a bull's head mask when closed, finished with a leafy green tail and two golden horn rings.

name: tapu-fini
description: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy.
appearance: A mermaid-like guardian deity with a white body, light blue fin-like appendages, and a large, dark blue shell with white wave patterns that forms a fish-like mask when closed, featuring a white, flowing headpiece.

name: cosmog
description: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.
appearance: A tiny, nebulous Pokemon resembling a floating blue cloud with gold star-like patterns and two small gold antenna, featuring large, dark blue eyes with white pupils.

name: cosmoem
description: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars.
appearance: A small, metallic gold, spherical Pokemon encased in a dark blue, ringed shell resembling a celestial body, with several gold spikes and a single large, dark blue eye on its front.

name: solgaleo
description: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.
appearance: A large, leonine Pokemon with a white body, a powerful mane resembling a stylized sun, and a blue celestial pattern on its forehead and paws, accented with gold around its face and feet.

name: lunala
description: It is said to be a female evolution of Cosmog. When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world.
appearance: A large, skeletal bat-like Pokemon, primarily dark purple with white bone-like structures, glowing yellow eyes, and a large, crescent moon shape on its chest with a flowing, star-filled wing pattern.

name: nihilego
description: One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.
appearance: An ethereal, jellyfish-like Ultra Beast with a translucent, bell-shaped head and long, ribbon-like tentacles, all primarily white with light blue and black internal patterns resembling a nebula, and a small, white human-like figure at its core.

name: buzzwole
description: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.
appearance: A large, muscular, humanoid insectoid Ultra Beast with a primarily red body, white muscle-like structures, prominent, veiny, red and black arms, and a small black head with two red eyes and a proboscis.

name: pheromosa
description: One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds.
appearance: A slender, elegant, humanoid insectoid Ultra Beast with a delicate, white, porcelain-like body, extremely long limbs, and flowing white antennae and hair-like structures.

name: xurkitree
description: One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses.
appearance: A tall, humanoid Ultra Beast made entirely of black and white electrical cables, resembling a stylized Christmas tree, with a white 'head' featuring a black spike and two yellow star-like 'eyes.'

name: celesteela
description: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.
appearance: A massive, humanoid Ultra Beast resembling a rocket, with a tall, grey metallic body, long, segmented arms and legs, large, bamboo-like green structures on its head, and jet thrusters on its lower body.

name: kartana
description: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.
appearance: A small, origami-like Ultra Beast, predominantly white with sharp, yellow-tipped edges, resembling a folded paper figure, with a small, red eye on its central body and sharp, sword-like arms.

name: guzzlord
description: It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. It’s one of the Ultra Beasts.
appearance: A massive, gluttonous Ultra Beast with a mostly black, globular body, a huge mouth lined with several sharp teeth and a 'chin' made of white plates, yellow eyes, a long blue tongue, and small, stumpy grey limbs.

name: necrozma
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: A crystalline, black humanoid Ultra Beast with sharp, angular limbs and a head resembling a dark prism, whose body features glowing multi-colored light patterns within its dark crystal structure and a single large triangular 'eye.'

name: magearna
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: A bipedal, mechanical doll-like Pokemon with a metallic, silver body, a large, round, intricate 'Soul-Heart' core on its chest, a gear-like head with pink ears, a large white frill, and a detailed dress-like lower body with red and gold accents.

name: marshadow
description: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.
appearance: A small, shadowy, humanoid Pokemon with a dark grey body, green eyes, and fiery green head crests and arm markings that appear when agitated, giving it a slender, wispy appearance.

name: poipole
description: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.
appearance: A small, purple, alien-like Pokemon with a single large, cyan eye and a head shaped like a syringe, complete with a white needle-like horn, small stubby limbs, and a translucent belly.

name: naganadel
description: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.
appearance: A large, dragon-like Ultra Beast with a primarily purple body, a long, slender neck, large, bat-like wings with purple membranes, a distinctive white and yellow 'needle' horn on its head, and a light grey belly.

name: stakataka
description: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.
appearance: A massive, block-like Ultra Beast composed of multiple grey stone bricks stacked together, featuring four small, glowing blue eyes on its front face, with its limbs also formed from movable brick stacks.

name: blacephalon
description: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.
appearance: A humanoid Ultra Beast with a slender, white body and long, thin limbs, notable for its large, spherical, multicolored head resembling a disco ball, which displays various bright, vibrant colors.

name: zeraora
description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal, feline-like Pokemon with a yellow body, black stripes, a distinctive black and blue lightning bolt-shaped tail, large pointed ears with blue interiors, and powerful clawed limbs.

name: meltan
description: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
appearance: A small, silvery metallic Pokemon with a hexagonal nut for a head, a dark grey body, a single large, dark blue eye, and a red tail resembling a power cable.

name: melmetal
description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
appearance: A massive, humanoid metallic Pokemon composed of multiple hexagonal nuts bolted together, giving it a powerful, robust physique, with a large, rounded head featuring a central blue eye and broad, muscular limbs.

name: grookey
description: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.
appearance: A small, green monkey-like Pokemon with large, round ears, an orange face, a small leaf-like tail, and a stick-like appendage on its head resembling a drumstick.

name: thwackey
description: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.
appearance: Green monkey-like Pokemon with brown fur on its chest and face, a green leafy tuft on its head, and two green drumsticks held in its hands which are connected to its head by vines.

name: rillaboom
description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.
appearance: Large green gorilla-like Pokemon with thick green fur, brown fur on its chest and face, holding a large log drum, and a prominent red-orange leafy crest on its head and back.

name: scorbunny
description: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.
appearance: White rabbit-like Pokemon with orange ear tips, nose, and 'collar' markings, a yellow patch on its forehead, and large red-orange paw pads.

name: raboot
description: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.
appearance: Gray rabbit-like Pokemon with dark gray 'shorts' marking, a dark gray mask-like pattern over its eyes, and orange markings on its ears and face that resemble a scarf.

name: cinderace
description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.
appearance: Bipedal white rabbit-like Pokemon with long orange-red ears, an orange-red 'collar' and arm markings, blue 'shorts' and ankle markings, and a yellow patch on its abdomen.

name: sobble
description: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.
appearance: Light blue lizard-like Pokemon with a teardrop-shaped head crest, a yellow fin on its back, and dark blue spots on its body.

name: drizzile
description: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.
appearance: Dark blue lizard-like Pokemon with a tall, light blue fin crest on its head, a lighter blue belly, and long, slender limbs.

name: inteleon
description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
appearance: Tall, slender blue chameleon-like Pokemon with a light blue belly, a long yellow fin crest on its head, and a pointed tail that resembles a knife.

name: skwovet
description: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.
appearance: Gray squirrel-like Pokemon with a fluffy, dark gray tail, a cream-colored belly and inner ears, and prominent front teeth.

name: greedent
description: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.
appearance: Large, portly gray squirrel-like Pokemon with a fluffy, dark gray tail, a cream-colored belly, and prominent front teeth, often depicted holding a berry.

name: rookidee
description: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.
appearance: Small, round blue bird-like Pokemon with a yellow beak, black feather tips on its wings and tail, and large, bright yellow eyes.

name: corvisquire
description: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.
appearance: Medium-sized blue bird-like Pokemon with black wing and tail feathers, yellow talons, and a prominent yellow feather crest on its head.

name: corviknight
description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.
appearance: Large, imposing black armored raven-like Pokemon with bright red eyes, a sharp yellow beak, and large, powerful wings, resembling a knight in dark plate armor.

name: blipbug
description: A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.
appearance: Small, purplish-blue insect-like Pokemon with a large head, three yellow antennae, and small yellow eyes.

name: dottler
description: It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.
appearance: Spherical, purplish-blue insect-like Pokemon encased in a hardened yellow shell with dark blue markings, and three yellow antennae protruding from the top.

name: orbeetle
description: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.
appearance: Red ladybug-like Pokemon with a sleek, aerodynamic red shell, black spots, a prominent yellow head with red eyes, and six long, black legs.

name: nickit
description: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.
appearance: Orange fox-like Pokemon with a dark gray mask-like pattern around its eyes, gray paws, and a bushy tail with a gray tip.

name: thievul
description: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.
appearance: Tall, slender red fox-like Pokemon with a dark gray mask-like pattern over its eyes, gray paws and belly, and a long, slender tail with a gray tip.

name: gossifleur
description: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.
appearance: Small, white flower-like Pokemon with a green stem body, a large yellow-orange floral head with a dark brown center, and two green leaves for arms.

name: eldegoss
description: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.
appearance: Larger, white cotton-like Pokemon with a green stem body, a large white cotton fluff head with green leaves at its base, and two green leaf-like arms.

name: wooloo
description: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.
appearance: White sheep-like Pokemon with a round, fluffy body made of white wool, a black face, black legs, and two small black horns.

name: dubwool
description: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.
appearance: Larger, white sheep-like Pokemon with a robust, fluffy white wool body, a black face, black legs, and prominent curling black horns.

name: chewtle
description: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.
appearance: Small, green turtle-like Pokemon with a large, orange beak-like mouth, a green shell, and small, stubby limbs.

name: drednaw
description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.
appearance: Large, brown snapping turtle-like Pokemon with a rugged green shell, a powerful orange beak-like mouth, and a serrated crest on its head.

name: yamper
description: This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail.
appearance: Small, yellow corgi-like Pokemon with a heart-shaped brown patch on its rear, blue eyes, and small brown paw pads.

name: boltund
description: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.
appearance: Sleek, yellow dog-like Pokemon with a lean, athletic build, brown markings on its legs and tail, and green eyes, featuring a lightning bolt-like tail.

name: rolycoly
description: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.
appearance: Black, rock-like Pokemon with a single red eye, resembling a lump of coal on a wheel, with a white, rectangular 'foot' on its underside.

name: carkol
description: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.
appearance: Dark gray, cart-like Pokemon made of coal, with two glowing red eyes, two orange wheels, and a chimney-like protrusion on its back.

name: coalossal
description: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: Massive, black rock-like Pokemon resembling a walking coal furnace, with glowing red eyes, prominent orange and red fiery cracks on its body, and a large, jagged coal crown on its head.

name: applin
description: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.
appearance: Tiny, green apple-shaped dragon-like Pokemon with two small, yellow eyes, living inside a red apple, with only its head and tail peeking out.

name: flapple
description: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
appearance: A small, green apple-shaped dragon with two large, pale green apple skin 'wings' on its back, a segment of the apple core forming its body, and two small yellow eyes.

name: appletun
description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.
appearance: A round, green dragon with a soft, pie-like apple skin shell on its back, two short green legs, and a cream-colored face with small black eyes and a large, dark green mouth.

name: silicobra
description: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.
appearance: A sandy yellow-brown cobra with a large, coiled body, a wide, flat hood with two dark brown stripes, and two small, black eyes.

name: sandaconda
description: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.
appearance: A large, sandy brown cobra with a distinctive, large, sand-filled sac around its neck, a dark brown stripe running along its back, and a broad, flat tail.

name: cramorant
description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
appearance: A blue cormorant-like bird with a white belly, large yellow eyes, a yellow beak, and white feathers around its neck and head.

name: arrokuda
description: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw.
appearance: A small, torpedo-shaped gray barracuda with a bright red, pointed snout, a small dorsal fin, and two pectoral fins.

name: barraskewda
description: This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.
appearance: A long, slender gray barracuda with a large, pointed red snout, a prominent yellow dorsal fin, and two smaller yellow pectoral fins.

name: toxel
description: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.
appearance: A small, purple infant-like Pokémon with a light purple diaper-like marking on its belly, yellow electrical sacs on its cheeks, and a spiky crest of dark purple on its head.

name: toxtricity-amped
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: A lanky, purple punk-rock lizard with a yellow chest and belly, two large yellow horns on its head, spiky yellow shoulder pads, and two yellow electric guitar-like markings on its forearms.

name: sizzlipede
description: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.
appearance: A long, segmented centipede with a fiery red-orange head and tail, a black body with yellow undersides, and multiple yellow legs.

name: centiskorch
description: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.
appearance: A massive, fiery red-orange centipede with a black underside, a segmented body, two large, curved horns on its head, and multiple yellow legs along its length.

name: clobbopus
description: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.
appearance: A small, light blue octopus with a white head resembling a beanie hat, two white suckers on each of its four arms, and two large, dark eyes.

name: grapploct
description: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.
appearance: A muscular, dark blue humanoid octopus with white markings on its body resembling a grappling suit, a white headband, and powerful, white-suckered arms.

name: sinistea
description: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.
appearance: A small, purple ghost-like Pokémon residing within a light purple teacup, with a white handle and a gold rim, and a single white eye on its teacup body.

name: polteageist
description: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.
appearance: A purple ghost-like Pokémon inhabiting a light purple teapot with a golden lid, handle, and spout, featuring a single white eye on its teapot body.

name: hatenna
description: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.
appearance: A small, light pink humanoid creature with a dark blue hat-like head covering that obscures its eyes, and two small dark blue tendrils extending from its body.

name: hattrem
description: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.
appearance: A slightly larger light pink humanoid with a wide dark blue hat-like head covering that forms a conical shape, and two long, dark blue tendrils that curl upward.

name: hatterene
description: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.
appearance: A tall, slender light pink humanoid with a massive, dark blue bell-shaped hat that covers its entire body except for its lower legs, and long, trailing dark blue tendrils.

name: impidimp
description: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.
appearance: A small, imp-like creature with purple skin, a pinkish-red nose, pink tips on its ears, and a long, curly pink tail.

name: morgrem
description: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.
appearance: A lanky, dark pink imp-like creature with long, spiky green hair covering one eye, a mischievous grin, and a green tuft of fur on its chest.

name: grimmsnarl
description: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.
appearance: A large, muscular, dark pink humanoid with long, flowing green hair that forms a beard and covers much of its body, large green claws, and a broad, intimidating stance.

name: obstagoon
description: Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct.
appearance: A black and white badger-like Pokémon standing on two legs, with a zigzag pattern across its chest and legs, spiky black fur, and a long, pointed tongue.

name: perrserker
description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.
appearance: A bipedal, armored gray cat-like Pokémon with a long, braided beard of steel, a steel helmet, and sharp steel claws on its hands and feet.

name: cursola
description: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit.
appearance: A ghostly, pale blue coral structure, retaining the basic shape of a Corsola but with a translucent, ethereal appearance, glowing light blue in its core.

name: sirfetchd
description: Only Farfetch’d that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon’s leek withers, it will retire from combat.
appearance: A valiant, white duck-like Pokémon with yellow feathers, carrying a large green leek stalk as a sword and a leek shield, with a stern expression and bushy yellow eyebrows.

name: mr-rime
description: It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements.
appearance: A bipedal, light blue mime-like Pokémon with a large belly, a black top hat, a black mustache, a black bow tie, and a blue cane, appearing to have icicles on its fingers.

name: runerigus
description: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.
appearance: A large, flat, dark gray slab of stone, resembling an ancient carving or tablet, with a single glowing yellow eye in the center and several shadowy, purple-edged arms extending from its sides.

name: milcery
description: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.
appearance: A small, amorphous, white or cream-colored dollop-shaped Pokémon with two small yellow dot eyes, a tiny red dot mouth, and a distinctive swirl on top of its head resembling whipped cream, often adorned with a small red berry-like accent and sometimes a light blue bow.

name: alcremie
description: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.
appearance: A whipped cream-like entity with a large, swirled body, two wide eyes, and various edible-looking 'sweets' (like berries, ribbons, or clovers) adorning its head and body, with its primary body color varying greatly based on its specific form, ranging from white to pink, yellow, green, or other hues.

name: falinks
description: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.
appearance: A formation of six bipedal, beetle-like creatures, primarily golden yellow with dark brown accents, linked together in a line; each individual creature has a round helmet with two dark brown horn-like protrusions, prominent dark brown eyes, a cylindrical body, and two stubby legs.

name: pincurchin
description: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.
appearance: A black, spiky, sea urchin-like Pokémon with a spherical body, yellow eyes, yellow spiky antennae-like appendages on its top, and a yellow mouth.

name: snom
description: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.
appearance: A small, white, caterpillar-like Pokémon with a translucent icy-blue shell covered in spikes on its back, two small black eyes, and two antennae.

name: frosmoth
description: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: A white moth-like Pokémon with large, elegant wings primarily white with light blue markings and dark blue veins, a fluffy white body, two feathery antennae, and two small black eyes.

name: stonjourner
description: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.
appearance: A bipedal Pokémon composed of several large, gray, rectangular stone slabs arranged vertically, with a central 'head' stone featuring two bright yellow eyes.

name: eiscue-ice
description: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
appearance: A penguin-like Pokémon with a light blue body, two dark blue feet, and a large, cubic block of ice for a head, within which its small black eyes are visible.

name: indeedee-male
description: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.
appearance: A bipedal, dark blue and white Pokémon with a sleek build, a white chest and face, dark blue ears, and a distinctive dark blue horn-like curl on its forehead, featuring gentle blue eyes.

name: morpeko-full-belly
description: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.
appearance: A small, bipedal rodent-like Pokémon with a yellow-orange body, dark brown fur on its face, back, and paws, two small dark eyes, a small orange nose, and two prominent yellow cheeks.

name: cufant
description: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.
appearance: A small, light blue elephant-like Pokémon resembling a baby pachyderm constructed from copper, with large, round ears, a short trunk, and four sturdy legs.

name: copperajah
description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.
appearance: A large, teal-green elephant-like Pokémon resembling oxidized copper, with a broad, flat trunk ending in a shovel-like appendage, massive flat ears, and heavy, segmented legs.

name: dracozolt
description: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a yellow, reptilian lower body and tail, sharp claws, and a green, bird-like upper body featuring a long neck, a small head with a beak, and orange eyes.

name: arctozolt
description: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a light blue, reptilian lower body and tail, sharp claws, and a dark blue, bird-like upper body featuring a long neck, a small head with a beak, and yellow eyes.

name: dracovish
description: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a light blue, fish-like head featuring large eyes and a prominent fin, attached to a scaly, green reptilian body with four sturdy legs and a tail.

name: arctovish
description: Though it’s able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a light blue, fish-like head featuring large eyes and a prominent fin, attached to a scaly, dark blue reptilian body with four sturdy legs and a tail.

name: duraludon
description: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.
appearance: A tall, metallic gray bipedal Pokémon with a sleek, angular body, blocky forearms, a long neck, and a small head with two glowing green eyes, resembling a skyscraper.

name: dreepy
description: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.
appearance: A small, green, lizard-like Pokémon with a triangular head, two small red eyes, and a translucent, ghostly tail that tapers to a point.

name: drakloak
description: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.
appearance: A medium-sized, green, salamander-like Pokémon with a large, flat, dark blue triangular head featuring red eyes, and a tail that holds a smaller Dreepy.

name: dragapult
description: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.
appearance: A sleek, green dragon-like Pokémon with a flat, dark blue triangular head featuring red eyes, and two Dreepy nested in hollows on its forearms, resembling missile launchers.

name: zacian
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.
appearance: A majestic wolf-like Pokémon with a predominantly blue and white body, golden accents on its legs and tail, and a prominent golden sword held in its mouth.

name: zamazenta
description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.
appearance: A formidable wolf-like Pokémon with a predominantly red and white body, golden accents, and a large, circular, shield-like mane and chest plate covering its upper body.

name: eternatus
description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.
appearance: A colossal, serpentine dragon with a skeletal purple and red body, sharp claws, glowing red eyes, and spiky appendages, resembling a cosmic skeletal dragon.

name: kubfu
description: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.
appearance: A small, bipedal bear cub-like Pokémon with a light brown body, white face, white chest marking, and a distinctive black headband-like pattern on its forehead.

name: urshifu-single-strike
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: A bipedal bear-like Pokémon with a dark gray and white muscular body, intense red eyes, and a prominent black and white pattern resembling a martial arts uniform.

name: zarude
description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.
appearance: A large, dark gray ape-like Pokémon with green vines wrapped around its arms and waist, sharp red eyes, and white fur on its chest and face.

name: regieleki
description: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power.
appearance: A golem-like Pokémon primarily made of yellow electrical energy, with a round body, two prominent blue lightning bolt-shaped arms, and a single blue eye.

name: regidrago
description: An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven.
appearance: A golem-like Pokémon made of red material, with a spherical body, two short legs, and a distinctive head resembling a dragon's maw with a single black eye inside.

name: glastrier
description: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force.
appearance: A powerful, robust white horse Pokémon with blue hooves, a blue mane and tail, and a determined expression, its face covered by a thick icy mask.

name: spectrier
description: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body.
appearance: A slender, ghostly purple horse Pokémon with black hooves, a purple mane and tail, and an ethereal glow, its face covered by a wispy, dark mask.

name: calyrex
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
appearance: A small, white, bipedal rabbit-like Pokémon with large green ears, a white fluffy tail, and a prominent golden crown on its head, carrying a golden scepter.

name: wyrdeer
description: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.
appearance: A large, majestic deer-like Pokémon with a brown body, white belly, a distinctive black mask-like marking around its eyes, and ornate, dark brown and white antlers that curve upwards and outwards.

name: kleavor
description: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.
appearance: A powerful, bipedal insectoid Pokémon with a rock-hard, dark gray body, two large axe-like forearms with glowing orange patterns, and sharp yellow eyes.

name: ursaluna
description: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.
appearance: Large, bipedal, bear-like, mostly dark brown with lighter brown fur on its belly and muzzle, a prominent yellow-orange moon-like disc on its forehead, and mud-like splotches on its limbs.

name: basculegion-male
description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
appearance: Long, slender fish with a blue-green body, a white underside, a red-orange stripe running along its lateral line, and spectral white fins on its back and tail with glowing red eyes.

name: sneasler
description: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.
appearance: Tall, slender, bipedal feline-like creature with white fur, purple markings on its chest and limbs, long arms with sharp black claws, and a prominent white and purple feather-like crest on its head.

name: overqwil
description: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.
appearance: Globular, dark purple pufferfish-like body covered in numerous sharp white quills, dark red eyes, and a large, white-toothed mouth.

name: enamorus-incarnate
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.
appearance: Pink, humanoid-like cloud spirit with a white cloud collar, long pink hair, two large white cloud wings on its back, and an ornate golden coiled snake-like tail.

name: sprigatito
description: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal feline with light green fur, darker green markings around its eyes and on its paws, and large pink eyes.

name: floragato
description: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.
appearance: Bipedal feline with light green fur, darker green paws, a dark green mask-like marking around its eyes, and a large pink flower on a flexible stem forming a collar around its neck.

name: meowscarada
description: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.
appearance: Tall, bipedal feline with dark green fur, a light green underside, a flowing cape-like pattern of fur, a large pink mask-like marking on its face, and a flower-shaped gem at its neck.

name: fuecoco
description: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal crocodile-like creature with a red body, a yellow underside, a yellow tuft of hair on its head, and a distinct white flame-shaped marking above its eyes.

name: crocalor
description: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.
appearance: Bipedal crocodile with a predominantly red body, a yellow belly, a large flame-shaped yellow and red 'hat' on its head, and a small, white egg-like marking on its snout.

name: skeledirge
description: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.
appearance: Large, bipedal crocodile with a dark red-orange body, a white belly, a ghostly white bird perched on its head, and large, dark red flames emanating from its mouth.

name: quaxly
description: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime."
appearance: Small, duckling-like bird with a white body, blue feet, a blue crest on its head resembling a pompadour, and large blue eyes.

name: quaxwell
description: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.
appearance: Bipedal duck-like bird with a white body, blue feet, a larger blue crest on its head, and blue tail feathers arranged like a fan.

name: quaquaval
description: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.
appearance: Tall, bipedal peacock-like bird with a predominantly blue body, white chest, a large, elaborate fan-like tail of blue, green, and red feathers, and prominent blue feathers on its head and arms.

name: lechonk
description: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
appearance: Small, pig-like creature with a spherical dark gray body, a lighter gray face and belly, large floppy ears, and small pink hooves.

name: oinkologne-male
description: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal boar-like creature with a dark gray body, a lighter gray snout and belly, prominent tusks, and small pink hooves.

name: tarountula
description: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.
appearance: Small, spherical spider with a predominantly white body, black markings, and a large white orb of webbing on its back resembling a yarn ball.

name: spidops
description: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
appearance: Tall, praying mantis-like spider with a green body, white markings, and a prominent yellow and black web-like pattern on its abdomen and arms.

name: nymble
description: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.
appearance: Small, insectoid creature with a predominantly green body, a yellow belly, black limbs, and large, round black eyes.

name: lokix
description: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.
appearance: Bipedal, humanoid insectoid with a predominantly black body, green accents on its limbs and head, and two large, scythe-like arms.

name: pawmi
description: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.
appearance: Small, bipedal rodent with an orange body, white belly, large yellow ear pads, and dark brown eyes.

name: pawmo
description: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.
appearance: Bipedal rodent with an orange body, white belly, large yellow ear pads, and prominent yellow shock pads on its forearms.

name: pawmot
description: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.
appearance: Bipedal, electric rodent with an orange body, white belly, large yellow ear pads, prominent yellow shock pads on its forearms, and spiky fur on its head.

name: tandemaus
description: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
appearance: Two small, bipedal mouse-like creatures with white bodies, black eyes, and long, thin tails, standing side-by-side.

name: maushold-family-of-four
description: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
appearance: Four small, bipedal mouse-like creatures with white bodies, black eyes, and long, thin tails, arranged as two larger mice with two smaller mice in front of them.

name: fidough
description: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal dog-like creature with a light brown, dough-like body, floppy ears, and swirled markings resembling braided bread on its head and tail.

name: dachsbun
description: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.
appearance: Medium-sized, quadrupedal dog-like creature with a golden-brown, baked-bread-like body, darker brown markings on its paws and snout, and a swirled pattern around its neck.

name: smoliv
description: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
appearance: Small, olive-like creature with a green body, a brown head resembling a pit, and a single green leaf growing from its top.

name: dolliv
description: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.
appearance: Larger, olive-like creature with a green body, a brown head, and two green leaves sprouting from its top, with a small olive attached to one of the leaves.

name: arboliva
description: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
appearance: Large, humanoid olive tree-like creature with a green body, a brown trunk-like lower body, and two large green leaves forming its 'hair,' with several small olives hanging from it.

name: squawkabilly-green-plumage
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
appearance: A parrot-like Pokemon with vibrant green plumage covering its body, a lighter cream-colored chest and belly, an orange-yellow beak, and distinctive black rings around its eyes.

name: nacli
description: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.
appearance: A cubic, crystalline Pokemon resembling a block of salt, featuring a greyish-white body with an orange-yellow rock formation on its head, and dark indentations forming its "eyes" and "mouth."

name: naclstack
description: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.
appearance: A Pokemon composed of two stacked, greyish-white crystalline salt blocks, with the smaller top block featuring an orange-yellow rock formation resembling a crown, and dark indentations for its eyes and mouth.

name: garganacl
description: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.
appearance: A large, bipedal golem-like Pokemon constructed from greyish-white crystalline salt blocks, featuring a blocky body, dark indented eyes, and prominent orange-yellow rock formations on its head and shoulders.

name: charcadet
description: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.
appearance: A small, bipedal Pokemon with a round black body covered in segmented orange-red armor plating on its head, chest, and limbs, featuring bright orange glowing eyes.

name: armarouge
description: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.
appearance: A bipedal, humanoid knight-like Pokemon clad in golden-yellow and bright red armor, featuring a prominent helmet with a red crest, a red chest plate, and large, cannon-like red forearms, all over a dark blue-black body.

name: ceruledge
description: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.
appearance: A bipedal, humanoid knight-like Pokemon with a dark blue-black body covered in deep violet and dark grey armor, distinguished by its glowing purple blade-like forearms and a distinct dark helmet with a plume.

name: tadbulb
description: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.
appearance: A small, tadpole-like Pokemon with a dark green body and tail, featuring a large, translucent yellow-orange bulb on its head that glows, and wide yellow eyes.

name: bellibolt
description: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.
appearance: A large, stout, bipedal frog-like Pokemon with a bright green body, a prominent yellow glowing "belly button," and two large yellow, semi-circular bumps above its wide black eyes.

name: wattrel
description: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.
appearance: A small, swift-like bird Pokemon with a sleek black body, a yellow beak, and distinct yellow markings on its chest and under its long, pointed wings, ending in a forked tail.

name: kilowattrel
description: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.
appearance: A larger, elegant frigatebird-like Pokemon with a sleek black body, a striking vibrant yellow chest and throat, a yellow beak, and yellow accents along the edges of its long, pointed wings and forked tail.

name: maschiff
description: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face.
appearance: A stocky, quadrupedal puppy-like Pokemon with predominantly dark brown fur, a lighter tan muzzle and chest, floppy ears, dark fur obscuring its eyes, and two distinct tan circular markings on its hindquarters.

name: mabosstiff
description: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.
appearance: A large, powerful mastiff-like Pokemon with dark brown fur, a lighter tan muzzle and chest, shaggy fur obscuring its eyes, a prominent spiky dark mane around its neck, and two tan circular markings on its hindquarters.

name: shroodle
description: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.
appearance: A small, bipedal rodent-like Pokemon with a pale purple body, large ears, dark grey paws and an eye mask, and distinctive bright pink tips on its fingers.

name: grafaiai
description: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.
appearance: A slender, bipedal lemur-like Pokemon with a grey body, white chest and facial markings, large purple eyes, bright pink-tipped fingers and toes, and a large bushy tail that has a pinkish end.

name: bramblin
description: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.
appearance: A spherical, tumbleweed-like Pokemon made of dried brown plant material with small green shoots emerging, featuring two large yellow eyes with black pupils.

name: brambleghast
description: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.
appearance: A large, complex tangle of dried brown thorny branches forming a roughly humanoid tumbleweed shape, featuring glowing yellow eyes with black pupils that emanate a reddish-orange energy, and scattered green leaf accents.

name: toedscool
description: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.
appearance: A Pokemon with a flat, round red cap resembling a mushroom, from which eight long, slender yellow tentacle-like legs extend, featuring two large white eyes with black pupils on its "head."

name: toedscruel
description: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.
appearance: A large, tree-like Pokemon with a wide, flat red mushroom cap, a central "trunk" and numerous "arms" composed of twisting yellow tentacles, and two large white eyes with black pupils beneath its cap.

name: klawf
description: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.
appearance: A large, armored crab-like Pokemon with a reddish-orange shell, lighter yellow undersides, and distinct dark blue markings forming a star-like pattern on its carapace, featuring two large yellow eyes.

name: capsakid
description: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.
appearance: A small, bipedal Pokemon resembling a green bell pepper, featuring a short stem on its head, two small arms and legs, and round black eyes.

name: scovillain
description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
appearance: A bipedal, plant-like Pokemon with a green body, featuring two distinct heads: one fiery red chili pepper and one green chili pepper, with prominent yellow markings on its chest.

name: rellor
description: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.
appearance: A small, shiny black beetle-like Pokemon with purple accents on its carapace and two glowing yellow eyes, perpetually rolling a large brown mud ball with its front legs.

name: rabsca
description: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
appearance: An ornate, vibrant green scarab beetle-like Pokemon with yellow eyes and reddish-orange accents, partially encased within a brown spherical shell, from which its legs and mandibles extend.

name: flittle
description: Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly.
appearance: A small, spherical yellow Pokemon with tiny wings, two small legs, and a prominent blue star or flower-like pattern covering its entire back, featuring two large black eyes.

name: espathra
description: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.
appearance: A tall, elegant ostrich-like Pokemon with a white body, long yellow legs and chest markings, and a striking, large feathery crest on its head that displays vibrant red, orange, yellow, and blue hues around its blue eyes.

name: tinkatink
description: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
appearance: A small, imp-like bipedal Pokemon with a pink body, white face and belly, large white eyes, pink hair, and carrying a small dark grey metal hammer.

name: tinkatuff
description: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
appearance: A bipedal, imp-like Pokemon with a pink body, white face and belly, pink hair, and large white eyes, wielding a larger, more intricately crafted dark grey metal hammer with a reddish-pink handle.

name: tinkaton
description: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.
appearance: A powerful, bipedal humanoid imp-like Pokemon with a pink body, white face and belly, pink hair, and large white eyes, wielding an enormous dark grey metal hammer adorned with large pink ribbons.

name: wiglett
description: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
appearance: A long, slender, worm-like Pokemon with a pure white body, featuring a small pink nose and two distinct black eyes on its head.

name: wugtrio
description: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
appearance: A trio of long, thin, white eel-like bodies with red snouts and black eyes, emerging from the ground, each head identical.

name: bombirdier
description: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.
appearance: A large, dark grey avian Pokémon with a long, sharp yellow beak, prominent white chest feathers, and carrying a bundle of rocks and branches clutched in its red talons, with red wingtips.

name: finizen
description: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.
appearance: A sleek, light blue dolphin-like Pokémon with a white underside, two small pectoral fins, a dorsal fin with a heart-shaped cutout, and a heart-shaped tail fin, featuring a single blowhole.

name: palafin-zero
description: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.
appearance: A sleek, light blue dolphin-like Pokémon with a white underside, two small pectoral fins, a dorsal fin with a heart-shaped cutout, and a heart-shaped tail fin, appearing slightly larger than Finizen with a more determined expression.

name: varoom
description: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.
appearance: A metallic grey, single-cylinder engine-like Pokémon with a large red eye on its side, a spiky exhaust pipe on its back, four small black gear-like legs, and a prominent silver crank on its front.

name: revavroom
description: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.
appearance: A large, multi-cylinder engine-like Pokémon composed of eight metallic grey engine blocks fused together, featuring four black spiked wheels, a prominent red eye on its central body block, and exhaust pipes emerging from its top.

name: cyclizar
description: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal, lizard-like Pokémon with a green body, a tan underbelly, large black eyes, and black racing stripes on its back and sides, with a long tail featuring a tire-like segment near its base.

name: orthworm
description: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
appearance: A long, segmented, metallic-red worm-like Pokémon with a large, shovel-shaped silver head, prominent silver plates on its back, and multiple small, yellow, drill-like appendages along its sides.

name: glimmet
description: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.
appearance: A purple geode-like Pokémon with a crystalline, yellow-orange flower-like structure on its head, featuring a grey underside and glowing yellow eyes.

name: glimmora
description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
appearance: A large, floating, crystalline Pokémon resembling a giant purple and yellow flower, with sharp, yellow crystal petals surrounding a central purple core and a long stem-like base.

name: greavard
description: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.
appearance: A small, ghost-like puppy Pokémon made of grey smoke with a single, glowing purple eye, a bone-shaped candle on its head with a flickering purple flame, and large floppy ears.

name: houndstone
description: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.
appearance: A large, four-legged ghost dog Pokémon with a dark grey, skeletal body covered in tattered white burial cloth, a glowing purple eye, and a prominent headstone-like structure on its back.

name: flamigo
description: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.
appearance: A tall, pink flamingo-like Pokémon with a long neck and legs, a yellow beak with a black tip, and distinct white heart-shaped markings on its upper body where its wings attach.

name: cetoddle
description: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.
appearance: A small, round, white whale-like Pokémon with a pink snout, a single spiracle on its head, two small pink flippers, and a short pink tail fin.

name: cetitan
description: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.
appearance: A massive, white whale-like Pokémon with a large pink head, two long pink horn-like tusks, four thick pink legs, and a sturdy body covered in thick white fur.

name: veluza
description: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.
appearance: A large, elongated, white fish-like Pokémon with a prominent, jagged red dorsal fin running down its back, bright red eyes, and sharp, needle-like teeth, with dark blue markings on its body.

name: dondozo
description: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.
appearance: A massive, dark blue catfish-like Pokémon with a large white underbelly, prominent pink barbels around its mouth, a large, flat, fish-like tail, and lighter blue diamond patterns covering its back.

name: tatsugiri-curly
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: A small, orange, curl-shaped fish Pokémon with a light yellow underbelly, two small fins, large black eyes, and a prominent wavy, antenna-like fin on its head.

name: annihilape
description: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
appearance: A large, grey ape-like Pokémon with a muscular build, prominent black fur on its wrists and ankles, two large dark grey cuffs with broken chains on its wrists, glowing red eyes, and a perpetually enraged expression.

name: clodsire
description: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.
appearance: A stout, brown, salamander-like Pokémon with a large, wide mouth, two small black eyes, and two rows of three purple, gill-like growths on its head, resembling a large, muddy newt.

name: farigiraf
description: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s.
appearance: A large, two-headed giraffe-like Pokémon with an orange and white spotted body, a long neck, and a second, smaller, spherical grey head at the end of its tail, connected to its main body by a striped collar, with its main head mostly grey with orange spots.

name: dudunsparce-two-segment
description: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
appearance: A long, serpentine Pokémon with a cream-colored body, two distinct segments, blue-and-yellow striped wings, a drill-like tail, and a round, cream-colored head with small blue eyes.

name: kingambit
description: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
appearance: A large, bipedal, humanoid Pokémon with a dark red and black armored body, a prominent gold mustache-like facial feature, a massive, gold-crested head resembling a shogun's helmet, and wielding a sharp, gold-bladed axe on its chest.

name: great-tusk
description: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.
appearance: A massive, grey, elephant-like Pokémon with large red tusks, thick, ridged grey skin, heavy club-like forelegs with black claws, and prominent red and yellow markings on its head and trunk, resembling a prehistoric mammoth.

name: scream-tail
description: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.
appearance: A small, pink, fairy-like Pokémon with large, pointed ears, a long, fluffy tail, prominent fangs, blue eyes, and two small wings, resembling a prehistoric Jigglypuff.

name: brute-bonnet
description: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.
appearance: A large, mushroom-like Pokémon with a dark red cap, white spots, a brown stem-like body, green, leaf-like appendages around its base, black eyes, and a wide mouth, resembling a prehistoric Amoonguss.

name: flutter-mane
description: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
appearance: A small, floating, ghost-like Pokémon with a wispy, light purple body, long, flowing hair-like tendrils, prominent yellow eyes with red pupils, two sharp teeth, and large, gold-colored claws, resembling a prehistoric Misdreavus.

name: slither-wing
description: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
appearance: A large, bipedal, insectoid Pokémon with a reddish-brown body, prominent yellow markings on its wings and head, large, feathery yellow antennae, and green legs, resembling a prehistoric Volcarona.

name: sandy-shocks
description: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.
appearance: A quadrupedal, badger-like Pokémon with a dark brown body, prominent yellow metallic spikes on its back and head, a long, striped tail, and large, magnet-like claws, resembling a prehistoric Magneton.

name: iron-treads
description: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.
appearance: A large, futuristic elephant-like Pokémon with a sleek, metallic grey body, prominent white tusks, black tread-like legs, glowing blue stripes, and blue eyes, resembling a robotic Donphan.

name: iron-bundle
description: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.
appearance: A bipedal, rounded, light blue-grey metallic robot resembling a penguin, featuring a large red-rimmed hexagonal opening on its belly, red visor-like eyes, and red thrusters where its feet would be.

name: iron-hands
description: It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.
appearance: A large, hulking bipedal robot with a stout torso and massive forearms, colored dark blue-grey metallic with glowing yellow, segmented hands, yellow shoulder plating, and a singular horizontal yellow eye slit.

name: iron-jugulis
description: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.
