appearance: A multi-headed dark blue-grey metallic dragon with a serpentine body, bat-like wings, and three heads that each feature a glowing pink eye, accented by pink glowing segments on its wings and body.

name: iron-moth
description: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.
appearance: A moth-like robot with a segmented, dark grey metallic body and four large, glowing orange-yellow rectangular wings featuring hexagonal patterns, complemented by orange-yellow antennae and a singular central eye.

name: iron-thorns
description: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.
appearance: A large, bipedal dark grey metallic robot resembling a dinosaur, covered in angular plating, with sharp green glowing spines running down its back and forearms, and a pair of glowing green eyes.

name: frigibax
description: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.
appearance: A small, bipedal light blue reptilian Pokémon with a white underbelly, a white mask-like pattern around its large black eyes, and a prominent dark blue dorsal fin tipped with white that resembles an ice pick.

name: arctibax
description: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.
appearance: A bipedal, robust dark blue reptilian Pokémon with a white underbelly, a white mask-like pattern across its face and cheeks, and a large dark blue dorsal fin with a white tip and segmented white edges.

name: baxcalibur
description: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
appearance: A large, imposing bipedal dark blue reptilian Pokémon with a white underbelly featuring blue stripes, a white mask over its face, and a massive dark blue dorsal fin with a serrated white edge extending along its back.

name: gimmighoul
description: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
appearance: A small, elusive Pokémon with two forms: either a shiny gold coin featuring a distinct spiral pattern, or a small black creature with a single light-blue glowing eye, peeking out from an old brown wooden chest with dark bands and a keyhole.

name: gholdengo
description: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.
appearance: A tall humanoid Pokémon made entirely of stacked shiny gold coins, featuring a large smiling coin for a head with black button eyes, and riding a segmented gold surfboard.

name: wo-chien
description: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king’s evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.
appearance: A slug-like Pokémon with a body made of dark soil and wood, topped by a large, ornate shell composed of dark green, brown, and reddish-brown decaying leaves, featuring small glowing dark red eyes.

name: chien-pao
description: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.
appearance: A sleek white quadrupedal feline Pokémon with black markings resembling cracks on its body, featuring two large broken red sword blades as fangs, a red sword hilt protruding from its forehead, and small glowing dark red eyes.

name: ting-lu
description: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.
appearance: A massive, quadrupedal dark brown Pokémon resembling a deer or moose, featuring a colossal dark grey ritualistic vessel with glowing green cracks embedded on its head as antlers, and small glowing dark red eyes.

name: chi-yu
description: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.
appearance: A vibrant red fish-like Pokémon with a flowing tail, featuring two large, curved golden magatama beads as eyes and a black, flame-like fin atop its head.

name: roaring-moon
description: It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries.
appearance: A large bipedal dark blue dragon with enormous, tattered red feathery wings, a massive cream-colored jaw, sharp teeth, and a prominent spiky crest atop its head.

name: iron-valiant
description: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.
appearance: An elegant, bipedal humanoid robot with a white body and light blue-grey metallic plating, featuring a prominent pink bladed horn on its head, green glowing eyes, and sharp pink blade-like extensions on its elbows and hips.

name: koraidon
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: A large, muscular reptilian Pokémon with a vibrant red and deep purple scaled body, a prominent white feathery mane around its neck, white feathering on its limbs, and a large purple wheel-like throat sac and tail.

name: miraidon
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek, robotic reptilian Pokémon with a predominantly black and deep purple metallic body, featuring glowing light blue energy accents on its head, chest, and limbs, and large light blue jet engines integrated into its chest and tail.

name: walking-wake
description: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal blue reptilian Pokémon with white markings on its muzzle and belly, long red feather-like plumes on its head and back, and a flowing blue and white tail resembling crashing waves.

name: iron-leaves
description: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.
appearance: A slender, bipedal deer-like robot with a white and light blue metallic body, featuring glowing green blades for antlers, similar blades on its forearms and calves, and bright pink glowing eyes.

name: dipplin
description: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.
appearance: A shiny green apple with a red blush, coated in dripping white caramel, from which two small, green worm-like heads with pink cheeks and small red eyes peek out from the top.

name: poltchageist
description: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.
appearance: A small, dark green matcha tea caddy with a white and gold floral pattern, a gold lid, two glowing black eyes, and a visible crack on its side.

name: sinistcha
description: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.
appearance: A large, ornate dark green matcha tea bowl with a white and gold floral pattern, a gold whisk-like handle protruding from its top, two glowing black eyes, and a visible crack on its side.

name: okidogi
description: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.
appearance: A muscular, bipedal white-furred dog-like Pokémon with green fur on its forearms and lower legs, wearing a green collar adorned with pink beads, and a pink mask over its eyes, with pink chains draped around its shoulders.

name: munkidori
description: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.
appearance: A slender, bipedal white-furred monkey-like Pokémon with blue fur on its forearms and lower legs, wearing a blue collar adorned with pink beads, and a pink mask over its eyes, with pink chains draped around its shoulders.

name: fezandipiti
description: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.
appearance: An elegant, bipedal bird-like Pokémon with a predominantly white body adorned with vibrant purple and gold accents, featuring a purple mask around its red eyes, a tall purple feather plume and a smaller golden one on its head, a golden neck ring with a purple gem, and a long, flowing white tail with each feather tipped in purple.

name: ogerpon
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, slender green humanoid Pokémon with brown root-like feet, wearing a white horned ogre mask with red eyes, and holding a gnarled wooden club.

name: archaludon
description: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
appearance: A large bipedal grey metallic dragon with dark blue plating, a long neck and tail, whose forelegs arch upwards to form a bridge-like structure, featuring two large yellow 'headlights' on its chest and glowing yellow eyes.

name: hydrapple
description: Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander.
appearance: A large, glossy green apple body with a red blush, from which seven smaller green dragon heads, each with a small red mouth and yellow eyes, emerge, surrounded by a gooey white caramel-like substance.

name: gouging-fire
description: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal red and orange reptilian Pokémon with a long neck and tail, prominent yellow-tipped spikes on its back, a collar of brown scales, and fiery orange plumes erupting from its head and tail.

name: raging-bolt
description: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.
appearance: A tall, long-necked, quadrupedal dinosaur-like creature with a predominantly yellow body covered in jagged black stripes, a blue-grey cloud-like mane around its neck, red eyes, golden cuffs on its forelegs, and a long, bushy, storm cloud-like tail tipped with a lightning bolt.

name: iron-boulder
description: It resembles a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization.
appearance: A large, bipedal, metallic creature with a muscular, angular build, primarily light blue-grey on its head and forelegs, dark blue-grey on its chest and upper legs, four sharp horn-like projections on its head, and glowing orange energy lines tracing its face, chest, and limbs.

name: iron-crown
description: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal, metallic creature with a slender deer-like build, primarily light blue-grey on its head and upper body, dark blue-grey on its lower body and legs, a distinctive crown-like structure on its head, and glowing orange energy lines tracing its metallic plates.

name: terapagos
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
appearance: A small, four-legged, turtle-like creature with a light blue-green body, a large, ornate shell composed of numerous iridescent hexagonal crystal plates arranged in a rainbow gradient, each representing a different color, all centered around a prominent white crystalline core.

name: pecharunt
description: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
appearance: A small, round, peach-shaped creature with a white, slightly translucent body, small purple nubs for arms, yellow eyes with tiny white pupils, pink cheek marks, and a distinctive purple swirl cresting its head.

name: deoxys-attack
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: A slender, bipedal alien-like Pokemon with a predominantly red and blue body, featuring a large, pointed red head crest, blade-like red arms, two large black eyes with blue pupils, and a visible green brain-like organ in its translucent blue chest.

name: deoxys-defense
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: A bulky, bipedal alien-like Pokemon with a predominantly orange and blue body, featuring large, shield-like orange arms, broad shoulder plates, two large black eyes with blue pupils, and a visible green brain-like organ in its translucent blue chest.

name: deoxys-speed
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal alien-like Pokemon with a predominantly purple and blue body, featuring long, thin limbs, a streamlined head with a pointed crest, two large black eyes with blue pupils, and a visible green brain-like organ in its translucent blue chest.

name: wormadam-sandy
description: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
appearance: A brown, conical bag-like bug Pokemon composed of sandy material, featuring small yellow eyes, two short antennae, and a dark brown, circular opening at its bottom.

name: wormadam-trash
description: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
appearance: A gray, conical bag-like bug Pokemon composed of crumpled metallic or trash material, featuring small yellow eyes, two short antennae, and a dark gray, circular opening at its bottom.

name: shaymin-sky
description: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.
appearance: A white, quadrupedal hedgehog-like Pokemon with a green grass-like mane resembling a scarf, two delicate pink Gracidea flowers on its head, and small, expressive dark eyes.

name: giratina-origin
description: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.
appearance: A long, serpentine, golden and black bodied dragon-like Pokemon with six red-tipped spikes protruding from its back, three gold, wing-like appendages on each side, a gold helmet-like head with a single red eye, and two gold horns.

name: rotom-heat
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A fiery orange-red plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a red oven.

name: rotom-wash
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A light blue plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a blue washing machine.

name: rotom-frost
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A light blue plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a blue refrigerator-freezer.

name: rotom-fan
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A gray-white plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a gray electric fan.

name: rotom-mow
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A green plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a green lawnmower.

name: castform-sunny
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A white cloud-like Pokemon with a head resembling a bright red sun, featuring two small dark eyes and a faint mouth.

name: castform-rainy
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A white cloud-like Pokemon with a head resembling a blue rain cloud, featuring two small dark eyes and a faint mouth.

name: castform-snowy
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A white cloud-like Pokemon with a head resembling an icy blue snow cloud, featuring two small dark eyes and a faint mouth.

name: basculin-blue-striped
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
appearance: A green-bodied fish Pokemon with a prominent red snout, large yellow eyes, and distinctive horizontal blue stripes running along its sides.

name: darmanitan-zen
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: A large, dark blue, ape-like Pokemon with a stony texture, crossed arms over its chest, and a serene expression, featuring glowing yellow eyes and a slightly open mouth.

name: meloetta-pirouette
description: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.
appearance: A bipedal, dancer-like Pokemon with a white body, a black hair-like head crest, and orange skirt-like markings around its waist, featuring large blue eyes and a small mouth.

name: tornadus-therian
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.
appearance: A green, muscular, bipedal bird-like genie Pokemon with a white cloud lower body, a long, purple beak, and a green plume-like tail, featuring sharp yellow eyes and a white horn on its forehead.

name: thundurus-therian
description: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.
appearance: A blue, muscular, bipedal dragon-like genie Pokemon with a white cloud lower body, a prominent white horn on its forehead, and a long, purple, lightning-bolt-shaped tail, featuring sharp yellow eyes and a purple beak-like snout.

name: landorus-therian
description: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”
appearance: An orange, muscular, quadrupedal tiger-like genie Pokemon with a white cloud lower body, two prominent white horns on its head, and a long, brown, club-shaped tail, featuring sharp yellow eyes and a brown snout.

name: kyurem-black
description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
appearance: A bipedal, draconic Pokemon with a mostly gray, icy body, a prominent black left arm and shoulder, and a black, bipedal lower body, featuring a single bright yellow eye on its face.

name: kyurem-white
description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
appearance: A bipedal, draconic Pokemon with a mostly gray, icy body, a prominent white right arm and shoulder, and a white, bipedal lower body, featuring a single bright yellow eye on its face.

name: keldeo-resolute
description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.
appearance: A small, white, quadrupedal equine Pokemon with a long, blue mane and tail, and a distinctive orange sword-like horn on its forehead, featuring large blue eyes and a small mouth.

name: meowstic-female
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
appearance: A white and black bipedal feline-like Pokemon with a mostly white body, prominent black ear tufts, black markings around its blue eyes, and a white, curled tail, featuring a small mouth.

name: aegislash-blade
description: Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
appearance: A floating sword and shield Pokemon consisting of a golden hilt and dark gray blade, levitating behind a golden shield with a purple core, yellow eye-like markings, and a flowing purple ribbon-like arm.

name: pumpkaboo-small
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: A small, orange pumpkin-like Pokemon with a short, brown stem, small yellow eyes, and a small, triangular mouth, with a dark gray, ghost-like body peering from a hole in its back.

name: pumpkaboo-large
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: An orange, pumpkin-shaped creature with two stubby black arm-like protrusions, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, and a green, curly stem topped with a two-part leaf.

name: pumpkaboo-super
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: An orange, pumpkin-shaped creature with two stubby black arm-like protrusions, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, and a green, curly stem topped with a two-part leaf.

name: gourgeist-small
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A pink, pumpkin-shaped creature with a ruffled collar-like top, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, a short green stem with a two-part leaf, and two long, thin, black rope-like arms.

name: gourgeist-large
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A pink, pumpkin-shaped creature with a ruffled collar-like top, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, a short green stem with a two-part leaf, and two long, thin, black rope-like arms.

name: gourgeist-super
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A pink, pumpkin-shaped creature with a ruffled collar-like top, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, a short green stem with a two-part leaf, and two long, thin, black rope-like arms.

name: venusaur-mega
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
appearance: A massive, blue-green quadrupedal creature with a large, gnarled tree trunk supporting a huge pink flower and additional green foliage on its back, featuring a prominent dark green gem embedded in its forehead.

name: charizard-mega-x
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: A bipedal, dark gray, dragon-like creature with large, clawed wings featuring blue undersides, blue flames erupting from its mouth, and two sharp, backward-curving horns on its head.

name: charizard-mega-y
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: A bipedal, orange, dragon-like creature with a more streamlined body, two small horns on its head and a single, longer horn on its snout, large pointed wings with segmented thumb-claws, and prominent flame vents on its wrists.

name: blastoise-mega
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
appearance: A large, bipedal blue turtle with a massive, white shell on its back featuring a single, colossal black-barreled cannon in the center, flanked by two smaller ones, and two additional smaller cannons on its forearms.

name: alakazam-mega
description: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow fox-like creature with a long, flowing white beard and mustache, large red eyes, and a prominent red gem on its forehead, levitating five bent spoons around its body with two main spoons in its hands.

name: gengar-mega
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
appearance: A large, dark purple, spherical ghost-like creature with stubby limbs, a prominent jagged grin and glowing red eyes, featuring several sharp spikes protruding from its back and head, and an elongated tail.

name: kangaskhan-mega
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.
appearance: A large, bipedal, marsupial-like creature with light brown fur and a dark gray belly, now with its smaller, light brown baby, featuring red eyes and prominent fangs, standing protectively in front of it.

name: pinsir-mega
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.
appearance: A large, dark brown, beetle-like creature with powerful mandibles featuring golden spikes, large, segmented iridescent wings, and two prominent, sharp horns on its head.

name: gyarados-mega
description: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.
appearance: A massive, serpentine creature with a mostly blue body, a white belly, and large, red fins fanning from its head, dorsal side, and tail, featuring prominent yellow side fins and a fierce, toothy mouth with a red interior.

name: aerodactyl-mega
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.
appearance: A large, gray, reptilian creature with wide, bat-like wings and a long tail, featuring jagged, crystalline formations of various dark purple or blue hues protruding from its head, neck, and wings, and a fierce, toothy beak.

name: mewtwo-mega-x
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
appearance: A bipedal, purple and white humanoid creature with a heavily muscled physique, a prominent purple head crest, and a long, thin tail, featuring large, muscular arms and two large, dark purple protrusions on its shoulders.

name: mewtwo-mega-y
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
appearance: A slender, bipedal, white and purple humanoid creature with a large, elongated head, a prominent purple tail-like appendage extending from the back of its head, and a long, thin tail; its arms and legs are thin and delicate.

name: ampharos-mega
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.
appearance: A large, white, sheep-like creature with a long, wavy, pink fur mane and tail, featuring a prominent red gem on its forehead and two golden rings on its neck and tail, and three smaller golden rings on its forelegs.

name: scizor-mega
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
appearance: A bipedal, red, insectoid creature with a metallic body, large, sharp, pincer-like claws, and four transparent, iridescent wings resembling those of a dragonfly, featuring two dark gray spikes on its shoulders.

name: heracross-mega
description: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
appearance: A large, blue, bipedal beetle-like creature with a powerful, yellow, cross-shaped horn extending from its forehead, large black wings with blue undersides, and sharp claws on its hands and feet.

name: houndoom-mega
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
appearance: A bipedal, dark gray canine-like creature with large, curved horns and prominent bone-like protrusions from its back, neck, and tail, featuring fiery red rings around its ankles and a skull-like marking on its chest.

name: tyranitar-mega
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.
appearance: A massive, bipedal, green, dinosaur-like creature with heavy, rock-like armor plating, a prominent, spiky tail, and sharp claws, featuring two large red eyes and sharp teeth, with multiple red spikes protruding from its shoulders and back.

name: blaziken-mega
description: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this POKéMON’s wrists burn.
appearance: A bipedal, red and yellow, bird-like creature with large, muscular legs, fiery plumes erupting from its wrists, and two prominent, red, horn-like crests on its head, resembling a lean, agile fighter.

name: gardevoir-mega
description: GARDEVOIR has the ability to read the future. If it senses impending danger to its TRAINER, this POKéMON is said to unleash its psychokinetic energy at full power.
appearance: A slender, bipedal, white humanoid creature with a long, elegant gown-like body, long, flowing green hair, and a prominent red horn-like protrusion on its chest, with two large, white, translucent arm-fin-like structures.

name: mawile-mega
description: MAWHILE’s huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.
appearance: A small, bipedal humanoid creature with a black body, a yellow face featuring red eyes and a small mouth, and two massive, gaping, fanged jaws with yellow interiors that grow from the back of its head.

name: aggron-mega
description: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKéMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.
appearance: A massive, quadrupedal, dark gray creature covered in heavy, metallic armor plating, featuring sharp horns on its head, prominent red eyes, and a single, large, dark gray horn on its snout, with a spiky tail.

name: medicham-mega
description: It is said that through meditation, MEDICHAM heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This POKéMON hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains.
appearance: A bipedal, blue and red humanoid creature with a turban-like headpiece featuring two long, white, tentacle-like braids that extend downwards, and a prominent red oval marking on its chest, with sharp claws on its hands and feet.

name: manectric-mega
description: MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKéMON creates thunderclouds.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal, blue canine-like creature with a large, yellow, lightning bolt-shaped mane extending down its back and tail, and prominent yellow spikes on its forelegs and face, with red eyes.

name: banette-mega
description: BANETTE generates energy for laying strong curses by sticking pins into its own body. This POKéMON was originally a pitiful plush doll that was thrown away.
appearance: A ghostly, purple, humanoid puppet-like creature with a large, jagged zipper across its mouth, prominent red eyes, and three long, ribbon-like appendages flowing from its head, with a long, segmented tail that ends in a hand-like shape.

name: absol-mega
description: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKéMON.
appearance: A quadrupedal, white, feline-like creature with a long, flowing white mane, a prominent scythe-like dark blue horn extending from its head, and large, feathered dark blue wings on its back, with a single crescent-shaped blade on its tail.

name: garchomp-mega
description: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.
appearance: This large bipedal dragon-like Pokemon is predominantly dark blue with a red underside and red scythe-like protrusions on its arms, a red star on its chest, two large red horn-like features on its head, and two smaller red horns on its lower jaw, all while sporting yellow eyes and a mouth full of sharp teeth.

name: lucario-mega
description: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.
appearance: This lean, bipedal, canine-like Pokemon has a blue upper body and arms, black legs and torso, cream-colored markings on its thighs and chest, two long black dreadlock-like appendages extending from its head, red eyes, a black snout, and prominent red spikes on its hands and chest.

name: abomasnow-mega
description: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.
appearance: This massive ape-like Pokemon is covered in shaggy white fur, features a large green tree-like growth on its back that supports two huge ice shards forming an X, has four prominent green leaves on its head, and possesses red eyes with a small black nose.

name: floette-eternal
description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
appearance: This small, delicate humanoid Pokemon has white skin, a dark grey dress with a red stripe, black sleeves, black hair with a white cap-like feature, blue eyes, and holds a very large black flower with striking red petal tips and a yellow pistil.

name: latias-mega
description: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this POKéMON ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe.
appearance: This sleek, white avian-dragon Pokemon has large red wings, red streaks on its back and tail, a single prominent white horn on its forehead, red triangular ear-like fins, a light blue pentagonal marking on its chest, and light blue eyes.

name: latios-mega
description: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKéMON is intelligent and understands human speech.
appearance: This sleek, white avian-dragon Pokemon has large blue wings, blue streaks on its back and tail, a single prominent white horn on its forehead, blue triangular ear-like fins, a light green pentagonal marking on its chest, and light green eyes.

name: swampert-mega
description: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKéMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.
appearance: This bulky, bipedal, blue-grey amphibian Pokemon exhibits extremely muscular limbs with two large black fins on its forearms, a single prominent orange fin on its head, an orange tail fin, orange gills on its cheeks, and orange eyes with black pupils.

name: sceptile-mega
description: The leaves growing on SCEPTILE’s body are very sharp edged. This POKéMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.
appearance: This lean, reptilian bipedal Pokemon is green with a yellow belly, red markings on its neck and chest, prominent leaf-like blades on its arms, a long green tail tipped with a Christmas tree-like structure adorned with red orbs, and yellow eyes.

name: sableye-mega
description: SABLEYE lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these POKéMON are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness.
appearance: This small, purple goblin-like Pokemon is mostly hidden behind a massive, translucent red crystal shield with gold-colored facets, revealing large glowing red eyes, a red gem on its forehead, and a wide grin with sharp teeth.

name: altaria-mega
description: ALTARIA dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this POKéMON makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.
appearance: This graceful bird-like Pokemon is almost entirely enveloped in massive, soft white clouds of down, from which a small blue head with red eyes and a tiny yellow beak emerges, complemented by two long feathery white tendrils behind its head.

name: gallade-mega
description: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.
appearance: This white humanoid knight-like Pokemon features a green helmet-like head with a red crest, black lower body and legs, green chest armor, large red blade-like extensions on its elbows, a red spike on its chest, and light blue eyes.

name: audino-mega
description: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.
appearance: This fluffy white rabbit-like Pokemon has a large pink bow on its head, two very long white ears with pink tips, a soft pink neck collar, two large gold-tipped earfeelers, and two white wing-like appendages on its back with pink undersides and gold markings, all while displaying light blue eyes and a pink nose.

name: sharpedo-mega
description: Nicknamed “the bully of the sea,” SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKéMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.
appearance: This dark blue torpedo-shaped shark Pokemon has a jagged white belly, red markings around its massive mouth and on its dorsal fin, four prominent yellow spikes on its nose, two yellow spikes above each black eye, and large yellow gill markings.

name: slowbro-mega
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
appearance: This pink bipedal Pokemon has its entire lower body encased by a massive, grey Shellder with a spiral pattern and black eyes, leaving only its pink upper body and head with red eyes, a small snout, and tiny mouth visible.

name: steelix-mega
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
appearance: This enormous grey serpentine Pokemon is composed of metallic segments, covered in numerous crystalline yellow spikes, features two prominent yellow jaw spikes, blue eyes, and is encircled by a ring of small floating blue rock shards around its neck.

name: pidgeot-mega
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.
appearance: This large brown bird Pokemon features a cream belly and leg feathers, long red tail feathers, a massive yellow crest with red tips extending backwards from its head, and possesses sharp red eyes and a short yellow beak.

name: glalie-mega
description: GLALIE has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This POKéMON has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires.
appearance: This large dark grey spherical Pokemon is covered in sharp ice spikes, characterized by a massive lower jaw of ice with sharp teeth, two prominent ice horns on its head, a large yellow 'scar' marking across its left red eye, and another red eye on the right.

name: diancie-mega
description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.
appearance: This small, white crystal humanoid Pokemon resembles a princess with a pink gown, a large pink diamond on its head, two large floating red crystal ribbons on its back, a small black skirt, a tiara-like arrangement of small white crystals, and pink eyes.

name: metagross-mega
description: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.
appearance: This immense blue metallic quad-legged robotic Pokemon, formed from four Metang, features four long grey metallic legs ending in sharp points, a large red 'X' marking across its face, four red eyes, a prominent yellow orb on its forehead, and a yellow spike protruding from its lower jaw.

name: kyogre-primal
description: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKéMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.
appearance: This colossal dark blue whale-like Pokemon features luminous light blue lines patterned across its skin, large glowing yellow orbs on its fins and tail, a distinct red glowing symbol on its forehead, and bright yellow eyes.

name: groudon-primal
description: GROUDON has long been described in  mythology as the POKéMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKéMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.
appearance: This immense red dinosaur-like quadrupedal Pokemon has black markings on its underside, glowing yellow lines patterned across its skin, large black claws, distinct orange glowing magma-like markings on its body, yellow eyes, and black stripes on its face.

name: rayquaza-mega
description: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth’s ozone layer,  never descending to the ground. This POKéMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.
appearance: This extraordinarily long green serpentine dragon Pokemon is adorned with black markings, possesses two long gold glowing tendrils originating from its jaw and extending backwards, golden crescent shapes on its head and body, and has piercing red eyes.

name: pikachu-rock-star
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a fluffy red wig with a gold star hairpin, a black studded vest, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a black lightning bolt tail.

name: pikachu-belle
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a light blue formal gown with white frills, a matching light blue bow on its head, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a heart-shaped tail.

name: pikachu-pop-star
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a pink ruffled dress, a matching pink bow with a microphone on its head, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a star-shaped tail tip.

name: pikachu-phd
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a black academic gown and a grey mortarboard cap with a yellow tassel, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a lightning bolt tail.

name: pikachu-libre
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a blue luchador mask with red trim and white eye markings, a red and blue wrestling costume with white accents, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a lightning bolt tail.

name: pikachu-cosplay
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a distinct black heart-shaped tip at the end of its tail, indicating its nature as a dress-up performer.

name: hoopa-unbound
description: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.
appearance: This massive purple humanoid genie-like Pokemon has six powerful arms adorned with gold bracelets, a black lower torso and legs, a gold ring around its waist, a long black ponytail-like feature, dark blue eyes, a large pink jewel on its forehead, and several large gold rings floating around its body, displaying a wide menacing mouth with teeth.

name: camerupt-mega
description: CAMERUPT has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this POKéMON’s back erupt, spewing the superheated magma.
appearance: This large red camel-like quadrupedal Pokemon has a black underside and legs, its two dorsal humps replaced by a single large black volcano with orange magma flowing from the top, large grey rock-like growths on its back and knees, and a black face with red eyes.

name: lopunny-mega
description: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.
appearance: A slender, bipedal, rabbit-like Pokemon with brown fur, long cream-colored ears tipped with pink fluff, a large cream-colored ruff around its neck, and long dark brown ear-like tufts extending from its hips to its ankles, ending in pink puffs; it has large red eyes and a small nose.

name: salamence-mega
description: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this POKéMON’s cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings.
appearance: A massive, quadrupedal blue dragon whose large, crescent-shaped red wings have fused into an armored shell on its back with a white indentation, possessing a white belly, a pointed snout, a small mouth, and two short horns on its head.

name: beedrill-mega
description: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.
appearance: An insectoid Pokemon with a yellow and black striped body, large, sharp dark brown stingers replacing its forearms and on its tail, and four narrow, clear wings on its back; it has red eyes and a black, pointed mouthpart.

name: rattata-alola
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal rodent with primarily black fur, a lighter purple belly, and a prominent tuft of purple fur on its head; it has large ears, red eyes, a small pink nose, and visible fangs.

name: raticate-alola
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
appearance: A stout, bipedal rodent with dark gray fur, a cream-colored belly, and large, rounded cheeks; it has wide, pink-lined ears, red eyes, a small pink nose, and two prominent yellow incisors protruding from its upper jaw.

name: raticate-totem-alola
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
appearance: A stout, bipedal rodent with dark gray fur, a cream-colored belly, and large, rounded cheeks; it has wide, pink-lined ears, red eyes, a small pink nose, and two prominent yellow incisors protruding from its upper jaw, appearing visually identical to standard Alolan Raticate.

name: pikachu-original-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a red and white baseball cap with a green symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: pikachu-hoenn-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white and green baseball cap with a black symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: pikachu-sinnoh-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white and black baseball cap with a blue rim and a green 'P' symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: pikachu-unova-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white and red baseball cap with a blue front and a small blue 'P' symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: pikachu-kalos-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white and black baseball cap with a blue bill and a white 'P' symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: pikachu-alola-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white baseball cap with a yellow bill and a large black stripe on the front; it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: raichu-alola
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: A bipedal, light brown rodent with a white belly, large light blue eyes, and long, pointed ears that are white on the inside and tipped with brown; its tail is yellow and ends in a large, rounded, flat disc, and it has a small black nose and mouth.

name: sandshrew-alola
description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light blue armadillo-like Pokemon covered in icy-blue plates, with a white belly and white claws; it has small black eyes and no visible mouth.

name: sandslash-alola
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.
appearance: A bipedal, light blue armadillo-like Pokemon covered in large, sharp icy-blue spines on its back and head, with a white belly, white claws, and a single large horn on its forehead; it has small black eyes and no visible mouth.

name: vulpix-alola
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal fox with white fur, a light blue body, six white fluffy tails, and a prominent light blue forelock on its head; it has large blue eyes, a tiny black nose, and a small mouth.

name: ninetales-alola
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.
appearance: An elegant, quadrupedal fox with slender, white fur, a light blue body, nine long, flowing white tails, and light blue accents on its ear tips and forelock; it has large blue eyes, a tiny black nose, and a small mouth.

name: diglett-alola
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.
appearance: A small, cylindrical creature with a dark brown, metallic body and three prominent blonde hair-like strands on its head; it has a pink nose and two small eyes, but no visible mouth.

name: dugtrio-alola
description: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.
appearance: Three cylindrical creatures with dark brown, metallic bodies emerging from the ground, each sporting three prominent blonde hair-like strands on their heads; they each have pink noses and two small eyes, but no visible mouths.

name: meowth-alola
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal cat with dark gray fur, cream-colored paws and face, and a distinctive gold coin-like emblem on its forehead; it has large, narrow red eyes and a small mouth with visible fangs.

name: persian-alola
description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.
appearance: A regal, quadrupedal cat with sleek, dark gray fur, a cream-colored muzzle, and a large, rounded head featuring a prominent cream-colored gem-like orb on its forehead; it has narrowed blue eyes and a small mouth with visible fangs.

name: geodude-alola
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.
appearance: A small, rounded rock-like creature with a gray, metallic body, two muscular arms ending in three-digit hands, and a thick tuft of black, metallic hair on its head; it has two large, glowing yellow eyes and a small mouth.

name: graveler-alola
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.
appearance: A multi-limbed, gray, metallic rock creature with four arms, two on its upper body and two on its lower body, each ending in three-fingered hands, and a prominent tuft of black, metallic hair on its head; it has two large, glowing yellow eyes and a small mouth.

name: golem-alola
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal, gray, metallic rock creature with a cannon-like appendage on its back, a prominent tuft of black, metallic hair on its head, and two large arms with three-fingered hands; it has two large, glowing yellow eyes and a small mouth.

name: grimer-alola
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.
appearance: A dark gray, amorphous sludge creature with large, green crystal-like growths on its body, particularly around its base and on its back; it has large, glowing green eyes and a perpetually open mouth with a green tongue.

name: muk-alola
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.
appearance: A large, amorphous sludge creature with a dark gray and purple body, covered in numerous, sharp, iridescent crystal-like growths, especially on its back, head, and 'fingers'; it has large, glowing green eyes and a perpetually open mouth with a green tongue.

name: exeggutor-alola
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
appearance: A very tall, palm tree-like Pokemon with a long, segmented brown neck, four distinct heads (three light green and one light brown at the tail-tip) each with two black eyes, a pink nose, and a small mouth, crowned with large green leaves.

name: marowak-alola
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
appearance: A bipedal, dark brown reptile-like Pokemon with a skull covering its head, featuring a prominent horn, orange tribal markings on its body, and glowing blue eyes, always wielding a flaming bone club.

name: greninja-battle-bond
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: A lean, bipedal, dark blue frog-like ninja Pokemon with a long, pink tongue wrapped around its neck like a scarf, white shuriken-like markings on its thighs, and a large red shuriken formed from water on its back, with prominent red markings above its yellow eyes and a larger blue fin on its head.

name: greninja-ash
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: A bipedal, dark blue frog-like ninja Pokemon characterized by a long, pink tongue wrapped around its neck, white shuriken-like growths on its thighs, a large red shuriken made of water on its back, and distinct red markings above its yellow eyes with an enlarged blue head fin, appearing visually identical to Battle Bond Greninja.

name: zygarde-10-power-construct
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This serpentine Pokémon is composed of interlocking hexagonal segments, featuring a white head with a black faceplate and a single red hexagonal eye, an emerald green spine pattern over a black body, and two small green fins on its head.

name: zygarde-50-power-construct
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This canine-serpentine Pokémon has an upper body resembling a black dog with emerald green accents and white hexagonal chest markings, a lower serpentine body of black and green segments, a white head with black markings, and a single red hexagonal eye, topped with two large, emerald green fin-like protrusions on its back.

name: zygarde-complete
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This large, humanoid Pokémon is a composite of hexagonal segments, featuring a black body with emerald green and teal limbs, a white head with black markings and a single red hexagonal eye, a prominent red hexagonal core on its chest, and large, asymmetrical emerald green and teal wing-like structures on its back.

name: gumshoos-totem
description: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.
appearance: This mustelid-like Pokémon has a stocky, yellow-tan body with darker brown patches on its back and limbs, a prominent, long, orange-brown mane of fur combed back over its head and neck, and a small pink mouth with large, dark, round eyes.

name: vikavolt-totem
description: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.
appearance: This beetle-like Pokémon features a dark blue-grey body with segmented yellow legs, a yellow face with two prominent red cylindrical eyes, and large yellow mandibles tipped with red that extend from its head, complemented by jagged yellow wing-like structures on its back.

name: oricorio-pom-pom
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: This avian Pokémon has a slender yellow body with black wingtips and tail feathers, a black crest on its head from which two white pom-pom structures extend, and a small black beak with black eyes that have white pupils.

name: oricorio-pau
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: This avian Pokémon has a slender pink body with black wingtips and tail feathers, a pink flower-like crest with a black center on its head, and a small black beak with black eyes that have white pupils.

name: oricorio-sensu
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: This avian Pokémon has a slender purple body with black wingtips and tail feathers, a purple fan-like crest with white tips on its head, and a small black beak with black eyes that have white pupils.

name: lycanroc-midnight
description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
appearance: This bipedal, wolf-like Pokémon has a dark red-brown body covered in shaggy fur, a lighter muzzle, chest, and tail tip, bright red eyes, and a wild mane of fur around its neck and shoulders, with several fur spikes protruding from its back, often displaying a snarl revealing pointed teeth.

name: wishiwashi-school
description: When it’s in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies.
appearance: This large, torpedo-shaped fish is a collective of many smaller fish, forming a dark blue body with lighter blue fin-like structures on its back and tail, large glowing yellow eyes made of clustered smaller fish, and a distinctive yellow ring marking encircling its lower body.

name: lurantis-totem
description: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis’s vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.
appearance: This insectoid Pokémon resembles a pink praying mantis with a green, leafy cape-like structure on its back, two large green blade-like forearms with orange tips, large white insectoid eyes with small black pupils, and a small black mouth.

name: salazzle-totem
description: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.
appearance: This sleek, reptilian Pokémon has a predominantly black body with striking fuchsia markings around its yellow eyes with black pupils, fuchsia stripes on its limbs and whip-like tail, and two fuchsia horn-like protrusions on its head.

name: minior-orange-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner orange core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-yellow-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner yellow core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-green-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner green core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-blue-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner blue core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-indigo-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner indigo core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-violet-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner violet core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-red
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical red core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two red wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby red limbs.

name: minior-orange
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical orange core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two orange wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby orange limbs.

name: minior-yellow
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical yellow core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two yellow wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby yellow limbs.

name: minior-green
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical green core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two green wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby green limbs.

name: minior-blue
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical blue core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two blue wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby blue limbs.

name: minior-indigo
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical indigo core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two indigo wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby indigo limbs.

name: minior-violet
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This Pokémon has a smooth, spherical violet core body with two large, white, rectangular eyes containing small black pupils, a small black open mouth, two violet wing-like protrusions on its back, and small, stubby violet limbs.

name: mimikyu-busted
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: This Pokémon features a tattered, off-white, Pikachu-like disguise with crudely drawn black eyes and red cheek blushes, its neck visibly broken to reveal a dark grey, shadowy, blob-like body beneath with two small, glowing red eyes and a dark stick-like neck.

name: mimikyu-totem-disguised
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: This Pokémon is entirely concealed by a large, pristine, off-white, Pikachu-like disguise with crudely drawn black eyes and red cheek blushes, featuring upright black-tipped ears and a stick-like tail protruding from its back.

name: mimikyu-totem-busted
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: This Pokémon is largely covered by a large, tattered, off-white, Pikachu-like disguise with crudely drawn black eyes and red cheek blushes, its broken and bent neck revealing a dark grey, shadowy, blob-like body with two small, glowing red eyes and a dark stick-like neck beneath.

name: kommo-o-totem
description: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.
appearance: This bipedal, dragon-like Pokémon has a dark grey body with a lighter grey underside, a yellow snout, two prominent yellow scales covering its black slit eyes, and several large, red-orange metallic scales adorning its head, forearms, and tail, with a distinctive ring around its neck.

name: magearna-original
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: This humanoid, metallic, doll-like Pokémon is primarily silver with a white skirt-like lower body, featuring a red floral pattern on its chest, a large gold gear on its back, gold trim on its skirt, and a silver head with two large, white, circular eyes with black pupils, a small mouth, and two flower-like protrusions resembling bunny ears.

name: pikachu-partner-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow, mouse-like Pokémon has red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, and two brown stripes on its back, a lightning bolt-shaped tail, and wears a red and white baseball cap with a blue brim.

name: marowak-totem
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
appearance: This bipedal, dark brown, reptilian Pokémon wields a bony club tipped with green flames and wears a bone skull mask, with additional green flame-like markings on its head and back, appearing larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

name: ribombee-totem
description: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.
appearance: This small, yellow and white insectoid Pokémon has large black eyes, two yellow antennae, two small black wings, a large white collar, and yellow scarf-like markings, appearing notably larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

name: rockruff-own-tempo
description: It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.
appearance: This puppy-like Pokémon has brown fur with a lighter brown muzzle and belly, a shaggy mane of spiky brown fur, blue eyes, and a short fluffy tail, distinguished by its unique triangular orange-red pupils.

name: lycanroc-dusk
description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
appearance: This quadrupedal, dog-like Pokémon has orange-brown fur with a white underside and muzzle, green eyes, a shaggy mane of spiky orange-brown fur with a small white rock at the base of its neck, and a bushy tail.

name: araquanid-totem
description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.
appearance: This large, spider-like Pokémon has a dark blue body with a light blue underside, four long legs, two large black eyes, and a prominent clear water bubble encasing its head, appearing larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

name: togedemaru-totem
description: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.
appearance: This small, spherical, gray Pokémon has a white face and belly, small black eyes, pink cheek pouches, a spiky collar of yellow and black metal, and a yellow tail ending in a lightning bolt shape, appearing larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

name: necrozma-dusk
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: This large, dark gray crystalline humanoid has a pointed head, sharp claws, and a broad chest, distinguished by an ornate yellow, orange, and red armor-like structure that resembles Solgaleo around its upper body, head, and arms, with sharp red eyes and a visible mouth.

name: necrozma-dawn
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: This large, dark gray crystalline humanoid has a pointed head, sharp claws, and a broad chest, distinguished by an ornate blue, purple, and yellow armor-like structure that resembles Lunala around its upper body, head, and arms, with sharp red eyes and a visible mouth.

name: necrozma-ultra
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: This massive, glowing white crystalline dragon-like being features a central dark core, six large wings made of light, a long serpentine neck, sharp red eyes, and emanates a rainbow-colored aura from its body and head, which has a prominent red crystal at its tip and no discernible mouth.

name: pikachu-starter
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow, mouse-like Pokémon has red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, two brown stripes on its back, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail, characterized by slightly softer, more rounded features compared to other Pikachus.

name: eevee-starter
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
appearance: This quadrupedal, fox-like Pokémon has light brown fur, a fluffy cream-colored collar, a long bushy cream-tipped tail, large dark eyes, and a small dark nose, characterized by slightly softer, more rounded features compared to other Eevees.

name: pikachu-world-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow, mouse-like Pokémon has red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, two brown stripes on its back, a lightning bolt-shaped tail, and wears a white baseball cap with a red brim and a stylized blue 'W' on the front.

name: meowth-galar
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: This bipedal feline has shaggy, dark gray fur with a lighter gray belly, prominent black claws, green eyes, a large gold coin on its forehead, and a long, thin tail ending in a small tuft.

name: ponyta-galar
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.
appearance: This quadrupedal unicorn-like creature has a white body, a long flowing light blue mane and tail with purple and pink accents, large blue eyes, and a pointed blue horn on its forehead.

name: rapidash-galar
description: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.
appearance: This quadrupedal unicorn-like creature has a white body, a long flowing light blue mane and tail with purple and pink accents, a prominent pointed horn spiraling white and blue on its forehead, and large blue eyes.

name: slowpoke-galar
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
appearance: This pink, bipedal hippopotamus-like creature has a yellow patch on its head and two large yellow patches on its lower back/tail base, small black eyes, a round pink nose, and a perpetually vacant expression.

name: slowbro-galar
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
appearance: This bipedal pink creature features a large gray shell-like organism (Shellder) biting its right arm, which now has a dark gray tip, while its head is yellow with pink patches, small black eyes, a pink nose, and a perpetually vacant expression.

name: farfetchd-galar
description: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.
appearance: This bipedal duck-like bird has brown feathers, a cream-colored belly, a small white oval on its forehead, black eyes, a yellow beak, and brandishes a large green leek as a weapon, maintaining a perpetually stern expression.

name: weezing-galar
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
appearance: This gray, spherical creature consists of two heads resembling top hats, one larger than the other, both adorned with green and black smokestacks and brown 'mustaches' of smoke, featuring pink 'eyes', a dark gray body band, and a dark gray base.

name: mr-mime-galar
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
appearance: This bipedal, human-like creature has a pale blue-white body, light blue and dark blue stripes on its belly and legs, a red nose, a white hat-like growth on its head, light blue hands and feet, and a perpetually cheerful expression.

name: articuno-galar
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
appearance: This large, elegant bird has a predominantly purple body, long flowing dark purple tail feathers, pointed light blue wings, and a prominent mask-like face with a sharp pink beak and yellow eyes, conveying a stern expression.

name: zapdos-galar
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
appearance: This large, powerful bird has a predominantly orange body, muscular black legs, black-tipped yellow wings, a sharp yellow beak, and black eyes with distinct black markings around its eyes and on its chest, giving it an aggressive appearance.

name: moltres-galar
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.
appearance: This large, dark bird has a predominantly black body, flowing red-orange 'flame' feathers on its head and tail, powerful red-orange wings, a sharp black beak, and red eyes with prominent black markings around its eyes, giving it an intimidating expression.

name: slowking-galar
description: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
appearance: This pink, bipedal creature wears a large gray shell (Shellder) on its head with yellow swirls and a purple gem-like growth on its forehead, a purple frilled collar, a yellow face with black eyes, a small pink nose, and often appears thoughtful.

name: corsola-galar
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.
appearance: This white, ghost-like coral creature has a translucent appearance, two small pink eyes, a sad expression, and features two short branches on its head and four on its back, all ending in rounded nubs.

name: zigzagoon-galar
description: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKéMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.
