appearance: This small, badger-like quadruped has white and black fur forming jagged stripes across its body, a black mask-like marking around its eyes, a pink nose, and a small, pointed tail.

name: linoone-galar
description: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKéMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.
appearance: This bipedal badger-like creature has white and black fur forming jagged stripes across its body, prominent black claws, a black mask-like marking around its eyes, and a long, pointed tail.

name: darumaka-galar
description: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.
appearance: This small, white, snowman-like creature has a dark blue belly and feet, a red head with a prominent black 'eyebrow' marking, two pointed ice-like growths on its head, and a visible mouth.

name: darmanitan-galar-standard
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: This large, white, ape-like creature has a dark blue belly and feet, a wide red mouth, a prominent red 'eyebrow' marking above its eyes, two large, pointed ice-like growths on its head, and ice-like fur around its neck.

name: darmanitan-galar-zen
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: This round, white, snowman-like body features a reddish-orange head emerging from the top, which has a large, toothy, black-lined mouth with glowing white teeth and a single orange pupil in each red eye, while dark blue, spiral-shaped ice covers its white chest and its hands glow with orange energy.

name: yamask-galar
description: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.
appearance: This slender, black, shadowy body, reminiscent of a spirit, features two small, glowing red eyes on its black head and a subtle upward curve for its mouth, while it holds a cracked, rectangular, light gray ancient shield-like object adorned with faint purple symbols.

name: stunfisk-galar
description: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.
appearance: This flat, circular, brownish-gray body, resembling a bear trap, features a large, wide, orange-lined mouth with prominent white teeth that resemble spikes, two small black beady eyes above its mouth, and two thin orange-tipped antenna-like appendages sprouting from its top, all while its back is patterned with three concentric brown rings.

name: zygarde-10
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This canine-like body, primarily dark green and black, is covered in a lighter green hexagonal pattern, featuring two small black eyes with white pupils on its green head, no visible mouth, and two short, pointed green protrusions on either side of its head with a large black spike pointing backward from its crown.

name: cramorant-gulping
description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
appearance: This dark blue, cormorant-like bird with a white belly and yellow beak and feet features two large, round white eyes with small black pupils and a long, pointed yellow beak, out of which the tailfin of a yellow Arrokuda fish prominently protrudes, having been swallowed headfirst into its throat.

name: cramorant-gorging
description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
appearance: This dark blue, cormorant-like bird with a white belly and yellow beak and feet features two large, round white eyes with small black pupils and a long, pointed yellow beak, out of which the tail and ears of a yellow Pikachu prominently protrude, having been swallowed headfirst into its throat.

name: toxtricity-low-key
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: This slender, bipedal, reptilian body with a dark blue and purple color scheme features a light yellow zigzag pattern on its chest, two yellow pointed ear-like structures atop its head, purple 'sweatband' markings around its forearms, four purple spines protruding from its back, and two glowing yellow eyes with purple pupils above a subtle black mouth.

name: eiscue-noice
description: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
appearance: This small, penguin-like body is light blue with a white face and belly, featuring two small, black, beady eyes set in its white face, a small yellow pointed beak-like mouth, and a single light blue strand of hair-like ice flopping over its forehead, all while its flippers are light blue and its feet are yellow.

name: indeedee-female
description: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.
appearance: This bipedal humanoid form with a white, dark blue, and light blue color scheme features a large, white, heart-shaped pattern covering its chest and belly bordered by light blue, dark blue arms ending in white hands, two large blue eyes with black pupils and prominent dark blue eyelashes, a small delicate mouth, and two horn-like dark blue antennae curving from its head.

name: morpeko-hangry
description: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.
appearance: This small, rodent-like body is predominantly dark purple and black with matted, spiky fur, featuring a horizontal black stripe across its belly that glows red with energy, dark purple flushed cheeks with a single red spot, narrow and angry eyes with a red iris, and a tight frown for a mouth, while it clutches a glowing red berry in its paws.

name: zacian-crowned
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.
appearance: This large, quadrupedal wolf-like body with light blue and white fur is adorned with golden armor plating resembling a crown on its head and a collar around its neck and forelegs, features piercing blue eyes, and clasps a large, ornate golden sword with a blue gem firmly in its mouth, all while its mane and tail flow long with gold highlights.

name: zamazenta-crowned
description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.
appearance: This large, quadrupedal wolf-like body with red and white fur is adorned with a massive, golden, shield-shaped mane around its head and neck, features fierce red eyes, and has golden armor plating covering its forelegs and chest, all while its fur is long and flowing with red and white highlights.

name: eternatus-eternamax
description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.
appearance: Its colossal, skeletal, serpent-like body, composed of black and purple bone-like structures, is massively elongated and distorted, surrounded by swirling red-pink energy that also forms vast, jagged wings and two enormous hand-like appendages extending from a pulsing thorny core on its chest, all while its head features two glowing red eyes and a menacing, fanged mouth.

name: urshifu-rapid-strike
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: This bipedal, bear-like humanoid with a strong, athletic build features dark gray fur with white fur on its chest and face, prominent light blue eyebrows and a blue stripe on its nose, two short blue horns extending from the sides of its head, a long flowing white beard and mustache-like fur, and blue-tipped hands and feet adorned with blue arm and leg bands.

name: zarude-dada
description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.
appearance: This large, bipedal ape-like body is covered in dark fur, featuring a bright pinkish-red cape-like marking draped over its shoulders and chest, piercing yellow eyes, large fangs, and a green vine wrapped around its arm extending to a leaf at its elbow, all while its fur is spiky around its head and shoulders.

name: calyrex-ice
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
appearance: This form features a small, white, humanoid Calyrex with a large head and golden crown with green gems, large green eyes, and a simple mouth, riding atop a majestic, white and light blue equine Glastrier that boasts a large white mane and tail, deep blue hooves, and prominent ice protrusions on its head and jaw.

name: calyrex-shadow
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
appearance: This form features a small, white, humanoid Calyrex with a large head and golden crown with green gems, large green eyes, and a simple mouth, riding atop a swift, black and purple equine Spectrier that boasts a long, flowing purple mane and tail, black hooves, and spectral white markings around its eyes and muzzle.

name: venusaur-gmax
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
appearance: This colossal, reptilian body, with green skin and dark green splotches, features a massively enlarged pink-red flower with green leaves on its back that glows with intense energy and sprouts immense, thorny vines, while it has two large, dark red eyes and a wide mouth with visible fangs.

name: charizard-gmax
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: This colossal, draconic body, with orange skin and a cream belly, features immensely larger wings that glow with intense, fiery energy, appearing as pure flame at the tips, while its horns and tail flame also intensify, its eyes glow red-orange, and smoke billows from its mouth.

name: blastoise-gmax
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
appearance: This colossal, turtle-like body, with blue skin and a cream belly, features a shell transformed into a massive, multi-barreled water cannon with numerous glowing light blue nozzles, while water swirls intensely around its powerful legs and tail and its eyes glow with blue energy.

name: butterfree-gmax
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
appearance: This colossal, insectoid body, with a light purple body and blue compound eyes, features immensely large, white wings covered in vibrant, iridescent purple scales that glow and shimmer, shedding sparkling powder, and greatly elongated antennae that glow with energy.

name: pikachu-gmax
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This extremely elongated and plump, spherical Pikachu body, with yellow fur, red cheeks, black ear tips, and brown stripes, features a massive, jagged lightning bolt tail glowing with electric energy, along with signature red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, and narrow, determined eyes.

name: meowth-gmax
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: This extremely elongated, almost serpentine cat-like body, with cream fur and brown stripes, features a notably stretched form, an immensely larger signature gold coin on its forehead, narrow eyes, a mischievous grin for a mouth, and prominent whiskers.

name: machamp-gmax
description: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.
appearance: This colossal, muscular, bipedal humanoid body, with gray skin, a red 'belt' marking, and yellow eyes, features four powerful arms ending in massive, glowing red fists that pulse with energy, along with prominent brow ridges that enhance its intense expression.

name: gengar-gmax
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
appearance: This colossal, round, shadowy body, with dark purple skin, red eyes, and white fangs, features its lower half shrouded in a swirling, dark purple-black void out of which its massive upper body emerges, all while its eyes glow fiercely red, its wide mouth reveals numerous sharp white fangs, and its spiky back is more pronounced.

name: kingler-gmax
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.
appearance: This colossal, crab-like body, with a red shell and cream belly, features an immensely larger right claw covered in glowing, hardened white foam that resembles solidified bubbles, while its left claw is normal-sized, and it has large, stalked eyes and a dark slit for a mouth.

name: lapras-gmax
description: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.
appearance: This colossal, plesiosaur-like body, with blue skin and a cream belly, features a shell transformed into an enormous, multi-tiered iceberg-like structure adorned with glowing, ethereal musical notes, while water swirls around its neck and fins, and it has large, gentle eyes and a slight smile for a mouth.

name: eevee-gmax
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
appearance: This colossal, canine-like body, with brown fur, dark brown paws, and black eyes, features incredibly voluminous fur, especially around its neck, forming a massive, fluffy cream-colored ruff, and an exceptionally large, bushy cream-tipped tail, all while its small, delicate mouth is barely visible amidst the fur.

name: snorlax-gmax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
appearance: This colossal, bear-like body, with dark blue-green fur and a cream belly, features a massive belly that has become a miniature landscape, covered in green grass and sprouting a full-grown, dark green tree with brown bark, while its eyes are mostly closed in a sleepy expression and its small mouth is slightly open.

name: garbodor-gmax
description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.
appearance: This colossal, amorphous, trash-pile-like body, primarily dark green and gray, is an enormous, towering pile of diverse urban waste, including building fragments, vehicles, and tires, forming a grotesque, towering cityscape, while its eyes glow red and its fanged mouth is wide open, leaking purple sludge.

name: melmetal-gmax
description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
appearance: Melmetal-Gmax is a colossal, silver-grey humanoid golem made of metallic nuts and bolts, with a massive right arm ending in a blunt fist, and a prominent orange-glowing hexagonal nut on its chest, alongside two wide, rectangular yellow-orange eyes.

name: rillaboom-gmax
description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.
appearance: Rillaboom-Gmax is a gigantic, muscular green gorilla with a blonde pompadour, a prominent dark brown wood-like chest and legs, and a towering, three-tiered orange-yellow glowing drum tree formed from its original drum, which it wields with large, leafy drumsticks.

name: cinderace-gmax
description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.
appearance: Cinderace-Gmax is a tall, white bipedal rabbit with orange-tipped ears, wrists, and feet, a yellow-orange chest pattern, and red eyes, standing dynamically on one foot atop a colossal, flaming dark red Pyro Ball emitting intense blue and orange flames.

name: inteleon-gmax
description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
appearance: Inteleon-Gmax is a slender, blue bipedal chameleon with black and yellow accents, purple eyes, and a whip-like tail that forms an immense, spiraling transparent water tower, poised with its right hand extended like a sniper.

name: corviknight-gmax
description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.
appearance: Corviknight-Gmax is a massive, metallic black raven-like bird encased in segmented, sharp armor, featuring glowing red eyes, a sharp silver beak, and broad wings that generate a powerful dark-blue gale around its form.

name: orbeetle-gmax
description: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.
appearance: Orbeetle-Gmax is a colossal, disc-shaped ladybug-like Pokemon with a metallic red shell on its back and two large, pointed wings, a small black head with yellow compound eyes, surrounded by multiple glowing blue, purple, and pink concentric energy rings.

name: drednaw-gmax
description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.
appearance: Drednaw-Gmax is a gigantic, bipedal snapping turtle with a dark green and brown patterned shell that transforms into a massive, jagged, rock-like mountain covered in white foamy water, a strong yellow-brown beak, and intense red eyes.

name: coalossal-gmax
description: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: Coalossal-Gmax is a towering, dark grey coal monster with a red-orange rocky face, glowing yellow eyes, and a prominent chin spike, its body covered in burning veins of coal and rock, and a colossal, multi-tiered fiery mountain range on its back spewing glowing red-orange coals.

name: flapple-gmax
description: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
appearance: Flapple-Gmax is a large, green apple split into two massive, ribbed wings with brown stems, revealing a small, green dragon-like creature with yellow eyes and a tiny red mouth peeking out from its core.

name: appletun-gmax
description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.
appearance: Appletun-Gmax is a colossal, round, green apple pie with soft yellowish-green skin and thick, creamy-white glaze drizzled over its top, from which its small, green dragon-like head with yellow eyes, a tiny red mouth, and small green wings emerges, topped by a gigantic, glowing, translucent strawberry.

name: sandaconda-gmax
description: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.
appearance: Sandaconda-Gmax is a colossal, brown-yellow snake with dark brown diamond markings on its back, yellow eyes, and a wide head, coiling upright to form a towering, swirling sand pillar with a massive sandstorm emanating from its mouth.

name: toxtricity-amped-gmax
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: Toxtricity-Amped-Gmax is a tall, purple, punk-rock newt-like creature with a yellow lightning bolt on its chest, purple and teal spikes, a vibrant yellow mohawk, black eyes, and a spiky mouth, glowing with yellow electricity that forms a giant electric guitar around its body.

name: centiskorch-gmax
description: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.
appearance: Centiskorch-Gmax is a gigantic, fiery centipede with a long, segmented red and orange body that arches high, resembling a colossal fire-spitting volcano, featuring a small red head with yellow eyes, two antennae, and numerous yellow-orange legs, constantly emitting intense flames.

name: hatterene-gmax
description: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.
appearance: Hatterene-Gmax is a tall, slender humanoid figure draped in a massive, conical dark blue cloak with bright blue eyes, from which long, flowing blue hair-like tendrils with pink, purple, and green tips emerge, resembling powerful witch-like hands.

name: grimmsnarl-gmax
description: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.
appearance: Grimmsnarl-Gmax is a massive, hulking dark-green humanoid covered in long, thick dark green hair that forms into powerful braids resembling claws and fists, featuring a broad, intimidating dark-pink face with glowing yellow eyes, sharp fangs, and a large nose.

name: alcremie-gmax
description: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.
appearance: Alcremie-Gmax is a colossal, multi-tiered wedding cake with creamy-white frosting, vibrant pink and red fruit decorations, a small white head with pink eyes and a tiny mouth adorned with a red strawberry, and topped by a gigantic, glowing, translucent strawberry crown.

name: copperajah-gmax
description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.
appearance: Copperajah-Gmax is a gigantic, metallic-blue elephant with four massive legs, small yellow eyes, two large dark-blue metallic tusks, and a powerful, segmented trunk resembling a massive industrial crane, its body emitting steam from various joints.

name: duraludon-gmax
description: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.
appearance: Duraludon-Gmax is a colossal, bipedal, metallic grey dragon with an elongated, tower-like body, two small, sharp dark-blue wings, glowing red lines running along its form, and an angular head with two glowing red eyes, its upper body transformed into a glowing red energy cannon.

name: urshifu-single-strike-gmax
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: Urshifu-Single-Strike-Gmax is a massive, dark grey humanoid bear with a white muzzle, dark red armor-like markings around its black eyes and on its body, pointed red ears, and a colossal, shadowy, dark purple fist enveloped in dark energy.

name: urshifu-rapid-strike-gmax
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: Urshifu-Rapid-Strike-Gmax is a massive, dark grey humanoid bear with a white muzzle, bright blue armor-like markings around its black eyes and on its body, pointed blue ears, and a colossal, swirling, bright blue wave of water formed into an open hand.

name: toxtricity-low-key-gmax
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: Toxtricity-Low-Key-Gmax is a tall, blue, punk-rock newt-like creature with a light blue lightning bolt on its chest, dark blue and green spikes, a light blue mohawk, black eyes, and a spiky mouth, glowing with light blue electricity that forms a giant electric guitar around its body.

name: growlithe-hisui
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
appearance: Growlithe-Hisui is a quadrupedal puppy-like Pokemon with thick, shaggy off-white fur covering its head and neck, reddish-brown fur on its body, two brown patches around its black eyes, a small dark nose, and a small horn-like rock protrusion on its forehead.

name: arcanine-hisui
description: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
appearance: Arcanine-Hisui is a large, quadrupedal canine with a flowing, voluminous mane and tail of shaggy off-white fur, a reddish-brown body, distinctive black markings around its black eyes, a dark nose, and sharp, rock-like fangs, adorned with large, flame-like rock protrusions on its back and head.

name: voltorb-hisui
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.
appearance: Voltorb-Hisui is a spherical Pokemon resembling a wooden Poke Ball, with a smooth brown lower half and a lighter, woody textured upper half, featuring a large, angry black oval for an eye and a small dark hole where a mouth might be on its upper half.

name: electrode-hisui
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.
appearance: Electrode-Hisui is a large, spherical Pokemon resembling an inverted wooden Poke Ball, with a smooth brown upper half and a lighter, woody textured lower half separated by a wooden band, its face featuring large, angry black oval eyes, a small dark hole for a mouth, and a tuft of light brown fur or wood shavings on top.

name: typhlosion-hisui
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
appearance: Typhlosion-Hisui is a bipedal badger-like Pokemon with a slender, somewhat spectral purple-grey body, a white belly, dark-purple fur on its head and back, calm-looking red eyes, a small dark nose and mouth, and a collar of spectral purple flames constantly emanating from its neck and tail.

name: qwilfish-hisui
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.
appearance: Qwilfish-Hisui is a round, dark blue pufferfish-like Pokemon covered in sharp, pointed white spikes, with a lighter blue belly, a small, pointed dark blue fin on its back, two small black beady eyes, and a small, puckered mouth.

name: sneasel-hisui
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
appearance: Sneasel-Hisui is a slender, bipedal weasel-like Pokemon with primarily grey fur, a white belly, bright red eyes, a prominent dark purple facial marking over its right eye, a long, pointed dark purple ear on its right side, a large dark purple claw on its left hand, and a long tail tipped with a dark purple plume.

name: samurott-hisui
description: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.
appearance: Samurott-Hisui is a large, quadrupedal sea otter-like Pokemon with a sleek, dark blue body, a cream-colored underbelly, a large, pointed dark blue shell on its back, a dark blue face with large yellow eyes and a small dark nose, framed by two prominent, swirling white shell-like whiskers, and forelegs armed with sharp, pointed dark blue shells.

name: lilligant-hisui
description: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
appearance: Lilligant-Hisui is a graceful, bipedal plant-like Pokemon with a green body, white arms, long green dancer-like legs, gentle black eyes, a small closed mouth, and a head adorned with a large, vibrant pink flower with a prominent yellow center, topped by two large, curling green leaves, and a small pink flower on its chest.

name: zorua-hisui
description: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.
appearance: This small, quadrupedal fox-like Pokémon has white-grey fur with black paws, inner ears, and black tips on its large, fluffy collar and tail, featuring striking red eyes and a red, mask-like marking above them, with no visible mouth.

name: zoroark-hisui
description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.
appearance: This slender, bipedal Pokémon is covered in white fur, featuring black hands and feet, a long, flowing white mane that transitions to red tips, and a large bushy white tail also tipped with red, all framing red eyes and a black snout with no distinct mouth.

name: braviary-hisui
description: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.
appearance: This large, eagle-like Pokémon has a dark greyish-blue body, white back and wings, a white tail, a fluffy white collar, and a vibrant purple head adorned with a red flame-like emblem on its forehead, red eyes, a light grey beak, and light grey talons, with a notable white feathery beard.

name: sliggoo-hisui
description: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.
appearance: This slug-like Pokémon has a dark grey-purple body with a light grey underbelly, featuring two prominent yellow horn-like antennae tipped with dark purple spots, small yellow dot eyes, and a yellowish-orange dome-shaped shell on its back marked with dark purple spots, with no visible mouth.

name: goodra-hisui
description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.
appearance: This large, bipedal, dragon-like Pokémon has a dark metallic purple-grey body, a light grey underbelly, and a prominent rusty metallic brown shell on its back adorned with dark purple spots, featuring two large yellow snail-like horns with dark purple tips, yellow eyes with green pupils and light grey rings, and a small, downturned line mouth.

name: avalugg-hisui
description: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.
appearance: This massive, flat-bodied, quadrupedal Pokémon resembles an iceberg, colored light blue-grey with a darker blue belly, featuring a large, flat, sectioned back, two pointed dark blue-grey ice spikes on its shoulders and smaller ones on its hindquarters, a flat, angular head with a large darker blue-grey chin, yellow eyes, and a small, downturned mouth.

name: decidueye-hisui
description: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.
appearance: This tall, bipedal, owl-like Pokémon features dark green primary plumage with red accents on its wingtips and tail, a dark green face with a reddish-brown mask, a light brown chest and underbelly, dark brown legs, a yellow beak, and red eyes, all crowned by a large, conical, red-tipped straw hat-like headpiece and an arrow-like chest feather.

name: dialga-origin
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.
appearance: This celestial, centaur-like Pokémon has a dark blue and grey metallic body with a heavily armored silver chest piece, from which a large diamond-shaped jewel protrudes; its small head bears four light blue glowing spikes and no discernible mouth or eyes, while its long, segmented, serpent-like tail is tipped with a light blue glowing diamond.

name: palkia-origin
description: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.
appearance: This celestial, centaur-like Pokémon has a light purple and grey metallic body with a heavily armored silver chest piece, from which a large pearl-shaped jewel protrudes; its small head bears four light pink glowing spikes and no discernible mouth or eyes, while its long, segmented, serpent-like tail is tipped with a light pink glowing pearl.

name: basculin-white-striped
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
appearance: This elongated, fish-like Pokémon is primarily light green with a white belly, featuring a distinct jagged white stripe running horizontally along its midsection, light green fins, red eyes with black pupils, and a small, downturned mouth revealing visible teeth.

name: basculegion-female
description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
appearance: This large, elongated, fish-like Pokémon has a dark green upper body with a greyish-white belly, featuring a darker green head with prominent red lips and two red cheek markings, dark eyes with white pupils, a light green ghost-like fin behind its head, a body covered in small lighter green circular markings, and flowing dark green and greyish-white fins, culminating in a tattered, veil-like tail.

name: enamorus-therian
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.
appearance: This Pokémon has a pinkish-purple human-like upper body with white accents, a white cloud-like headpiece resembling hair, a dark green serpent-like lower body adorned with pink heart-shaped markings, yellow eyes with green pupils, a pink snout with two small fangs, and light pink rings on its arms.

name: tauros-paldea-combat-breed
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: This muscular, black-furred, bovine Pokémon features a grey muzzle, three black tails, dark grey horns that curl forward, a distinctive thick grey wavy marking on its forehead, red eyes, and a visible black nose and mouth.

name: tauros-paldea-blaze-breed
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: This muscular, black-furred, bovine Pokémon features a grey muzzle, three black tails, horns that are orange-red at the base and fade to dark grey tips, a prominent fiery red wavy marking glowing subtly on its forehead, red eyes, and a visible black nose and mouth.

name: tauros-paldea-aqua-breed
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: This muscular, black-furred, bovine Pokémon features a grey muzzle, three black tails, horns that are light blue at the base and fade to dark grey tips, a prominent light blue wavy marking glowing subtly on its forehead, red eyes, and a visible black nose and mouth.

name: wooper-paldea
description: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
appearance: This small, slug-like Pokémon has a brown body with a lighter brown belly, short dark brown limbs, two prominent purple-brown star-shaped gills protruding from its head, small black dot eyes, and a tiny downturned line mouth.

name: oinkologne-female
description: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
appearance: This large, robust, pig-like Pokémon is primarily dark brown with a lighter brown snout, belly, and inner ears, featuring a large, curly black ribbon-like appendage on one side of its head, a short, curly black pigtail for a tail, large eyes with black pupils, and a visible pink snout and mouth.

name: dudunsparce-three-segment
description: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
appearance: This elongated, serpentine Pokémon has a yellow body divided into three segments by white bands, a white underbelly, small white wings on its upper back, large round black eyes, a small orange beak-like mouth, small white horn-like antennae, and a pointed white tail tip.

name: palafin-hero
description: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.
appearance: This muscular, bipedal, dolphin-like Pokémon has a light blue body with a white chest and belly, light blue fins, a dorsal fin resembling a cape, a small fin on its head, a prominent light pink heart-shaped emblem on its chest, and a short snout with a small mouth and dark eyes with tiny white pupils.

name: maushold-family-of-three
description: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
appearance: This group consists of three small, white, mouse-like figures—one adult and two smaller children—all with grey inner ears, paws, and tail tips, small black dot eyes, no visible mouths, and distinct blue, red, and yellow shirt-like markings on their chests respectively.

name: tatsugiri-droopy
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: This small, fish-like Pokémon is primarily orange with a white underbelly, featuring a distinctive white, droopy wave-like marking on its head, large black eyes, a small downturned mouth with tiny black teeth, and wavy orange fins.

name: tatsugiri-stretchy
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: This small, fish-like Pokémon is primarily pink with a white underbelly, featuring a distinctive white, straight, stretched-out hood-like marking on its head, large black eyes, a small downturned mouth with tiny black teeth, and triangular pink fins.

name: squawkabilly-blue-plumage
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
appearance: This small, bird-like Pokémon has predominantly blue plumage with a white belly, white wingtip and tail feathers, a prominent white plume cresting its head, a black mask-like marking around its black eyes with white pupils, two small pink cheek markings, and a yellow-orange beak.

name: squawkabilly-yellow-plumage
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
appearance: This small, bird-like Pokémon has predominantly yellow plumage with a white belly, white wingtip and tail feathers, a prominent white plume cresting its head, a black mask-like marking around its black eyes with white pupils, two small pink cheek markings, and a yellow-orange beak.

name: squawkabilly-white-plumage
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
appearance: This small, bird-like Pokémon has predominantly white plumage with a lighter white belly, grey wingtip and tail feathers, a prominent white plume cresting its head, a black mask-like marking around its black eyes with white pupils, two small pink cheek markings, and a yellow-orange beak.

name: gimmighoul-roaming
description: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
appearance: This small, dark brown, ghost-like entity emits a blue glow, featuring a single, large yellow eye, and lacks any discernible mouth or other facial features, appearing to float.

name: koraidon-limited-build
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: This large, reptilian Pokémon is predominantly red with white fur around its neck and chest, featuring a large white and red feather-like head crest, yellow eyes, prominent white fangs, a blue-marked tire-like inflated throat sac, and large red scale-formed wheel-like structures on its back, tail, and forelegs.

name: koraidon-sprinting-build
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: This large, reptilian Pokémon is predominantly red with white fur around its neck and chest, featuring a large white and red feather-like head crest, yellow eyes, prominent white fangs, a prominent inflated blue tire-like structure forming its neck, and similar blue tire-like structures on its hind legs for sprinting, with streamlined red scales on its back and tail.

name: koraidon-swimming-build
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: This large, reptilian Pokémon is predominantly red with white fur around its neck and chest, featuring a large white and red feather-like head crest, yellow eyes, prominent white fangs, an inflated blue throat sac resembling a flotation device, and streamlined red scales on its back and tail ending in fan-like structures, with fan-like membranes on its hind legs.

name: koraidon-gliding-build
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: This large, reptilian Pokémon is predominantly red with white fur around its neck and chest, featuring a large white and red feather-like head crest, yellow eyes, prominent white fangs, large blue wing-like membranes extending from its arms for gliding, and streamlined red scales on its back and tail ending in fan-like structures.

name: miraidon-low-power-mode
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal robotic dragon with a primarily dark purplish-blue body, featuring prominent glowing magenta accents along its angular limbs, tail, and face, with its front wheels retracted into its forelegs and a distinctive 'V' shaped visor glowing magenta on its face.

name: miraidon-drive-mode
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek robotic dragon with a dark purplish-blue body, its forelegs transformed into large glowing magenta wheels and its tail forming another large wheel, while glowing magenta energy patterns emanate from its chest and head, which features a 'V' shaped visor.

name: miraidon-aquatic-mode
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A streamlined, robotic dragon with a dark purplish-blue body and glowing magenta highlights, featuring large, fin-like structures on its back, head, and tail, as well as smaller fins replacing its forelegs, all designed for aquatic movement.

name: miraidon-glide-mode
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek, robotic dragon with a dark purplish-blue body, featuring large, wing-like structures extending from its back and forelegs, along with glowing magenta accents across its body and a 'V' shaped visor on its face, giving it an aerodynamic form.

name: ursaluna-bloodmoon
description: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.
appearance: A large, bipedal bear-like Pokemon with primarily dark reddish-brown fur, a creamy white belly and muzzle, a prominent dark crescent moon marking on its forehead, and one dark, shadowed eye, while the other is open and glowing yellow.

name: ogerpon-wellspring-mask
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, bipedal, plant-like creature with a green body, featuring a light blue, tear-drop shaped mask with white markings resembling tears and two small, pointed ears, adorned with green leafy vines trailing from its head and back.

name: ogerpon-hearthflame-mask
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, bipedal, plant-like creature with a green body, featuring a bright red, heart-shaped mask with two short, upward-curving horns, and adorned with green leafy vines trailing from its head and back.

name: ogerpon-cornerstone-mask
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, bipedal, plant-like creature with a green body, featuring a dark gray, angular mask with a prominent green, four-leaf clover-like gem in its center and three smaller green gems, adorned with green leafy vines trailing from its head and back.

name: terapagos-terastal
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
appearance: A large turtle-like creature with a white, segmented shell covered in various clear, multi-faceted crystal-like structures in shades of red, blue, green, and yellow, radiating an aura of energy, while its body is a pale blue-white.

name: terapagos-stellar
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
appearance: A large turtle-like creature with a white, segmented shell covered in various clear, multi-faceted crystal-like structures in shades of red, blue, green, and yellow, radiating an intense aura, while its body is a dark purplish-blue with glowing white star-like patterns.

name: clefable-mega
description: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
appearance: A larger, more ethereal bipedal fairy with a deeper pink body, larger pointed ears with brown tips, multiple white feathery wings on its back, a larger spiraling hair curl, and delicate white star-like markings on its cheeks.

name: victreebel-mega
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
appearance: An enlarged, more menacing pitcher plant creature with a dark green body and a large, wide-open mouth rimmed with sharp white teeth and a vibrant red interior, featuring an exaggerated, curling vine whip with a red tip.

name: starmie-mega
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.
appearance: A larger, more elaborate star-shaped creature composed of two joined starfish, one primarily purple and the other yellow-orange, each segment ending in a pointed tip, and a large, glowing red central core gem surrounded by smaller blue and yellow gems.

name: dragonite-mega
description: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
appearance: A significantly larger, more robust draconic Pokemon with a deeper orange body, a more armored appearance featuring sharper claws and a longer, more pointed tail, prominent green wings, and a more stern expression with defined facial scales.

name: meganium-mega
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
appearance: A larger, more graceful sauropod-like Pokemon with a pale green body and a vibrant pink flower with a yellow center encircling its neck, featuring an additional tier of smaller pink petals and two long, green antennae with red tips emerging from its head.

name: feraligatr-mega
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.
appearance: A larger, more powerful bipedal crocodilian with a dark blue body, a cream-colored belly, and numerous sharp, bone-like spikes extending from its back, forearms, and tail, featuring an enlarged, toothy maw and glowing red eyes.

name: skarmory-mega
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.
appearance: A larger, more formidable avian Pokemon with a metallic gray body, featuring larger, more angular steel wings with sharp, blade-like feathers, a more pronounced metallic crest, and sharpened talons.

name: froslass-mega
description: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
appearance: A larger, more spectral human-like figure with a white, translucent body, long flowing ribbon-like 'arms' ending in pointed tips, a crown of ice crystal spikes on its head, and a long, flowing icy tail.

name: emboar-mega
description: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.
appearance: A significantly larger, more heavily armored bipedal pig-like Pokemon with a primarily red-orange body, a prominent yellow flame pattern on its chest, large, glowing fiery patterns on its shoulders, and long, dark tusks protruding from its jaw.

name: excadrill-mega
description: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.
appearance: A larger, more heavily armored mole-like Pokemon with a dark brown body and red accents, featuring two significantly larger and sharper steel drills on its head, larger steel claws, and a more robust, segmented metallic shell on its back.

name: scolipede-mega
description: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.
appearance: A larger, more elongated centipede-like Pokemon with a dark red and purple segmented body, featuring numerous larger, sharper spikes along its back and tail, a more prominent, horned head, and several pairs of scythe-like forelegs.

name: scrafty-mega
description: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
appearance: A larger, more muscular bipedal lizard-like Pokemon with an orange and black body, a more pronounced yellow mohawk, and dramatically enlarged, loose white skin resembling baggy pants around its lower body and tail.

name: eelektross-mega
description: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
appearance: Alternate form of eelektross.

name: chandelure-mega
description: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.
appearance: An enlarged, more elaborate chandelier-like Pokemon composed of a central dark purple body with a large, glowing purple flame on top, surrounded by numerous smaller floating blue and purple flames and spectral, ribbon-like arms.

name: chesnaught-mega
description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.
appearance: A significantly larger, more heavily armored bipedal armadillo-like Pokemon with a brown and green body, featuring an enlarged, spiky green 'shell' shield covering its back and arms, and sharper, more pronounced claws.

name: delphox-mega
description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
appearance: A larger, more mystical bipedal fox-like Pokemon with a golden-orange fur coat, an extended staff-like stick infused with purple flames, and longer, more flowing white fur around its arms and neck.

name: greninja-mega
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: A larger, more agile frog-like ninja Pokemon with a dark blue body and a longer, red scarf-like tongue, featuring enhanced, dark purple armor-like scales on its forearms and shins, and white markings on its head.

name: pyroar-mega
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
appearance: A larger, more regal lion-like Pokemon with a golden-brown body, featuring an even more voluminous and fiery red-orange mane that extends down its back, and glowing red eyes.

name: floette-mega
description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
appearance: A larger, more ethereal fairy-like creature with a white body, a long, flowing green skirt-like leaf, and holding an enormous, vibrant red flower with glowing yellow accents and multiple layers of petals.

name: malamar-mega
description: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
appearance: A significantly larger, more menacing cephalopod-like Pokemon with an inverted body, featuring a dark blue and black color scheme, more numerous and intricate tentacle appendages with glowing purple patterns, and a prominent dark hood-like structure with glowing red eyes.

name: barbaracle-mega
description: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.
appearance: Barbaracle's body transforms into a more aggressive, craggy structure of dark grey rock, with its central body armored by jagged stone plates, and its multiple barnacle-hands become larger, culminating in sharper, glowing blue claws.

name: dragalge-mega
description: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.
appearance: Dragalge becomes longer and more serpentine with a deeper purple body, its flowing 'seaweed' fins and crests become more elaborate, spiky, and radiate faint yellow-orange luminescence along their edges, while its eyes sharpen to a piercing golden gleam.

name: hawlucha-mega
description: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.
appearance: Hawlucha takes on a more muscular and angular physique, its red and green plumage becoming more vibrant and razor-edged, with elongated, ornate 'mask' feathers and wing tips, and prominent golden, belt-like markings emblazoned across its chest.

name: zygarde-mega
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: Zygarde's immense serpentine body becomes significantly more armored with crystalline green and black scales, glowing red and blue hexagonal patterns pulsate intensely along its limbs and tail, and its head sprouts more elaborate, multi-pronged horn-like structures.

name: drampa-mega
description: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.
appearance: Drampa's draconic body grows more robust with deeper blue scales, its white cloud-like fur on its head and chest expands into a magnificent, flowing mane and beard, and its normally gentle eyes gain a sharper, golden glint above its small, visible mouth.

name: falinks-mega
description: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.
appearance: The leader Falinks grows substantially, its golden armor becoming spikier and more pronounced with red accents, while the five smaller Falinks become more tightly integrated into its body, forming armored segments that resemble a singular, powerful insectoid legion.

name: raichu-mega-x
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: Raichu's body becomes more muscular with darker brown fur and a more prominent white belly, its tail grows longer and ends in a larger, more jagged lightning bolt shape, and its cheeks develop larger, more defined yellow electric sacs with visible energy crackling around them.

name: raichu-mega-y
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: Raichu's body slims down, its fur a lighter orange-brown, while its ears become significantly larger and more elegant, resembling gliding fins, and its tail splits into two flowing, whip-like lightning bolts, all accentuating its small, dark eyes and petite mouth.

name: chimecho-mega
description: CHIMECHO makes its cries echo inside its hollow body. When this POKéMON becomes enraged, its cries result in ultrasonic waves that have the power to knock foes flying.
appearance: Chimecho's bell-shaped body becomes more intricately patterned with gold filigree over its light blue base, its small mouth and eyes remain distinct, and its clapper-like appendage elongates, adorned with multiple smaller, tinkling bells.

name: absol-mega-z
description: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKéMON.
appearance: Absol's sleek, white feline body becomes even more refined and angular, its dark mane and tail grow longer and flow like shadows, and it sports four large, razor-sharp scythe-like blades: one on its head, two emerging from its back like crystalline wings, and one at the end of its tail.

name: staraptor-mega
description: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.
appearance: Staraptor's body becomes more streamlined and powerfully built, its black and white plumage gaining sharper edges and a metallic sheen, its prominent red crest elongates into a dramatic, sweeping plume, and its talons and beak grow notably larger and more menacing.

name: garchomp-mega-z
description: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.
appearance: Garchomp's body becomes even bulkier and more heavily armored, its blue scales darken and are covered in numerous larger, jagged spikes and blades, its head-fins transform into an imposing crown of sharp edges, and its mouth reveals rows of menacing teeth.

name: lucario-mega-z
description: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.
appearance: Lucario's lean, fighting form becomes more defined with darker blue fur and cream-colored accents, its dreadlock-like appendages grow longer and more numerous, shimmering with a faint blue aura, and its forearms gain sharp, crystalline energy spikes that extend past its knuckles.

name: heatran-mega
description: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.
appearance: Heatran's body grows larger and more segmented, its steel plates becoming darker and hotter, interspersed with rivers of molten orange lava that glow intensely from within, and its four legs become thicker, ending in powerful, stomping hooves.

name: darkrai-mega
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.
appearance: Darkrai's shadowy form becomes more imposing and elongated, its tattered cloak-like appendages flow even more dramatically, and its single, glowing blue eye is framed by a more intricate, spectral mask, with sharper white hair-like elements emerging from its head.

name: golurk-mega
description: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.
appearance: Golurk's colossal body becomes even more massive and heavily armored, its stone segments reinforced with ancient, glowing green glyphs, its fists enlarge significantly, and a prominent, ornate chest plate adds to its formidable, silent appearance.

name: meowstic-mega
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
appearance: Meowstic's lithe feline body becomes more elegant and elongated, its dark fur gains a deeper hue, its ears become larger and more intricately curled, emitting faint, visible rings of psychic energy, and its eyes glow with an intense, piercing blue.

name: crabominable-mega
description: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.
appearance: Crabominable's massive body becomes even more robust and shaggy, covered in thick, white fur with prominent ice crystals clinging to its limbs, its large, powerful claws grow into formidable, ice-covered weapons, and its small, determined eyes peer out from its snowy mane.

name: golisopod-mega
description: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.
appearance: Golisopod's imposing, armored body becomes even more formidable, its purple and grey carapace gaining sharper, more segmented plates, its four large, razor-sharp scythe-like limbs extend dramatically, and its head becomes more angular with menacing yellow eyes.

name: magearna-mega
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: Magearna's spherical body becomes more streamlined and elegant, its metallic shell gaining intricate gold filigree over its crimson and white plating, its eyes glow with a soft, ethereal light, and its chest opens slightly to reveal a more complex, pulsating soul-heart mechanism.

name: magearna-original-mega
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: Magearna's spherical body, cast in an elegant bronze hue with striking red accents, becomes more ornate, its metallic shell adorned with intricate clockwork patterns, and its glowing eyes and slightly revealed, intricate soul-heart mechanism pulsate with a stronger, ancient energy.

name: zeraora-mega
description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.
appearance: Zeraora's sleek, agile body becomes even more electrified, its yellow and black fur developing sharper, more defined lightning bolt patterns that subtly crackle with energy, its forearms gain larger, visible electric conduits, and its bright blue eyes glow with intense power.

name: scovillain-mega
description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
appearance: Scovillain's twin pepper-heads become larger and more vibrant, the green head intensely verdant and the red head fiercely scarlet, both now with sharper, fang-like teeth, while its draconic body thickens and sprouts more prominent, spiky leaf-like fins along its back.

name: glimmora-mega
description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
appearance: Glimmora's crystalline flower-like structure expands dramatically, its iridescent purple petals becoming larger and more numerous, revealing a more intricate, glowing yellow core, and its tendril-like 'roots' beneath grow longer and sharper.

name: tatsugiri-curly-mega
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: Tatsugiri's curly, orange and white sushi-like body elongates gracefully, its 'sushi topping' fins become more flowing and iridescent, and its small, perpetually surprised-looking eyes are framed by subtle, elegant patterns.

name: tatsugiri-droopy-mega
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: Tatsugiri's droopy, pinkish-purple and white sushi-like body expands, its head-fin becoming more pronounced and flowing like a delicate veil, and its small, sad-looking eyes gain a deeper, more reflective sheen.

name: tatsugiri-stretchy-mega
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: Tatsugiri's stretchy, yellow and white sushi-like body becomes more slender and elongated, its dorsal fin transforms into a more intricate, segmented ribbon, and its small, determined eyes peer forward with increased focus.

name: baxcalibur-mega
description: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
appearance: Baxcalibur's formidable draconic body grows even more immense, its blue and white scales transforming into jagged, armor-like ice plates, its dorsal fin elongates into a massive, serrated ice blade, and its powerful jaws reveal rows of crystalline fangs.
